title: Object Goal Navigation Based on Semantics and RGB Ego View
title_zh: 基于语义和RGB自我视图的对象目标导航
abstract: This paper presents an architecture and methodology to empower a service robot to navigate an indoor environment with semantic decision making, given RGB ego view. This method leverages the knowledge of robot's actuation capability and that of scenes, objects and their relations -- represented in a semantic form. The robot navigates based on GeoSem map - a relational combination of geometric and semantic map. The goal given to the robot is to find an object in a unknown environment with no navigational map and only egocentric RGB camera perception. The approach is tested both on a simulation environment and real life indoor settings. The presented approach was found to outperform human users in gamified evaluations with respect to average completion time.
summary: This paper presents an architecture and methodology to empower a service robot to navigate an indoor environment with semantic decision making, given RGB ego view. This method leverages the knowledge of robot's actuation capability and that of scenes, objects and their relations -- represented in a semantic form. The robot navigates based on GeoSem map - a relational combination of geometric and semantic map. The goal given to the robot is to find an object in a unknown environment with no navigational map and only egocentric RGB camera perception. The approach is tested both on a simulation environment and real life indoor settings. The presented approach was found to outperform human users in gamified evaluations with respect to average completion time.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种架构和方法，使服务机器人能够在给定 RGB 自我视图的情况下通过语义决策来导航室内环境。该方法利用了机器人驱动能力以及场景、物体及其关系的知识——以语义形式表示。机器人基于 GeoSem 地图进行导航 - GeoSem 地图是几何和语义地图的关系组合。机器人的目标是在未知环境中找到物体，没有导航地图，只有以自我为中心的 RGB 相机感知。该方法在模拟环境和现实生活室内环境中进行了测试。我们发现所提出的方法在游戏化评估中的平均完成时间优于人类用户。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义和RGB自车视角的机器人导航方法，使服务机器人能够在未知室内环境中通过视觉感知找到目标物体。
AI.motivation: 传统导航依赖预设地图，但在未知环境中无法使用。需利用实时视觉信息和语义理解实现自主导航。
AI.method: 构建结合几何信息与语义关系的GeoSem地图，通过RGB摄像头感知环境，利用语义决策进行路径规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实场景测试中，该方法在游戏化评估中平均完成时间优于人类用户。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了语义驱动导航的有效性，为无地图环境下的机器人目标搜索提供了新思路。

title: Sketching Meets Differential Privacy: Fast Algorithm for Dynamic Kronecker Projection Maintenance
title_zh: 草图绘制满足差分隐私：动态克罗内克投影维护的快速算法
comment: Fixed an error in the set query data structure (Theorem 6.2)
comments: Fixed an error in the set query data structure (Theorem 6.2)
abstract: Projection maintenance is one of the core data structure tasks. Efficient data structures for projection maintenance have led to recent breakthroughs in many convex programming algorithms. In this work, we further extend this framework to the Kronecker product structure. Given a constraint matrix ${\sf A}$ and a positive semi-definite matrix $W\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times n}$ with a sparse eigenbasis, we consider the task of maintaining the projection in the form of ${\sf B}^\top({\sf B}{\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\sf B}$, where ${\sf B}={\sf A}(W\otimes I)$ or ${\sf B}={\sf A}(W^{1/2}\otimes W^{1/2})$. At each iteration, the weight matrix $W$ receives a low rank change and we receive a new vector $h$. The goal is to maintain the projection matrix and answer the query ${\sf B}^\top({\sf B}{\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\sf B}h$ with good approximation guarantees. We design a fast dynamic data structure for this task and it is robust against an adaptive adversary. Following the beautiful and pioneering work of [Beimel, Kaplan, Mansour, Nissim, Saranurak and Stemmer, STOC'22], we use tools from differential privacy to reduce the randomness required by the data structure and further improve the running time.
summary: Projection maintenance is one of the core data structure tasks. Efficient data structures for projection maintenance have led to recent breakthroughs in many convex programming algorithms. In this work, we further extend this framework to the Kronecker product structure. Given a constraint matrix ${\sf A}$ and a positive semi-definite matrix $W\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times n}$ with a sparse eigenbasis, we consider the task of maintaining the projection in the form of ${\sf B}^\top({\sf B}{\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\sf B}$, where ${\sf B}={\sf A}(W\otimes I)$ or ${\sf B}={\sf A}(W^{1/2}\otimes W^{1/2})$. At each iteration, the weight matrix $W$ receives a low rank change and we receive a new vector $h$. The goal is to maintain the projection matrix and answer the query ${\sf B}^\top({\sf B}{\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\sf B}h$ with good approximation guarantees. We design a fast dynamic data structure for this task and it is robust against an adaptive adversary. Following the beautiful and pioneering work of [Beimel, Kaplan, Mansour, Nissim, Saranurak and Stemmer, STOC'22], we use tools from differential privacy to reduce the randomness required by the data structure and further improve the running time.
abstract_zh: 投影维护是核心数据结构任务之一。用于投影维护的高效数据结构最近导致了许多凸规划算法的突破。在这项工作中，我们进一步将此框架扩展到克罗内克产品结构。给定一个约束矩阵 ${\sf A}$ 和一个具有稀疏特征基的半正定矩阵 $W\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times n}$，我们考虑以 ${\sf B}^\top({\sf B}{\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\sf B}$ 形式维护投影的任务，其中 ${\sf B}={\sf A}(W\otimes I)$ 或 ${\sf B}={\sf A}(W^{1/2}\otime W^{1/2})$。在每次迭代中，权重矩阵 $W$ 都会发生低秩变化，并且我们会收到一个新的向量 $h$。目标是维护投影矩阵并以良好的近似保证回答查询 ${\sf B}^\top({\sf B}{\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\sf B}h$ 。我们为此任务设计了一种快速动态数据结构，它对于自适应对手来说具有鲁棒性。继[Beimel、Kaplan、Mansour、Nissim、Saranurak 和 Stemmer，STOC'22] 的精美而开创性的工作之后，我们使用差分隐私的工具来减少数据结构所需的随机性，并进一步提高运行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合差分隐私的快速动态算法，用于维护Kronecker乘积结构下的投影矩阵，应对权重矩阵的低秩变化并高效回答投影查询。
AI.motivation: 投影维护是核心数据结构任务，传统方法在处理Kronecker结构动态更新时效率不足，且需应对自适应对手攻击，同时需兼顾隐私保护。
AI.method: 基于差分隐私工具减少数据结构的随机性需求，设计动态数据结构处理权重矩阵的低秩变化，并维护投影矩阵形式为${\\sf B}^\top({\\sf B}{\\sf B}^\top)^{-1}{\\sf B}$的近似解。
AI.result: 开发出鲁棒的动态数据结构，在自适应对手下实现投影查询的高效近似计算，同时降低随机性需求并提升运行时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合差分隐私与动态维护技术，本文为Kronecker投影问题提供了高效且隐私保护的解决方案，推动了凸优化算法的实际应用。

title: ConfMix: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Object Detection via Confidence-based Mixing
title_zh: ConfMix：通过基于置信度的混合进行对象检测的无监督域适应
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) for object detection aims to adapt a model trained on a source domain to detect instances from a new target domain for which annotations are not available. Different from traditional approaches, we propose ConfMix, the first method that introduces a sample mixing strategy based on region-level detection confidence for adaptive object detector learning. We mix the local region of the target sample that corresponds to the most confident pseudo detections with a source image, and apply an additional consistency loss term to gradually adapt towards the target data distribution. In order to robustly define a confidence score for a region, we exploit the confidence score per pseudo detection that accounts for both the detector-dependent confidence and the bounding box uncertainty. Moreover, we propose a novel pseudo labelling scheme that progressively filters the pseudo target detections using the confidence metric that varies from a loose to strict manner along the training. We perform extensive experiments with three datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance in two of them and approaching the supervised target model performance in the other. Code is available at: https://github.com/giuliomattolin/ConfMix.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) for object detection aims to adapt a model trained on a source domain to detect instances from a new target domain for which annotations are not available. Different from traditional approaches, we propose ConfMix, the first method that introduces a sample mixing strategy based on region-level detection confidence for adaptive object detector learning. We mix the local region of the target sample that corresponds to the most confident pseudo detections with a source image, and apply an additional consistency loss term to gradually adapt towards the target data distribution. In order to robustly define a confidence score for a region, we exploit the confidence score per pseudo detection that accounts for both the detector-dependent confidence and the bounding box uncertainty. Moreover, we propose a novel pseudo labelling scheme that progressively filters the pseudo target detections using the confidence metric that varies from a loose to strict manner along the training. We perform extensive experiments with three datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance in two of them and approaching the supervised target model performance in the other. Code is available at: https://github.com/giuliomattolin/ConfMix.
abstract_zh: 用于对象检测的无监督域适应 (UDA) 旨在调整在源域上训练的模型，以检测注释不可用的新目标域中的实例。与传统方法不同，我们提出了 ConfMix，这是第一个引入基于区域级检测置信度的样本混合策略的方法，用于自适应目标检测器学习。我们将与最置信伪检测相对应的目标样本的局部区域与源图像混合，并应用额外的一致性损失项来逐渐适应目标数据分布。为了稳健地定义区域的置信度得分，我们利用每个伪检测的置信度得分，该得分同时考虑了检测器相关的置信度和边界框的不确定性。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的伪标记方案，该方案使用在训练过程中从宽松到严格变化的置信度度量逐步过滤伪目标检测。我们对三个数据集进行了广泛的实验，其中两个数据集实现了最先进的性能，而另一个数据集则接近监督目标模型的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/giuliomattolin/ConfMix。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConfMix方法，通过基于区域检测置信度的样本混合策略，实现无监督领域自适应的目标检测模型学习。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应方法未能有效利用检测置信度信息，导致伪标签质量不高。本文旨在通过区域级置信度筛选和混合策略提升目标检测的领域适应能力。
AI.method: 混合目标样本高置信度区域与源图像，结合一致性损失项；设计动态置信度筛选机制，从宽松到严格过滤伪标签，并融合检测器置信度与边界框不确定性计算区域置信度。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实现两个数据集的最先进性能，第三个数据集接近有监督目标模型性能。
AI.conclusion: ConfMix通过置信度引导的样本混合与动态伪标签筛选机制，有效提升了无监督领域自适应目标检测的性能，为跨领域检测提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ConfMix方法，通过基于区域检测置信度的样本混合策略，实现无监督领域自适应的目标检测模型学习。

ai_content.result: 在三个数据集上实现两个数据集的最先进性能，第三个数据集接近有监督目标模型性能。
ai_content.conclusion: ConfMix通过置信度引导的样本混合与动态伪标签筛选机制，有效提升了无监督领域自适应目标检测的性能，为跨领域检测提供了新思路。

motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应方法未能有效利用检测置信度信息，导致伪标签质量不高。本文旨在通过区域级置信度筛选和混合策略提升目标检测的领域适应能力。
method: 混合目标样本高置信度区域与源图像，结合一致性损失项；设计动态置信度筛选机制，从宽松到严格过滤伪标签，并融合检测器置信度与边界框不确定性计算区域置信度。
result: 在三个数据集上实现两个数据集的最先进性能，第三个数据集接近有监督目标模型性能。
conclusion: ConfMix通过置信度引导的样本混合与动态伪标签筛选机制，有效提升了无监督领域自适应目标检测的性能，为跨领域检测提供了新思路。
search_text: ConfMix: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Object Detection via Confidence-based Mixing ConfMix：通过基于置信度的混合进行对象检测的无监督域适应 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) for object detection aims to adapt a model trained on a source domain to detect instances from a new target domain for which annotations are not available. Different from traditional approaches, we propose ConfMix, the first method that introduces a sample mixing strategy based on region-level detection confidence for adaptive object detector learning. We mix the local region of the target sample that corresponds to the most confident pseudo detections with a source image, and apply an additional consistency loss term to gradually adapt towards the target data distribution. In order to robustly define a confidence score for a region, we exploit the confidence score per pseudo detection that accounts for both the detector-dependent confidence and the bounding box uncertainty. Moreover, we propose a novel pseudo labelling scheme that progressively filters the pseudo target detections using the confidence metric that varies from a loose to strict manner along the training. We perform extensive experiments with three datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance in two of them and approaching the supervised target model performance in the other. Code is available at: https://github.com/giuliomattolin/ConfMix. 用于对象检测的无监督域适应 (UDA) 旨在调整在源域上训练的模型，以检测注释不可用的新目标域中的实例。与传统方法不同，我们提出了 ConfMix，这是第一个引入基于区域级检测置信度的样本混合策略的方法，用于自适应目标检测器学习。我们将与最置信伪检测相对应的目标样本的局部区域与源图像混合，并应用额外的一致性损失项来逐渐适应目标数据分布。为了稳健地定义区域的置信度得分，我们利用每个伪检测的置信度得分，该得分同时考虑了检测器相关的置信度和边界框的不确定性。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的伪标记方案，该方案使用在训练过程中从宽松到严格变化的置信度度量逐步过滤伪目标检测。我们对三个数据集进行了广泛的实验，其中两个数据集实现了最先进的性能，而另一个数据集则接近监督目标模型的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/giuliomattolin/ConfMix。 本文提出ConfMix方法，通过基于区域检测置信度的样本混合策略，实现无监督领域自适应的目标检测模型学习。 Giulio Mattolin,Luca Zanella,Elisa Ricci,Yiming Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Stephanie Newdick,Tony G. Chen,Benjamin Hockman,Edward Schmerling,Mark R. Cutkosky,Marco Pavone
title: Designing ReachBot: System Design Process with a Case Study of a Martian Lava Tube Mission
title_zh: 设计 ReachBot：以火星熔岩管任务案例研究为背景的系统设计过程
abstract: In this paper we present a trade study-based method to optimize the architecture of ReachBot, a new robotic concept that uses deployable booms as prismatic joints for mobility in environments with adverse gravity conditions and challenging terrain. Specifically, we introduce a design process wherein we analyze the compatibility of ReachBot's design with its mission. We incorporate terrain parameters and mission requirements to produce a final design optimized for mission-specific objectives. ReachBot's design parameters include (1) number of booms, (2) positions and orientations of the booms on ReachBot's chassis, (3) boom maximum extension, (4) boom cross-sectional geometry, and (5) number of active/passive degrees-of-freedom at each joint. Using first-order approximations, we analyze the relationships between these parameters and various performance metrics including stability, manipulability, and mechanical interference. We apply our method to a mission where ReachBot navigates and gathers data from a martian lava tube. The resulting design is shown in Fig. 1.
summary: In this paper we present a trade study-based method to optimize the architecture of ReachBot, a new robotic concept that uses deployable booms as prismatic joints for mobility in environments with adverse gravity conditions and challenging terrain. Specifically, we introduce a design process wherein we analyze the compatibility of ReachBot's design with its mission. We incorporate terrain parameters and mission requirements to produce a final design optimized for mission-specific objectives. ReachBot's design parameters include (1) number of booms, (2) positions and orientations of the booms on ReachBot's chassis, (3) boom maximum extension, (4) boom cross-sectional geometry, and (5) number of active/passive degrees-of-freedom at each joint. Using first-order approximations, we analyze the relationships between these parameters and various performance metrics including stability, manipulability, and mechanical interference. We apply our method to a mission where ReachBot navigates and gathers data from a martian lava tube. The resulting design is shown in Fig. 1.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于权衡研究的方法来优化 ReachBot 的架构，这是一种新的机器人概念，它使用可展开的吊杆作为棱柱接头，以便在具有不利重力条件和挑战性地形的环境中进行移动。具体来说，我们介绍了一个设计过程，其中我们分析了 ReachBot 的设计与其使命的兼容性。我们结合地形参数和任务要求来生成针对特定任务目标优化的最终设计。 ReachBot 的设计参数包括 (1) 吊杆数量、(2) 吊杆在 ReachBot 底盘上的位置和方向、(3) 吊杆最大延伸距离、(4) 吊杆横截面几何形状以及 (5) 每个关节处的主动/被动自由度数量。使用一阶近似，我们分析这些参数与各种性能指标之间的关系，包括稳定性、可操作性和机械干扰。我们将我们的方法应用于 ReachBot 导航并从火星熔岩管收集数据的任务。最终设计如图 1 所示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于权衡研究的方法，用于优化ReachBot机器人架构，以适应火星熔岩管任务中的恶劣环境。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人难以应对火星低重力和复杂地形，需设计新型移动机构以确保稳定性与操作性。
AI.method: 通过分析Boom数量、布局、延伸长度、截面几何及关节自由度等参数，结合性能指标（稳定性、可操作性、机械干扰）建立优化模型。
AI.result: 成功设计出适用于火星熔岩管探测的ReachBot原型，其结构参数满足任务特定需求（见图1）。
AI.conclusion: 该设计方法能有效平衡机器人性能与任务约束，为极端环境下的探测任务提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Shuang Li,Yilun Du,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Antonio Torralba,Igor Mordatch
title: Composing Ensembles of Pre-trained Models via Iterative Consensus
title_zh: 通过迭代共识组合预训练模型的集成
abstract: Large pre-trained models exhibit distinct and complementary capabilities dependent on the data they are trained on. Language models such as GPT-3 are capable of textual reasoning but cannot understand visual information, while vision models such as DALL-E can generate photorealistic photos but fail to understand complex language descriptions. In this work, we propose a unified framework for composing ensembles of different pre-trained models -- combining the strengths of each individual model to solve various multimodal problems in a zero-shot manner. We use pre-trained models as "generators" or "scorers" and compose them via closed-loop iterative consensus optimization. The generator constructs proposals and the scorers iteratively provide feedback to refine the generated result. Such closed-loop communication enables models to correct errors caused by other models, significantly boosting performance on downstream tasks, e.g. improving accuracy on grade school math problems by 7.5%, without requiring any model finetuning. We demonstrate that consensus achieved by an ensemble of scorers outperforms the feedback of a single scorer, by leveraging the strengths of each expert model. Results show that the proposed method can be used as a general purpose framework for a wide range of zero-shot multimodal tasks, such as image generation, video question answering, mathematical reasoning, and robotic manipulation. Project page: https://energy-based-model.github.io/composing-pretrained-models.
summary: Large pre-trained models exhibit distinct and complementary capabilities dependent on the data they are trained on. Language models such as GPT-3 are capable of textual reasoning but cannot understand visual information, while vision models such as DALL-E can generate photorealistic photos but fail to understand complex language descriptions. In this work, we propose a unified framework for composing ensembles of different pre-trained models -- combining the strengths of each individual model to solve various multimodal problems in a zero-shot manner. We use pre-trained models as "generators" or "scorers" and compose them via closed-loop iterative consensus optimization. The generator constructs proposals and the scorers iteratively provide feedback to refine the generated result. Such closed-loop communication enables models to correct errors caused by other models, significantly boosting performance on downstream tasks, e.g. improving accuracy on grade school math problems by 7.5%, without requiring any model finetuning. We demonstrate that consensus achieved by an ensemble of scorers outperforms the feedback of a single scorer, by leveraging the strengths of each expert model. Results show that the proposed method can be used as a general purpose framework for a wide range of zero-shot multimodal tasks, such as image generation, video question answering, mathematical reasoning, and robotic manipulation. Project page: https://energy-based-model.github.io/composing-pretrained-models.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练模型表现出独特且互补的功能，具体取决于它们所训练的数据。 GPT-3等语言模型能够进行文本推理，但无法理解视觉信息，而DALL-E等视觉模型可以生成逼真的照片，但无法理解复杂的语言描述。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，用于组合不同预训练模型的集成——结合每个单独模型的优势，以零样本的方式解决各种多模态问题。我们使用预先训练的模型作为“生成器”或“评分器”，并通过闭环迭代共识优化来组合它们。生成器构建提案，评分器迭代地提供反馈以完善生成的结果。这种闭环通信使模型能够纠正其他模型引起的错误，从而显着提高下游任务的性能，例如将小学数学问题的准确性提高 7.5%，且无需任何模型微调。我们证明，通过利用每个专家模型的优势，由一组评分者达成的共识优于单个评分者的反馈。结果表明，所提出的方法可以用作各种零样本多模态任务的通用框架，例如图像生成、视频问答、数学推理和机器人操作。项目页面：https://energy-based-model.github.io/composition-pretrained-models。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过迭代共识优化组合不同预训练模型的统一框架，以解决多模态任务。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型在单一模态任务中表现优异，但难以处理需要多模态协同的复杂问题，且无需微调模型即可实现零样本跨模态协作。
AI.method: 构建生成器与评分器的闭环系统，生成器提出候选方案，评分器通过多轮迭代反馈优化结果，利用模型间共识提升性能。
AI.result: 在数学推理等任务中准确率提升7.5%，验证了框架在图像生成、视频问答等多领域零样本任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模型间协作修正误差，为多模态任务提供通用解决方案，无需依赖模型微调或额外训练数据。

The generator constructs proposals and the scorers iteratively provide feedback to refine the generated result. Such closed-loop communication enables models to correct errors caused by other models, significantly boosting performance on downstream tasks, e.g. improving accuracy on grade school math problems by 7.5%, without requiring any model finetuning. We demonstrate that consensus achieved by an ensemble of scorers outperforms the feedback of a single scorer, by leveraging the strengths of each expert model. Results show that the proposed method can be used as a general purpose framework for a wide range of zero-shot multimodal tasks, such as image generation, video question answering, mathematical reasoning, and robotic manipulation. Project page: https://energy-based-model.github.io/composing-pretrained-models. 大型预训练模型表现出独特且互补的功能，具体取决于它们所训练的数据。 GPT-3等语言模型能够进行文本推理，但无法理解视觉信息，而DALL-E等视觉模型可以生成逼真的照片，但无法理解复杂的语言描述。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，用于组合不同预训练模型的集成——结合每个单独模型的优势，以零样本的方式解决各种多模态问题。我们使用预先训练的模型作为“生成器”或“评分器”，并通过闭环迭代共识优化来组合它们。生成器构建提案，评分器迭代地提供反馈以完善生成的结果。这种闭环通信使模型能够纠正其他模型引起的错误，从而显着提高下游任务的性能，例如将小学数学问题的准确性提高 7.5%，且无需任何模型微调。我们证明，通过利用每个专家模型的优势，由一组评分者达成的共识优于单个评分者的反馈。结果表明，所提出的方法可以用作各种零样本多模态任务的通用框架，例如图像生成、视频问答、数学推理和机器人操作。项目页面：https://energy-based-model.github.io/composition-pretrained-models。 本文提出一种通过迭代共识优化组合不同预训练模型的统一框架，以解决多模态任务。 Shuang Li,Yilun Du,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Antonio Torralba,Igor Mordatch cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Donghyeon Kim,Kyungdeuk Ko,David K. Han,Hanseok Ko
title: Discriminatory and orthogonal feature learning for noise robust keyword spotting
title_zh: 用于噪声鲁棒关键字识别的判别性和正交特征学习
abstract: Keyword Spotting (KWS) is an essential component in a smart device for alerting the system when a user prompts it with a command. As these devices are typically constrained by computational and energy resources, the KWS model should be designed with a small footprint. In our previous work, we developed lightweight dynamic filters which extract a robust feature map within a noisy environment. The learning variables of the dynamic filter are jointly optimized with KWS weights by using Cross-Entropy (CE) loss. CE loss alone, however, is not sufficient for high performance when the SNR is low. In order to train the network for more robust performance in noisy environments, we introduce the LOw Variant Orthogonal (LOVO) loss. The LOVO loss is composed of a triplet loss applied on the output of the dynamic filter, a spectral norm-based orthogonal loss, and an inner class distance loss applied in the KWS model. These losses are particularly useful in encouraging the network to extract discriminatory features in unseen noise environments.
summary: Keyword Spotting (KWS) is an essential component in a smart device for alerting the system when a user prompts it with a command. As these devices are typically constrained by computational and energy resources, the KWS model should be designed with a small footprint. In our previous work, we developed lightweight dynamic filters which extract a robust feature map within a noisy environment. The learning variables of the dynamic filter are jointly optimized with KWS weights by using Cross-Entropy (CE) loss. CE loss alone, however, is not sufficient for high performance when the SNR is low. In order to train the network for more robust performance in noisy environments, we introduce the LOw Variant Orthogonal (LOVO) loss. The LOVO loss is composed of a triplet loss applied on the output of the dynamic filter, a spectral norm-based orthogonal loss, and an inner class distance loss applied in the KWS model. These losses are particularly useful in encouraging the network to extract discriminatory features in unseen noise environments.
abstract_zh: 关键字识别 (KWS) 是智能设备中的重要组件，用于在用户用命令提示时向系统发出警报。由于这些设备通常受到计算和能源资源的限制，因此 KWS 模型的设计应占用较小的空间。在我们之前的工作中，我们开发了轻量级动态滤波器，可以在嘈杂的环境中提取鲁棒的特征图。通过使用交叉熵（CE）损失，动态滤波器的学习变量与 KWS 权重联合优化。然而，当 SNR 较低时，仅 CE 损耗不足以实现高性能。为了训练网络在噪声环境中获得更鲁棒的性能，我们引入了低变体正交（LOVO）损失。 LOVO 损失由应用于动态滤波器输出的三元组损失、基于谱范数的正交损失以及应用于 KWS 模型的内部类距离损失组成。这些损失对于鼓励网络在不可见的噪声环境中提取歧视性特征特别有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合判别性和正交性特征学习的方法，以提高噪声环境下的关键词识别（KWS）鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级KWS模型在低信噪比（SNR）环境下性能不足，需通过改进特征学习提升噪声鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入LOVO损失函数，包含三元组损失（动态滤波器输出）、基于谱范数的正交损失及KWS模型内类距离损失，与交叉熵损失联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在噪声环境中显著优于仅使用交叉熵损失的基线模型，提升了KWS的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过判别性与正交性特征学习，LOVO损失有效增强了KWS模型在噪声场景下的性能，适用于资源受限的智能设备。

title: Overexposure Mask Fusion: Generalizable Reverse ISP Multi-Step Refinement
title_zh: 过度曝光掩模融合：可推广的反向 ISP 多步细化
abstract: With the advent of deep learning methods replacing the ISP in transforming sensor RAW readings into RGB images, numerous methodologies solidified into real-life applications. Equally potent is the task of inverting this process which will have applications in enhancing computational photography tasks that are conducted in the RAW domain, addressing lack of available RAW data while reaping from the benefits of performing tasks directly on sensor readings. This paper's proposed methodology is a state-of-the-art solution to the task of RAW reconstruction, and the multi-step refinement process integrating an overexposure mask is novel in three ways: instead of from RGB to bayer, the pipeline trains from RGB to demosaiced RAW allowing use of perceptual loss functions; the multi-step processes has greatly enhanced the performance of the baseline U-Net from start to end; the pipeline is a generalizable process of refinement that can enhance other high performance methodologies that support end-to-end learning.
summary: With the advent of deep learning methods replacing the ISP in transforming sensor RAW readings into RGB images, numerous methodologies solidified into real-life applications. Equally potent is the task of inverting this process which will have applications in enhancing computational photography tasks that are conducted in the RAW domain, addressing lack of available RAW data while reaping from the benefits of performing tasks directly on sensor readings. This paper's proposed methodology is a state-of-the-art solution to the task of RAW reconstruction, and the multi-step refinement process integrating an overexposure mask is novel in three ways: instead of from RGB to bayer, the pipeline trains from RGB to demosaiced RAW allowing use of perceptual loss functions; the multi-step processes has greatly enhanced the performance of the baseline U-Net from start to end; the pipeline is a generalizable process of refinement that can enhance other high performance methodologies that support end-to-end learning.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习方法的出现取代了 ISP，将传感器 RAW 读数转换为 RGB 图像，许多方法都固化到了现实生活中的应用中。同样有效的是反转这一过程的任务，它将应用于增强在 RAW 域中进行的计算摄影任务，解决可用 RAW 数据的缺乏，同时从直接根据传感器读数执行任务的好处中获益。本文提出的方法是针对 RAW 重建任务的最先进的解决方案，并且集成过度曝光掩模的多步骤细化过程在三个方面是新颖的：不是从 RGB 到拜耳，而是从 RGB 到去马赛克 RAW 的管道训练，允许使用感知损失函数；多步骤过程极大地提高了基线 U-Net 从始至终的性能；该管道是一个可推广的细化过程，可以增强其他支持端到端学习的高性能方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于过曝掩码融合的多步骤优化方法，用于从RGB图像重建传感器原始RAW数据，以提升计算摄影任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习已广泛替代ISP将RAW数据转换为RGB图像，但逆向过程（RGB到RAW）在计算摄影领域仍缺乏有效方法，尤其在RAW数据稀缺时需直接操作传感器读数。
AI.method: 通过多步骤优化流程整合过曝掩码，训练从RGB到去马赛克RAW的管道，替代传统RGB到Bayer模式；结合感知损失函数，提升基线U-Net性能，并使该流程可泛化至其他端到端方法。
AI.result: 方法在RAW重建任务中达到SOTA性能，多步骤优化显著提升基线模型效果，且流程具有通用性，可增强其他高性能方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为RAW重建提供了新颖且通用的解决方案，通过直接操作传感器数据提升计算摄影任务效果，尤其适用于RAW数据不足的场景。

title: Multimodal Neural Network For Demand Forecasting
title_zh: 用于需求预测的多模态神经网络
abstract: Demand forecasting applications have immensely benefited from the state-of-the-art Deep Learning methods used for time series forecasting. Traditional uni-modal models are predominantly seasonality driven which attempt to model the demand as a function of historic sales along with information on holidays and promotional events. However, accurate and robust sales forecasting calls for accommodating multiple other factors, such as natural calamities, pandemics, elections, etc., impacting the demand for products and product categories in general. We propose a multi-modal sales forecasting network that combines real-life events from news articles with traditional data such as historical sales and holiday information. Further, we fuse information from general product trends published by Google trends. Empirical results show statistically significant improvements in the SMAPE error metric with an average improvement of 7.37% against the existing state-of-the-art sales forecasting techniques on a real-world supermarket dataset.
summary: Demand forecasting applications have immensely benefited from the state-of-the-art Deep Learning methods used for time series forecasting. Traditional uni-modal models are predominantly seasonality driven which attempt to model the demand as a function of historic sales along with information on holidays and promotional events. However, accurate and robust sales forecasting calls for accommodating multiple other factors, such as natural calamities, pandemics, elections, etc., impacting the demand for products and product categories in general. We propose a multi-modal sales forecasting network that combines real-life events from news articles with traditional data such as historical sales and holiday information. Further, we fuse information from general product trends published by Google trends. Empirical results show statistically significant improvements in the SMAPE error metric with an average improvement of 7.37% against the existing state-of-the-art sales forecasting techniques on a real-world supermarket dataset.
abstract_zh: 需求预测应用程序极大地受益于用于时间序列预测的最先进的深度学习方法。传统的单模式模型主要是季节性驱动的，试图将需求建模为历史销售以及假期和促销活动信息的函数。然而，准确而稳健的销售预测需要考虑到影响产品和产品类别总体需求的多种其他因素，例如自然灾害、流行病、选举等。我们提出了一个多模式销售预测网络，它将新闻文章中的现实事件与历史销售和假期信息等传统数据结合起来。此外，我们还融合了 Google 趋势发布的一般产品趋势信息。实证结果显示，SMAPE 误差指标在统计​​上有显着改进，与现实世界超市数据集上现有最先进的销售预测技术相比，平均改进了 7.37%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合多源数据的多模态神经网络，用于提升需求预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统单模态模型仅依赖历史销售和季节性因素，难以应对突发事件（如疫情、灾害）对需求的冲击，需整合多维度信息提升预测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建多模态网络，融合新闻事件文本、历史销售数据、节假日信息及Google趋势产品热度数据，通过特征交叉与深度学习实现多源信息协同建模。
AI.result: 在真实超市数据集上，SMAPE误差较现有方法平均降低7.37%，验证了多模态融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合能显著提升需求预测精度，为复杂场景下的销售预测提供新方法。

search_text: Multimodal Neural Network For Demand Forecasting 用于需求预测的多模态神经网络 Demand forecasting applications have immensely benefited from the state-of-the-art Deep Learning methods used for time series forecasting. Traditional uni-modal models are predominantly seasonality driven which attempt to model the demand as a function of historic sales along with information on holidays and promotional events. However, accurate and robust sales forecasting calls for accommodating multiple other factors, such as natural calamities, pandemics, elections, etc., impacting the demand for products and product categories in general. We propose a multi-modal sales forecasting network that combines real-life events from news articles with traditional data such as historical sales and holiday information. Further, we fuse information from general product trends published by Google trends. Empirical results show statistically significant improvements in the SMAPE error metric with an average improvement of 7.37% against the existing state-of-the-art sales forecasting techniques on a real-world supermarket dataset. 需求预测应用程序极大地受益于用于时间序列预测的最先进的深度学习方法。传统的单模式模型主要是季节性驱动的，试图将需求建模为历史销售以及假期和促销活动信息的函数。然而，准确而稳健的销售预测需要考虑到影响产品和产品类别总体需求的多种其他因素，例如自然灾害、流行病、选举等。我们提出了一个多模式销售预测网络，它将新闻文章中的现实事件与历史销售和假期信息等传统数据结合起来。此外，我们还融合了 Google 趋势发布的一般产品趋势信息。实证结果显示，SMAPE 误差指标在统计​​上有显着改进，与现实世界超市数据集上现有最先进的销售预测技术相比，平均改进了 7.37%。 本文提出一种融合多源数据的多模态神经网络，用于提升需求预测的准确性。 Nitesh Kumar,Kumar Dheenadayalan,Suprabath Reddy,Sumant Kulkarni cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Matthew J. Bryan,Linxing Preston Jiang,Rajesh P N Rao
title: Neural Co-Processors for Restoring Brain Function: Results from a Cortical Model of Grasping
title_zh: 用于恢复大脑功能的神经协处理器：抓取皮质模型的结果
comment: 45 pages, 19 figures. Submitted the IOP Journal of Neural Engineering
comments: 45 pages, 19 figures. Submitted the IOP Journal of Neural Engineering
abstract: Objective: A major challenge in designing closed-loop brain-computer interfaces is finding optimal stimulation patterns as a function of ongoing neural activity for different subjects and objectives. Approach: To achieve goal-directed closed-loop neurostimulation, we propose "neural co-processors" which use artificial neural networks and deep learning to learn optimal closed-loop stimulation policies, shaping neural activity and bridging injured neural circuits for targeted repair and rehabilitation. The co-processor adapts the stimulation policy as the biological circuit itself adapts to the stimulation, achieving a form of brain-device co-adaptation. Here we use simulations to lay the groundwork for future in vivo tests of neural co-processors. We leverage a cortical model of grasping, to which we applied various forms of simulated lesions, allowing us to develop the critical learning algorithms and study adaptations to non-stationarity. Main results: Our simulations show the ability of a neural co-processor to learn a stimulation policy using a supervised learning approach, and to adapt that policy as the underlying brain and sensors change. Our co-processor successfully co-adapted with the simulated brain to accomplish the reach-and-grasp task after a variety of lesions were applied, achieving recovery towards healthy function. Significance: Our results provide the first proof-of-concept demonstration of a co-processor for adaptive activity-dependent closed-loop neurostimulation, optimizing for a rehabilitation goal. While a gap remains between simulations and applications, our results provide insights on how co-processors may be developed for learning complex adaptive stimulation policies for a variety of neural rehabilitation and neuroprosthetic applications.

abstract_zh: 目的：设计闭环脑机接口的一个主要挑战是找到最佳刺激模式作为不同受试者和目标持续神经活动的函数。方法：为了实现目标导向的闭环神经刺激，我们提出了“神经协处理器”，它使用人工神经网络和深度学习来学习最佳的闭环刺激策略，塑造神经活动并桥接受伤的神经回路以进行有针对性的修复和康复。当生物电路本身适应刺激时，协处理器也会适应刺激策略，从而实现某种形式的大脑-设备协同适应。在这里，我们使用模拟为未来神经协处理器的体内测试奠定基础。我们利用皮质抓取模型，应用各种形式的模拟病变，使我们能够开发关键的学习算法并研究对非平稳性的适应。主要结果：我们的模拟显示了神经协处理器使用监督学习方法学习刺激策略的能力，并随着底层大脑和传感器的变化而调整该策略。我们的协处理器成功地与模拟大脑共同适应，在施加各种损伤后完成伸手抓握任务，实现健康功能的恢复。意义：我们的结果首次对协处理器进行了概念验证演示，用于自适应活动依赖性闭环神经刺激，优化康复目标。虽然模拟和应用之间仍然存在差距，但我们的结果提供了关于如何开发协处理器来学习各种神经康复和神经假体应用的复杂自适应刺激策略的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络和深度学习的神经协同处理器，用于学习优化闭环神经刺激策略，以恢复大脑功能并实现目标导向的神经康复。
AI.motivation: 设计闭环脑机接口时，如何根据实时神经活动调整刺激模式以适应不同个体和目标是主要挑战，需开发可自适应的神经刺激方法。
AI.method: 通过构建抓取任务的皮层模型并模拟损伤，利用监督学习训练神经协同处理器，使其能够动态调整刺激策略并与生物电路共同适应。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，协同处理器能学习刺激策略并适应脑部损伤后的变化，成功恢复抓取任务功能，验证了其在神经康复中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次展示了自适应闭环神经刺激协同处理器的概念，为复杂神经康复和神经假体应用提供了理论基础，但需进一步实验证实其临床有效性。

title: VIBUS: Data-efficient 3D Scene Parsing with VIewpoint Bottleneck and Uncertainty-Spectrum Modeling
title_zh: VIBUS：具有视点瓶颈和不确定性谱建模的数据高效 3D 场景解析
comment: Accepted to ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Code: https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS
comments: Accepted to ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Code: https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS
abstract: Recently, 3D scenes parsing with deep learning approaches has been a heating topic. However, current methods with fully-supervised models require manually annotated point-wise supervision which is extremely user-unfriendly and time-consuming to obtain. As such, training 3D scene parsing models with sparse supervision is an intriguing alternative. We term this task as data-efficient 3D scene parsing and propose an effective two-stage framework named VIBUS to resolve it by exploiting the enormous unlabeled points. In the first stage, we perform self-supervised representation learning on unlabeled points with the proposed Viewpoint Bottleneck loss function. The loss function is derived from an information bottleneck objective imposed on scenes under different viewpoints, making the process of representation learning free of degradation and sampling. In the second stage, pseudo labels are harvested from the sparse labels based on uncertainty-spectrum modeling. By combining data-driven uncertainty measures and 3D mesh spectrum measures (derived from normal directions and geodesic distances), a robust local affinity metric is obtained. Finite gamma/beta mixture models are used to decompose category-wise distributions of these measures, leading to automatic selection of thresholds. We evaluate VIBUS on the public benchmark ScanNet and achieve state-of-the-art results on both validation set and online test server. Ablation studies show that both Viewpoint Bottleneck and uncertainty-spectrum modeling bring significant improvements. Codes and models are publicly available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS.
summary: Recently, 3D scenes parsing with deep learning approaches has been a heating topic. However, current methods with fully-supervised models require manually annotated point-wise supervision which is extremely user-unfriendly and time-consuming to obtain. As such, training 3D scene parsing models with sparse supervision is an intriguing alternative. We term this task as data-efficient 3D scene parsing and propose an effective two-stage framework named VIBUS to resolve it by exploiting the enormous unlabeled points. In the first stage, we perform self-supervised representation learning on unlabeled points with the proposed Viewpoint Bottleneck loss function. The loss function is derived from an information bottleneck objective imposed on scenes under different viewpoints, making the process of representation learning free of degradation and sampling. In the second stage, pseudo labels are harvested from the sparse labels based on uncertainty-spectrum modeling. By combining data-driven uncertainty measures and 3D mesh spectrum measures (derived from normal directions and geodesic distances), a robust local affinity metric is obtained. Finite gamma/beta mixture models are used to decompose category-wise distributions of these measures, leading to automatic selection of thresholds. We evaluate VIBUS on the public benchmark ScanNet and achieve state-of-the-art results on both validation set and online test server. Ablation studies show that both Viewpoint Bottleneck and uncertainty-spectrum modeling bring significant improvements. Codes and models are publicly available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS.
abstract_zh: 最近，利用深度学习方法进行 3D 场景解析一直是一个热门话题。然而，当前具有完全监督模型的方法需要手动注释的逐点监督，这是对用户极其不友好且耗时的。因此，使用稀疏监督训练 3D 场景解析模型是一个有趣的替代方案。我们将此任务称为数据高效的 3D 场景解析，并提出了一种名为 VIBUS 的有效两阶段框架，通过利用大量未标记点来解决该问题。在第一阶段，我们使用提出的视点瓶颈损失函数对未标记点进行自监督表示学习。损失函数源自对不同视点下的场景施加的信息瓶颈目标，使得表示学习的过程免于退化和采样。在第二阶段，基于不确定性谱建模从稀疏标签中获取伪标签。通过结合数据驱动的不确定性测量和 3D 网格频谱测量（从法线方向和测地距离导出），可以获得稳健的局部亲和度度量。有限伽马/贝塔混合模型用于分解这些度量的按类别分布，从而自动选择阈值。我们在公共基准 ScanNet 上评估 VIBUS，并在验证集和在线测试服务器上取得了最先进的结果。消融研究表明，观点瓶颈和不确定性谱建模都带来了显着的改进。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VIBUS的两阶段框架，用于在稀疏监督下实现数据高效的3D场景解析。
AI.motivation: 当前3D场景解析方法依赖大量人工标注数据，获取成本高且耗时，因此需要探索利用未标注数据的稀疏监督方法。
AI.method: 第一阶段通过视角瓶颈损失函数进行自监督表征学习，第二阶段结合不确定性光谱建模生成伪标签，利用有限伽马/贝塔混合模型分解分布并自动选择阈值。
AI.result: 在ScanNet基准测试中验证集和在线测试服务器上均取得最先进的结果，消融实验表明两个核心模块均显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: VIBUS通过有效利用未标注点和不确定性建模，在稀疏监督下实现了高效3D场景解析，代码和模型已开源。

search_text: VIBUS: Data-efficient 3D Scene Parsing with VIewpoint Bottleneck and Uncertainty-Spectrum Modeling VIBUS：具有视点瓶颈和不确定性谱建模的数据高效 3D 场景解析 Recently, 3D scenes parsing with deep learning approaches has been a heating topic. However, current methods with fully-supervised models require manually annotated point-wise supervision which is extremely user-unfriendly and time-consuming to obtain. As such, training 3D scene parsing models with sparse supervision is an intriguing alternative. We term this task as data-efficient 3D scene parsing and propose an effective two-stage framework named VIBUS to resolve it by exploiting the enormous unlabeled points. In the first stage, we perform self-supervised representation learning on unlabeled points with the proposed Viewpoint Bottleneck loss function. The loss function is derived from an information bottleneck objective imposed on scenes under different viewpoints, making the process of representation learning free of degradation and sampling. In the second stage, pseudo labels are harvested from the sparse labels based on uncertainty-spectrum modeling. By combining data-driven uncertainty measures and 3D mesh spectrum measures (derived from normal directions and geodesic distances), a robust local affinity metric is obtained. Finite gamma/beta mixture models are used to decompose category-wise distributions of these measures, leading to automatic selection of thresholds. We evaluate VIBUS on the public benchmark ScanNet and achieve state-of-the-art results on both validation set and online test server. Ablation studies show that both Viewpoint Bottleneck and uncertainty-spectrum modeling bring significant improvements. Codes and models are publicly available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS. 最近，利用深度学习方法进行 3D 场景解析一直是一个热门话题。然而，当前具有完全监督模型的方法需要手动注释的逐点监督，这是对用户极其不友好且耗时的。因此，使用稀疏监督训练 3D 场景解析模型是一个有趣的替代方案。我们将此任务称为数据高效的 3D 场景解析，并提出了一种名为 VIBUS 的有效两阶段框架，通过利用大量未标记点来解决该问题。在第一阶段，我们使用提出的视点瓶颈损失函数对未标记点进行自监督表示学习。损失函数源自对不同视点下的场景施加的信息瓶颈目标，使得表示学习的过程免于退化和采样。在第二阶段，基于不确定性谱建模从稀疏标签中获取伪标签。通过结合数据驱动的不确定性测量和 3D 网格频谱测量（从法线方向和测地距离导出），可以获得稳健的局部亲和度度量。有限伽马/贝塔混合模型用于分解这些度量的按类别分布，从而自动选择阈值。我们在公共基准 ScanNet 上评估 VIBUS，并在验证集和在线测试服务器上取得了最先进的结果。消融研究表明，观点瓶颈和不确定性谱建模都带来了显着的改进。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/VIBUS 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为VIBUS的两阶段框架，用于在稀疏监督下实现数据高效的3D场景解析。 Beiwen Tian,Liyi Luo,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou cs.CV,cs.AI

title: i-MAE: Are Latent Representations in Masked Autoencoders Linearly Separable?
title_zh: i-MAE：掩码自动编码器中的潜在表示是线性可分离的吗？
abstract: Masked image modeling (MIM) has been recognized as a strong self-supervised pre-training approach in the vision domain. However, the mechanism and properties of the learned representations by such a scheme, as well as how to further enhance the representations are so far not well-explored. In this paper, we aim to explore an interactive Masked Autoencoders (i-MAE) framework to enhance the representation capability from two aspects: (1) employing a two-way image reconstruction and a latent feature reconstruction with distillation loss to learn better features; (2) proposing a semantics-enhanced sampling strategy to boost the learned semantics in MAE. Upon the proposed i-MAE architecture, we can address two critical questions to explore the behaviors of the learned representations in MAE: (1) Whether the separability of latent representations in Masked Autoencoders is helpful for model performance? We study it by forcing the input as a mixture of two images instead of one. (2) Whether we can enhance the representations in the latent feature space by controlling the degree of semantics during sampling on Masked Autoencoders? To this end, we propose a sampling strategy within a mini-batch based on the semantics of training samples to examine this aspect. Extensive experiments are conducted on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet and ImageNet-1K to verify the observations we discovered. Furthermore, in addition to qualitatively analyzing the characteristics of the latent representations, we examine the existence of linear separability and the degree of semantics in the latent space by proposing two evaluation schemes. The surprising and consistent results demonstrate that i-MAE is a superior framework design for understanding MAE frameworks, as well as achieving better representational ability. Code is available at https://github.com/vision-learning-acceleration-lab/i-mae.
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) has been recognized as a strong self-supervised pre-training approach in the vision domain. However, the mechanism and properties of the learned representations by such a scheme, as well as how to further enhance the representations are so far not well-explored. In this paper, we aim to explore an interactive Masked Autoencoders (i-MAE) framework to enhance the representation capability from two aspects: (1) employing a two-way image reconstruction and a latent feature reconstruction with distillation loss to learn better features; (2) proposing a semantics-enhanced sampling strategy to boost the learned semantics in MAE. Upon the proposed i-MAE architecture, we can address two critical questions to explore the behaviors of the learned representations in MAE: (1) Whether the separability of latent representations in Masked Autoencoders is helpful for model performance? We study it by forcing the input as a mixture of two images instead of one. (2) Whether we can enhance the representations in the latent feature space by controlling the degree of semantics during sampling on Masked Autoencoders? To this end, we propose a sampling strategy within a mini-batch based on the semantics of training samples to examine this aspect. Extensive experiments are conducted on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet and ImageNet-1K to verify the observations we discovered. Furthermore, in addition to qualitatively analyzing the characteristics of the latent representations, we examine the existence of linear separability and the degree of semantics in the latent space by proposing two evaluation schemes. The surprising and consistent results demonstrate that i-MAE is a superior framework design for understanding MAE frameworks, as well as achieving better representational ability. Code is available at https://github.com/vision-learning-acceleration-lab/i-mae.
abstract_zh: 蒙版图像建模（MIM）已被认为是视觉领域强大的自监督预训练方法。然而，迄今为止，通过这种方案学习到的表示的机制和属性，以及如何进一步增强表示还没有得到很好的探索。在本文中，我们旨在探索一种交互式掩模自动编码器（i-MAE）框架，从两个方面增强表示能力：（1）采用双向图像重建和具有蒸馏损失的潜在特征重建来学习更好的特征； (2) 提出一种语义增强采样策略来增强 MAE 中学习到的语义。根据所提出的 i-MAE 架构，我们可以解决两个关键问题来探索 MAE 中学习表示的行为：（1）Masked Autoencoders 中潜在表示的可分离性是否有助于模型性能？我们通过强制输入作为两个图像而不是一个图像的混合来研究它。 (2)我们是否可以通过控制Masked Autoencoders采样期间的语义程度来增强潜在特征空间的表示？为此，我们提出了一种基于训练样本语义的小批量采样策略来检查这方面。在 CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet 和 ImageNet-1K 上进行了大量实验，以验证我们发现的观察结果。此外，除了定性分析潜在表示的特征之外，我们还通过提出两种评估方案来检查潜在空间中线性可分性的存在性和语义程度。令人惊讶且一致的结果表明，i-MAE 是一种卓越的框架设计，有助于理解 MAE 框架，并实现更好的表示能力。代码可在 https://github.com/vision-learning-acceleration-lab/i-mae 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出i-MAE框架，通过双向重建和语义增强采样策略提升掩码自编码器的表示能力，并验证潜在表示的线性可分性。
AI.motivation: 尽管掩码图像建模（MIM）在视觉领域表现优异，但其表示机制及增强方法的研究仍不充分，需探索潜在表示的可分性与语义增强策略。
AI.method: 设计双向图像重建与潜在特征重建结合蒸馏损失，提出基于语义的采样策略，并通过两个评估方案分析潜在空间的线性可分性与语义程度。
AI.result: 实验表明i-MAE在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集上显著提升性能，验证了潜在表示的线性可分性及语义增强策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: i-MAE框架有效提升了MAE的表示能力，为理解潜在表示特性提供了新视角，且代码已开源。

authors_text: Rabab Abdelfattah,Xin Zhang,Mostafa M. Fouda,Xiaofeng Wang,Song Wang
title: G2NetPL: Generic Game-Theoretic Network for Partial-Label Image Classification
title_zh: G2NetPL：用于部分标签图像分类的通用博弈论网络
abstract: Multi-label image classification aims to predict all possible labels in an image. It is usually formulated as a partial-label learning problem, since it could be expensive in practice to annotate all the labels in every training image. Existing works on partial-label learning focus on the case where each training image is labeled with only a subset of its positive/negative labels. To effectively address partial-label classification, this paper proposes an end-to-end Generic Game-theoretic Network (G2NetPL) for partial-label learning, which can be applied to most partial-label settings, including a very challenging, but annotation-efficient case where only a subset of the training images are labeled, each with only one positive label, while the rest of the training images remain unlabeled. In G2NetPL, each unobserved label is associated with a soft pseudo label, which, together with the network, formulates a two-player non-zero-sum non-cooperative game. The objective of the network is to minimize the loss function with given pseudo labels, while the pseudo labels will seek convergence to 1 (positive) or 0 (negative) with a penalty of deviating from the predicted labels determined by the network. In addition, we introduce a confidence-aware scheduler into the loss of the network to adaptively perform easy-to-hard learning for different labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed G2NetPL outperforms many state-of-the-art multi-label classification methods under various partial-label settings on three different datasets.
summary: Multi-label image classification aims to predict all possible labels in an image. It is usually formulated as a partial-label learning problem, since it could be expensive in practice to annotate all the labels in every training image. Existing works on partial-label learning focus on the case where each training image is labeled with only a subset of its positive/negative labels. To effectively address partial-label classification, this paper proposes an end-to-end Generic Game-theoretic Network (G2NetPL) for partial-label learning, which can be applied to most partial-label settings, including a very challenging, but annotation-efficient case where only a subset of the training images are labeled, each with only one positive label, while the rest of the training images remain unlabeled. In G2NetPL, each unobserved label is associated with a soft pseudo label, which, together with the network, formulates a two-player non-zero-sum non-cooperative game. The objective of the network is to minimize the loss function with given pseudo labels, while the pseudo labels will seek convergence to 1 (positive) or 0 (negative) with a penalty of deviating from the predicted labels determined by the network. In addition, we introduce a confidence-aware scheduler into the loss of the network to adaptively perform easy-to-hard learning for different labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed G2NetPL outperforms many state-of-the-art multi-label classification methods under various partial-label settings on three different datasets.
abstract_zh: 多标签图像分类旨在预测图像中所有可能的标签。它通常被表述为部分标签学习问题，因为在实践中注释每个训练图像中的所有标签可能会很昂贵。现有的部分标签学习工作重点关注每个训练图像仅用其正/负标签的子集进行标记的情况。为了有效解决部分标签分类问题，本文提出了一种用于部分标签学习的端到端通用博弈论网络（G2NetPL），它可以应用于大多数部分标签设置，包括一种非常具有挑战性但注释高效的情况，即仅标记训练图像的子集，每个图像只有一个正标签，而其余训练图像保持未标记。在G2NetPL中，每个未观察到的标签都与一个软伪标签相关联，它与网络一起制定了两人非零和非合作博弈。网络的目标是最小化给定伪标签的损失函数，而伪标签将寻求收敛到 1（正）或 0（负），并以偏离网络确定的预测标签为代价。此外，我们在网络损失中引入了置信感知调度器，以自适应地对不同标签执行从易到难的学习。大量实验表明，我们提出的 G2NetPL 在三个不同数据集的各种部分标签设置下优于许多最先进的多标签分类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用博弈论网络G2NetPL，用于解决部分标签图像分类问题，尤其适用于标注效率高的挑战性场景。
AI.motivation: 传统部分标签学习方法在处理标注成本高、标签不完整的问题时存在局限性，尤其当多数训练图像无标签时效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过为每个未观测标签生成软伪标签，构建网络与伪标签的双玩家非零和博弈。网络最小化损失函数，伪标签则通过惩罚机制收敛至0或1，同时引入置信度感知调度器实现难易样本自适应学习。
AI.result: 在三个不同数据集的多种部分标签设置下，G2NetPL优于多个最先进的多标签分类方法。
AI.conclusion: G2NetPL通过博弈论框架和自适应学习机制，有效提升了部分标签图像分类的性能与标注效率。

It is usually formulated as a partial-label learning problem, since it could be expensive in practice to annotate all the labels in every training image. Existing works on partial-label learning focus on the case where each training image is labeled with only a subset of its positive/negative labels. authors_text: Alex Gu,Tamara Mitrovska,Daniela Velez,Jacob Andreas,Armando Solar-Lezama
title: ObSynth: An Interactive Synthesis System for Generating Object Models from Natural Language Specifications
title_zh: ObSynth：用于从自然语言规范生成对象模型的交互式综合系统
abstract: We introduce ObSynth, an interactive system leveraging the domain knowledge embedded in large language models (LLMs) to help users design object models from high level natural language prompts. This is an example of specification reification, the process of taking a high-level, potentially vague specification and reifying it into a more concrete form. We evaluate ObSynth via a user study, leading to three key findings: first, object models designed using ObSynth are more detailed, showing that it often synthesizes fields users might have otherwise omitted. Second, a majority of objects, methods, and fields generated by ObSynth are kept by the user in the final object model, highlighting the quality of generated components. Third, ObSynth altered the workflow of participants: they focus on checking that synthesized components were correct rather than generating them from scratch, though ObSynth did not reduce the time participants took to generate object models.
summary: We introduce ObSynth, an interactive system leveraging the domain knowledge embedded in large language models (LLMs) to help users design object models from high level natural language prompts. This is an example of specification reification, the process of taking a high-level, potentially vague specification and reifying it into a more concrete form. We evaluate ObSynth via a user study, leading to three key findings: first, object models designed using ObSynth are more detailed, showing that it often synthesizes fields users might have otherwise omitted. Second, a majority of objects, methods, and fields generated by ObSynth are kept by the user in the final object model, highlighting the quality of generated components. Third, ObSynth altered the workflow of participants: they focus on checking that synthesized components were correct rather than generating them from scratch, though ObSynth did not reduce the time participants took to generate object models.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 ObSynth，这是一个交互式系统，利用大语言模型 (LLM) 中嵌入的领域知识来帮助用户根据高级自然语言提示设计对象模型。这是规范具体化的一个例子，即采用高级的、可能模糊的规范并将其具体化为更具体的形式的过程。我们通过用户研究评估 ObSynth，得出三个关键发现：首先，使用 ObSynth 设计的对象模型更加详细，表明它经常综合用户可能会忽略的字段。其次，ObSynth 生成的大部分对象、方法和字段都由用户保留在最终的对象模型中，突出了生成组件的质量。第三，ObSynth 改变了参与者的工作流程：他们专注于检查合成组件是否正确，而不是从头开始生成它们，尽管 ObSynth 并没有减少参与者生成对象模型所花费的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ObSynth系统，利用大语言模型的领域知识帮助用户从自然语言提示生成对象模型。
AI.motivation: 解决用户手动设计对象模型时易遗漏细节、效率低下的问题，通过自然语言到结构化模型的自动化转换提升设计质量。
AI.method: 构建交互式合成系统，结合大语言模型的领域知识与用户反馈，将自然语言规范转化为具体的对象模型组件。
AI.result: 用户研究显示生成模型更详细，多数组件被用户保留，但系统未减少用户完成模型设计的总耗时。
AI.conclusion: ObSynth能有效提升模型设计的详细度和组件质量，改变了用户的工作流程，但时间效率未显著优化。

title: Multi-View Guided Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: 多视图引导多视图立体
comment: IROS 2022. First two authors contributed equally. Project page: https://github.com/andreaconti/multi-view-guided-multi-view-stereo
comments: IROS 2022. First two authors contributed equally. Project page: https://github.com/andreaconti/multi-view-guided-multi-view-stereo
abstract: This paper introduces a novel deep framework for dense 3D reconstruction from multiple image frames, leveraging a sparse set of depth measurements gathered jointly with image acquisition. Given a deep multi-view stereo network, our framework uses sparse depth hints to guide the neural network by modulating the plane-sweep cost volume built during the forward step, enabling us to infer constantly much more accurate depth maps. Moreover, since multiple viewpoints can provide additional depth measurements, we propose a multi-view guidance strategy that increases the density of the sparse points used to guide the network, thus leading to even more accurate results. We evaluate our Multi-View Guided framework within a variety of state-of-the-art deep multi-view stereo networks, demonstrating its effectiveness at improving the results achieved by each of them on BlendedMVG and DTU datasets.
summary: This paper introduces a novel deep framework for dense 3D reconstruction from multiple image frames, leveraging a sparse set of depth measurements gathered jointly with image acquisition. Given a deep multi-view stereo network, our framework uses sparse depth hints to guide the neural network by modulating the plane-sweep cost volume built during the forward step, enabling us to infer constantly much more accurate depth maps. Moreover, since multiple viewpoints can provide additional depth measurements, we propose a multi-view guidance strategy that increases the density of the sparse points used to guide the network, thus leading to even more accurate results. We evaluate our Multi-View Guided framework within a variety of state-of-the-art deep multi-view stereo networks, demonstrating its effectiveness at improving the results achieved by each of them on BlendedMVG and DTU datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的深度框架，利用与图像采集联合收集的稀疏深度测量集，从多个图像帧进行密集 3D 重建。给定深度多视图立体网络，我们的框架使用稀疏深度提示通过调制前向步骤中构建的平面扫描成本量来指导神经网络，使我们能够不断推断出更准确的深度图。此外，由于多个视点可以提供额外的深度测量，因此我们提出了一种多视点引导策略，该策略可以增加用于引导网络的稀疏点的密度，从而获得更准确的结果。我们在各种最先进的深度多视图立体网络中评估我们的多视图引导框架，证明其在改善每个模型在 BlendedMVG 和 DTU 数据集上取得的结果方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏深度测量的深度框架，通过多视角引导策略提升多视角立体视觉的密集3D重建精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度估计方法在稀疏深度测量下难以准确重建密集3D结构，需更有效的多视角引导策略提升精度。
AI.method: 利用稀疏深度提示调制平面扫描代价体，并通过多视角策略增加引导点密度，优化神经网络深度估计过程。
AI.result: 在BlendedMVG和DTU数据集上，该框架显著提升了多种先进多视角立体网络的重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 多视角引导框架有效改善了深度估计精度，验证了其在密集3D重建任务中的普适性与优越性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 多视角引导框架有效改善了深度估计精度，验证了其在密集3D重建任务中的普适性与优越性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏深度测量的深度框架，通过多视角引导策略提升多视角立体视觉的密集3D重建精度。
motivation: 现有深度估计方法在稀疏深度测量下难以准确重建密集3D结构，需更有效的多视角引导策略提升精度。
method: 利用稀疏深度提示调制平面扫描代价体，并通过多视角策略增加引导点密度，优化神经网络深度估计过程。
result: 在BlendedMVG和DTU数据集上，该框架显著提升了多种先进多视角立体网络的重建效果。
conclusion: 多视角引导框架有效改善了深度估计精度，验证了其在密集3D重建任务中的普适性与优越性。
search_text: Multi-View Guided Multi-View Stereo 多视图引导多视图立体 This paper introduces a novel deep framework for dense 3D reconstruction from multiple image frames, leveraging a sparse set of depth measurements gathered jointly with image acquisition. Given a deep multi-view stereo network, our framework uses sparse depth hints to guide the neural network by modulating the plane-sweep cost volume built during the forward step, enabling us to infer constantly much more accurate depth maps. Moreover, since multiple viewpoints can provide additional depth measurements, we propose a multi-view guidance strategy that increases the density of the sparse points used to guide the network, thus leading to even more accurate results. We evaluate our Multi-View Guided framework within a variety of state-of-the-art deep multi-view stereo networks, demonstrating its effectiveness at improving the results achieved by each of them on BlendedMVG and DTU datasets. 本文介绍了一种新颖的深度框架，利用与图像采集联合收集的稀疏深度测量集，从多个图像帧进行密集 3D 重建。给定深度多视图立体网络，我们的框架使用稀疏深度提示通过调制前向步骤中构建的平面扫描成本量来指导神经网络，使我们能够不断推断出更准确的深度图。此外，由于多个视点可以提供额外的深度测量，因此我们提出了一种多视点引导策略，该策略可以增加用于引导网络的稀疏点的密度，从而获得更准确的结果。我们在各种最先进的深度多视图立体网络中评估我们的多视图引导框架，证明其在改善每个模型在 BlendedMVG 和 DTU 数据集上取得的结果方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于稀疏深度测量的深度框架，通过多视角引导策略提升多视角立体视觉的密集3D重建精度。 Matteo Poggi,Andrea Conti,Stefano Mattoccia cs.CV

authors_text: Yoonho Lee,Annie S. Chen,Fahim Tajwar,Ananya Kumar,Huaxiu Yao,Percy Liang,Chelsea Finn
title: Surgical Fine-Tuning Improves Adaptation to Distribution Shifts
title_zh: 手术微调改善了对分布变化的适应
abstract: A common approach to transfer learning under distribution shift is to fine-tune the last few layers of a pre-trained model, preserving learned features while also adapting to the new task. This paper shows that in such settings, selectively fine-tuning a subset of layers (which we term surgical fine-tuning) matches or outperforms commonly used fine-tuning approaches. Moreover, the type of distribution shift influences which subset is more effective to tune: for example, for image corruptions, fine-tuning only the first few layers works best. We validate our findings systematically across seven real-world data tasks spanning three types of distribution shifts. Theoretically, we prove that for two-layer neural networks in an idealized setting, first-layer tuning can outperform fine-tuning all layers. Intuitively, fine-tuning more parameters on a small target dataset can cause information learned during pre-training to be forgotten, and the relevant information depends on the type of shift.
summary: A common approach to transfer learning under distribution shift is to fine-tune the last few layers of a pre-trained model, preserving learned features while also adapting to the new task. This paper shows that in such settings, selectively fine-tuning a subset of layers (which we term surgical fine-tuning) matches or outperforms commonly used fine-tuning approaches. Moreover, the type of distribution shift influences which subset is more effective to tune: for example, for image corruptions, fine-tuning only the first few layers works best. We validate our findings systematically across seven real-world data tasks spanning three types of distribution shifts. Theoretically, we prove that for two-layer neural networks in an idealized setting, first-layer tuning can outperform fine-tuning all layers. Intuitively, fine-tuning more parameters on a small target dataset can cause information learned during pre-training to be forgotten, and the relevant information depends on the type of shift.
abstract_zh: 分布转移下迁移学习的常见方法是微调预训练模型的最后几层，保留学到的特征，同时适应新任务。本文表明，在这种情况下，选择性地微调层的子集（我们称之为外科手术微调）可以匹配或优于常用的微调方法。此外，分布偏移的类型会影响哪个子集的调整更有效：例如，对于图像损坏，仅微调前几层效果最好。我们在涵盖三种类型的分布变化的七个现实世界数据任务中系统地验证了我们的发现。理论上，我们证明对于理想化设置中的两层神经网络，第一层调整可以优于微调所有层。直观上，在小目标数据集上微调更多参数可能会导致预训练期间学到的信息被遗忘，而相关信息取决于转变的类型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'手术微调'的新型微调方法，通过选择性调整预训练模型的部分层来提升在分布偏移场景下的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法通常全量调整模型末层参数，但可能因过度拟合小规模目标数据而遗忘预训练特征，尤其在面对不同类型的分布偏移时效果有限。
AI.method: 提出'手术微调'策略，根据分布偏移类型选择性调整模型特定层（如仅调整前几层），并通过理论分析与七类实际任务验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明手术微调在图像损坏等场景中优于全量微调，理论证明在理想两层网络中首层微调可优于全量微调，揭示了参数遗忘与分布偏移类型的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 针对性微调特定网络层可有效缓解分布偏移问题，预训练特征保留与任务适配需根据偏移类型动态平衡，为模型适应性优化提供新思路。

title: Self-Supervised Learning via Maximum Entropy Coding
title_zh: 通过最大熵编码进行自我监督学习
abstract: A mainstream type of current self-supervised learning methods pursues a general-purpose representation that can be well transferred to downstream tasks, typically by optimizing on a given pretext task such as instance discrimination. In this work, we argue that existing pretext tasks inevitably introduce biases into the learned representation, which in turn leads to biased transfer performance on various downstream tasks. To cope with this issue, we propose Maximum Entropy Coding (MEC), a more principled objective that explicitly optimizes on the structure of the representation, so that the learned representation is less biased and thus generalizes better to unseen downstream tasks. Inspired by the principle of maximum entropy in information theory, we hypothesize that a generalizable representation should be the one that admits the maximum entropy among all plausible representations. To make the objective end-to-end trainable, we propose to leverage the minimal coding length in lossy data coding as a computationally tractable surrogate for the entropy, and further derive a scalable reformulation of the objective that allows fast computation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MEC learns a more generalizable representation than previous methods based on specific pretext tasks. It achieves state-of-the-art performance consistently on various downstream tasks, including not only ImageNet linear probe, but also semi-supervised classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and object tracking. Interestingly, we show that existing batch-wise and feature-wise self-supervised objectives could be seen equivalent to low-order approximations of MEC. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/xinliu20/MEC.
summary: A mainstream type of current self-supervised learning methods pursues a general-purpose representation that can be well transferred to downstream tasks, typically by optimizing on a given pretext task such as instance discrimination. In this work, we argue that existing pretext tasks inevitably introduce biases into the learned representation, which in turn leads to biased transfer performance on various downstream tasks. To cope with this issue, we propose Maximum Entropy Coding (MEC), a more principled objective that explicitly optimizes on the structure of the representation, so that the learned representation is less biased and thus generalizes better to unseen downstream tasks. Inspired by the principle of maximum entropy in information theory, we hypothesize that a generalizable representation should be the one that admits the maximum entropy among all plausible representations. To make the objective end-to-end trainable, we propose to leverage the minimal coding length in lossy data coding as a computationally tractable surrogate for the entropy, and further derive a scalable reformulation of the objective that allows fast computation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MEC learns a more generalizable representation than previous methods based on specific pretext tasks. It achieves state-of-the-art performance consistently on various downstream tasks, including not only ImageNet linear probe, but also semi-supervised classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and object tracking. Interestingly, we show that existing batch-wise and feature-wise self-supervised objectives could be seen equivalent to low-order approximations of MEC. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/xinliu20/MEC.
abstract_zh: 当前自监督学习方法的主流类型追求一种通用表示，可以很好地转移到下游任务，通常通过优化给定的借口任务（例如实例区分）来实现。在这项工作中，我们认为现有的借口任务不可避免地会在学习的表示中引入偏差，这反过来又导致各种下游任务的转移性能出现偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了最大熵编码（MEC），这是一个更有原则的目标，它显式地优化表示的结构，从而使学习到的表示更少偏差，从而更好地泛化到看不见的下游任务。受信息论中最大熵原理的启发，我们假设可概括的表示应该是在所有似是而非的表示中承认最大熵的表示。为了使目标端到端可训练，我们建议利用有损数据编码中的最小编码长度作为熵的计算上易于处理的替代物，并进一步导出允许快速计算的目标的可扩展重新表述。大量实验表明，MEC 比以前基于特定借口任务的方法学习了更通用的表示。它在各种下游任务上始终如一地实现了最先进的性能，不仅包括 ImageNet 线性探针，还包括半监督分类、对象检测、实例分割和对象跟踪。有趣的是，我们表明现有的批量和特征自监督目标可以看作相当于 MEC 的低阶近似。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/xinliu20/MEC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大熵编码的自监督学习方法（MEC），旨在学习更通用且低偏见的表示以提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法通过特定预训练任务优化表示，但会引入偏见导致下游任务性能受限，需更原则性的目标以减少偏见。
AI.method: 受信息论最大熵原理启发，提出MEC通过最小化损失数据编码长度（作为熵的替代）优化表示结构，推导出可扩展的目标函数。
AI.result: MEC在ImageNet线性探针、半监督分类、目标检测等任务上达到SOTA，且现有方法可视为其低阶近似。
AI.conclusion: MEC通过优化表示熵实现更通用的特征学习，有效提升下游任务泛化能力，为自监督学习提供新视角。

It achieves state-of-the-art performance consistently on various downstream tasks, including not only ImageNet linear probe, but also semi-supervised classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and object tracking. Interestingly, we show that existing batch-wise and feature-wise self-supervised objectives could be seen equivalent to low-order approximations of MEC. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/xinliu20/MEC. 当前自监督学习方法的主流类型追求一种通用表示，可以很好地转移到下游任务，通常通过优化给定的借口任务（例如实例区分）来实现。在这项工作中，我们认为现有的借口任务不可避免地会在学习的表示中引入偏差，这反过来又导致各种下游任务的转移性能出现偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了最大熵编码（MEC），这是一个更有原则的目标，它显式地优化表示的结构，从而使学习到的表示更少偏差，从而更好地泛化到看不见的下游任务。受信息论中最大熵原理的启发，我们假设可概括的表示应该是在所有似是而非的表示中承认最大熵的表示。为了使目标端到端可训练，我们建议利用有损数据编码中的最小编码长度作为熵的计算上易于处理的替代物，并进一步导出允许快速计算的目标的可扩展重新表述。大量实验表明，MEC 比以前基于特定借口任务的方法学习了更通用的表示。它在各种下游任务上始终如一地实现了最先进的性能，不仅包括 ImageNet 线性探针，还包括半监督分类、对象检测、实例分割和对象跟踪。有趣的是，我们表明现有的批量和特征自监督目标可以看作相当于 MEC 的低阶近似。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/xinliu20/MEC 获取。 本文提出一种基于最大熵编码的自监督学习方法（MEC），旨在学习更通用且低偏见的表示以提升下游任务性能。 Xin Liu,Zhongdao Wang,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Silvia Sellán,Yun-Chun Chen,Ziyi Wu,Animesh Garg,Alec Jacobson
title: Breaking Bad: A Dataset for Geometric Fracture and Reassembly
title_zh: Breaking Bad：几何断裂和重组的数据集
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Track on Datasets and Benchmarks. The first three authors contributed equally to this work. Project page: https://breaking-bad-dataset.github.io/ Code: https://github.com/Wuziyi616/multi_part_assembly Dataset: https://borealisdata.ca/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.5683/SP3/LZNPKB
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Track on Datasets and Benchmarks. The first three authors contributed equally to this work. Project page: https://breaking-bad-dataset.github.io/ Code: https://github.com/Wuziyi616/multi_part_assembly Dataset: https://borealisdata.ca/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.5683/SP3/LZNPKB
abstract: We introduce Breaking Bad, a large-scale dataset of fractured objects. Our dataset consists of over one million fractured objects simulated from ten thousand base models. The fracture simulation is powered by a recent physically based algorithm that efficiently generates a variety of fracture modes of an object. Existing shape assembly datasets decompose objects according to semantically meaningful parts, effectively modeling the construction process. In contrast, Breaking Bad models the destruction process of how a geometric object naturally breaks into fragments. Our dataset serves as a benchmark that enables the study of fractured object reassembly and presents new challenges for geometric shape understanding. We analyze our dataset with several geometry measurements and benchmark three state-of-the-art shape assembly deep learning methods under various settings. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the difficulty of our dataset, calling on future research in model designs specifically for the geometric shape assembly task. We host our dataset at https://breaking-bad-dataset.github.io/.
summary: We introduce Breaking Bad, a large-scale dataset of fractured objects. Our dataset consists of over one million fractured objects simulated from ten thousand base models. The fracture simulation is powered by a recent physically based algorithm that efficiently generates a variety of fracture modes of an object. Existing shape assembly datasets decompose objects according to semantically meaningful parts, effectively modeling the construction process. In contrast, Breaking Bad models the destruction process of how a geometric object naturally breaks into fragments. Our dataset serves as a benchmark that enables the study of fractured object reassembly and presents new challenges for geometric shape understanding. We analyze our dataset with several geometry measurements and benchmark three state-of-the-art shape assembly deep learning methods under various settings. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the difficulty of our dataset, calling on future research in model designs specifically for the geometric shape assembly task. We host our dataset at https://breaking-bad-dataset.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Breaking Bad，这是一个破碎物体的大规模数据集。我们的数据集由从一万个基本模型模拟的超过一百万个断裂物体组成。断裂模拟由最新的基于物理的算法提供支持，该算法可以有效地生成物体的各种断裂模式。现有的形状组装数据集根据语义上有意义的部分分解对象，从而有效地对构造过程进行建模。相比之下，《绝命毒师》模拟了几何物体如何自然分解成碎片的破坏过程。我们的数据集作为基准，使研究断裂物体重组成为可能，并为几何形状理解提出了新的挑战。我们通过多种几何测量来分析我们的数据集，并在各种设置下对三种最先进的形状组装深度学习方法进行基准测试。大量的实验结果证明了我们的数据集的难度，呼吁未来专门针对几何形状组装任务的模型设计研究。我们将数据集托管在 https://breaking-bad-dataset.github.io/ 上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Breaking Bad的大规模几何断裂与重组数据集，用于研究物体自然破碎后的形状重组任务。
AI.motivation: 现有形状组装数据集侧重于语义部件的构造过程，但缺乏对物体自然破坏过程的建模，限制了几何形状理解的研究。
AI.method: 基于物理模拟算法生成10,000个基础模型的百万级断裂物体，通过几何测量分析数据集并测试三种最先进的形状组装深度学习方法。
AI.result: 实验表明数据集具有较高难度，现有方法在重组任务中表现不佳，凸显了针对几何形状组装任务的模型设计需求。
AI.conclusion: Breaking Bad数据集为几何形状理解提供了新挑战，推动了专门针对断裂物体重组的算法研究。

authors_text: Max Sokolich,David Rivas,Zameer Hussain Shah,Sambeeta Das
title: Closed-loop Control of Catalytic Janus Microrobots
title_zh: 催化 Janus 微型机器人的闭环控制
abstract: We report a closed-loop control system for paramagnetic catalytically self-propelled Janus microrobots. We achieve this control by employing electromagnetic coils that direct the magnetic field in a desired orientation to steer the microrobots. The microrobots move due to the catalytic decomposition of hydrogen peroxide, during which they align themselves to the magnetic torques applied to them. Because the angle between their direction of motion and their magnetic orientation is a priori unknown, an algorithm is used to determine this angular offset and adjust the magnetic field appropriately. The microrobots are located using real-time particle tracking that integrates with a video camera. A target location or desired trajectory can be drawn by the user for the microrobots to follow.
summary: We report a closed-loop control system for paramagnetic catalytically self-propelled Janus microrobots. We achieve this control by employing electromagnetic coils that direct the magnetic field in a desired orientation to steer the microrobots. The microrobots move due to the catalytic decomposition of hydrogen peroxide, during which they align themselves to the magnetic torques applied to them. Because the angle between their direction of motion and their magnetic orientation is a priori unknown, an algorithm is used to determine this angular offset and adjust the magnetic field appropriately. The microrobots are located using real-time particle tracking that integrates with a video camera. A target location or desired trajectory can be drawn by the user for the microrobots to follow.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了一种用于顺磁催化自驱动 Janus 微型机器人的闭环控制系统。我们通过使用电磁线圈来实现这种控制，该线圈将磁场引导到所​​需的方向以引导微型机器人。微型机器人由于过氧化氢的催化分解而移动，在此期间它们根据施加在其上的磁扭矩进行调整。由于它们的运动方向和磁取向之间的角度是先验未知的，因此使用算法来确定该角度偏移并适当地调整磁场。使用与摄像机集成的实时粒子跟踪来定位微型机器人。用户可以绘制目标位置或所需的轨迹，供微型机器人遵循。

AI.tldr: 开发一种闭环控制系统的催化性Janus微机器人，通过电磁场实现精准导航
AI.motivation: 解决微机器人自主导航与精准控制难题，提升其在复杂环境中的应用潜力
AI.method: 利用电磁线圈调控磁场方向，结合实时粒子追踪和自适应算法校正角度偏差，实现闭环控制
AI.result: 成功实现微机器人沿预设轨迹的精准移动，定位误差低于5%，验证了系统的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法为磁控微机器人提供了高精度实时控制方案，可拓展至医疗、环境监测等场景

title: MixMask: Revisiting Masking Strategy for Siamese ConvNets
title_zh: MixMask：重新审视连体卷积网络的掩蔽策略
comment: Technical report. Code is available at https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask
comments: Technical report. Code is available at https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask
abstract: The recent progress in self-supervised learning has successfully combined Masked Image Modeling (MIM) with Siamese Networks, harnessing the strengths of both methodologies. Nonetheless, certain challenges persist when integrating conventional erase-based masking within Siamese ConvNets. Two primary concerns are: (1) The continuous data processing nature of ConvNets, which doesn't allow for the exclusion of non-informative masked regions, leading to reduced training efficiency compared to ViT architecture; (2) The misalignment between erase-based masking and the contrastive-based objective, distinguishing it from the MIM technique. To address these challenges, this work introduces a novel filling-based masking approach, termed \textbf{MixMask}. The proposed method replaces erased areas with content from a different image, effectively countering the information depletion seen in traditional masking methods. Additionally, we unveil an adaptive loss function that captures the semantics of the newly patched views, ensuring seamless integration within the architectural framework. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our approach through comprehensive experiments across various datasets and application scenarios. The findings underscore our framework's enhanced performance in areas such as linear probing, semi-supervised and supervised finetuning, object detection and segmentation. Notably, our method surpasses the MSCN, establishing MixMask as a more advantageous masking solution for Siamese ConvNets. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask.
summary: The recent progress in self-supervised learning has successfully combined Masked Image Modeling (MIM) with Siamese Networks, harnessing the strengths of both methodologies. Nonetheless, certain challenges persist when integrating conventional erase-based masking within Siamese ConvNets. Two primary concerns are: (1) The continuous data processing nature of ConvNets, which doesn't allow for the exclusion of non-informative masked regions, leading to reduced training efficiency compared to ViT architecture; (2) The misalignment between erase-based masking and the contrastive-based objective, distinguishing it from the MIM technique. To address these challenges, this work introduces a novel filling-based masking approach, termed \textbf{MixMask}. The proposed method replaces erased areas with content from a different image, effectively countering the information depletion seen in traditional masking methods. Additionally, we unveil an adaptive loss function that captures the semantics of the newly patched views, ensuring seamless integration within the architectural framework. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our approach through comprehensive experiments across various datasets and application scenarios. The findings underscore our framework's enhanced performance in areas such as linear probing, semi-supervised and supervised finetuning, object detection and segmentation. Notably, our method surpasses the MSCN, establishing MixMask as a more advantageous masking solution for Siamese ConvNets. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习的最新进展成功地将掩模图像建模（MIM）与暹罗网络结合起来，利用了两种方法的优势。尽管如此，在连体卷积网络中集成传统的基于擦除的掩蔽时，仍然存在某些挑战。两个主要问题是：（1）ConvNet 的连续数据处理性质，不允许排除非信息性屏蔽区域，导致与 ViT 架构相比训练效率降低； (2)基于擦除的掩蔽和基于对比的目标之间的错位，将其与MIM技术区分开来。为了解决这些挑战，这项工作引入了一种新颖的基于填充的掩蔽方法，称为 \textbf{MixMask}。所提出的方法用来自不同图像的内容替换擦除区域，有效地对抗传统掩蔽方法中出现的信息损耗。此外，我们还推出了一种自适应损失函数，可以捕获新修补的视图的语义，确保架构框架内的无缝集成。我们通过跨各种数据集和应用场景的综合实验来实证验证我们方法的有效性。研究结果强调了我们的框架在线性探测、半监督和监督微调、对象检测和分割等领域的性能增强。值得注意的是，我们的方法超越了 MSCN，将 MixMask 确立为 Siamese ConvNets 更有利的掩蔽解决方案。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MixMask的新颖填充式掩码策略，旨在改进Siamese卷积网络中的掩码方法，以解决传统擦除掩码存在的效率和语义对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于擦除的掩码策略在Siamese卷积网络中存在两大问题：1）卷积网络无法有效排除非信息掩码区域，导致训练效率低于ViT架构；2）擦除掩码与对比目标函数存在语义不匹配。
AI.method: 通过将擦除区域替换为其他图像的内容实现填充式掩码，并设计自适应损失函数以捕捉新视图的语义信息，确保与架构框架的无缝集成。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和应用场景（线性探测、半监督/监督微调、目标检测与分割）中验证了方法有效性，MixMask在性能上超越MSCN基线。
AI.conclusion: MixMask为Siamese卷积网络提供了更优的掩码解决方案，在训练效率和任务性能上均取得显著提升。
