search_text: MixMask: Revisiting Masking Strategy for Siamese ConvNets MixMask：重新审视连体卷积网络的掩蔽策略 The recent progress in self-supervised learning has successfully combined Masked Image Modeling (MIM) with Siamese Networks, harnessing the strengths of both methodologies. Nonetheless, certain challenges persist when integrating conventional erase-based masking within Siamese ConvNets. Two primary concerns are: (1) The continuous data processing nature of ConvNets, which doesn't allow for the exclusion of non-informative masked regions, leading to reduced training efficiency compared to ViT architecture; (2) The misalignment between erase-based masking and the contrastive-based objective, distinguishing it from the MIM technique. To address these challenges, this work introduces a novel filling-based masking approach, termed \textbf{MixMask}. The proposed method replaces erased areas with content from a different image, effectively countering the information depletion seen in traditional masking methods. Additionally, we unveil an adaptive loss function that captures the semantics of the newly patched views, ensuring seamless integration within the architectural framework. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our approach through comprehensive experiments across various datasets and application scenarios. The findings underscore our framework's enhanced performance in areas such as linear probing, semi-supervised and supervised finetuning, object detection and segmentation. Notably, our method surpasses the MSCN, establishing MixMask as a more advantageous masking solution for Siamese ConvNets. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask. 自监督学习的最新进展成功地将掩模图像建模（MIM）与暹罗网络结合起来，利用了两种方法的优势。尽管如此，在连体卷积网络中集成传统的基于擦除的掩蔽时，仍然存在某些挑战。两个主要问题是：（1）ConvNet 的连续数据处理性质，不允许排除非信息性屏蔽区域，导致与 ViT 架构相比训练效率降低； (2)基于擦除的掩蔽和基于对比的目标之间的错位，将其与MIM技术区分开来。为了解决这些挑战，这项工作引入了一种新颖的基于填充的掩蔽方法，称为 \textbf{MixMask}。所提出的方法用来自不同图像的内容替换擦除区域，有效地对抗传统掩蔽方法中出现的信息损耗。此外，我们还推出了一种自适应损失函数，可以捕获新修补的视图的语义，确保架构框架内的无缝集成。我们通过跨各种数据集和应用场景的综合实验来实证验证我们方法的有效性。研究结果强调了我们的框架在线性探测、半监督和监督微调、对象检测和分割等领域的性能增强。值得注意的是，我们的方法超越了 MSCN，将 MixMask 确立为 Siamese ConvNets 更有利的掩蔽解决方案。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/kirill-vish/MixMask 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为MixMask的新颖填充式掩码策略，旨在改进Siamese卷积网络中的掩码方法，以解决传统擦除掩码存在的效率和语义对齐问题。 Kirill Vishniakov,Eric Xing,Zhiqiang Shen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Robert Siddall,Raphael Zufferey,Sophie Armanini,Ketao Zhang,Sina Sareh,Elisavetha Sergeev
title: The Natural Robotics Contest: Crowdsourced Biomimetic Design
title_zh: 自然机器人竞赛：众包仿生设计
abstract: Biomimetic and Bioinspired design is not only a potent resource for roboticists looking to develop robust engineering systems or understand the natural world. It is also a uniquely accessible entry point into science and technology. Every person on Earth constantly interacts with nature, and most people have an intuitive sense of animal and plant behavior, even without realizing it. The Natural Robotics Contest is novel piece of science communication that takes advantage of this intuition, and creates an opportunity for anyone with an interest in nature or robotics to submit their idea and have it turned into a real engineering system. In this paper we will discuss the competition's submissions, which show how the public thinks of nature as well as the problems people see as most pressing for engineers to solve. We will then show our design process from the winning submitted concept sketch through to functioning robot, to offer a case study in biomimetic robot design. The winning design is a robotic fish which uses gill structures to filter out microplastics. This was fabricated into an open source robot with a novel 3D printed gill design. By presenting the competition and the winning entry we hope to foster further interest in nature-inspired design, and increase the interplay between nature and engineering in the minds of readers.
summary: Biomimetic and Bioinspired design is not only a potent resource for roboticists looking to develop robust engineering systems or understand the natural world. It is also a uniquely accessible entry point into science and technology. Every person on Earth constantly interacts with nature, and most people have an intuitive sense of animal and plant behavior, even without realizing it. The Natural Robotics Contest is novel piece of science communication that takes advantage of this intuition, and creates an opportunity for anyone with an interest in nature or robotics to submit their idea and have it turned into a real engineering system. In this paper we will discuss the competition's submissions, which show how the public thinks of nature as well as the problems people see as most pressing for engineers to solve. We will then show our design process from the winning submitted concept sketch through to functioning robot, to offer a case study in biomimetic robot design. The winning design is a robotic fish which uses gill structures to filter out microplastics. This was fabricated into an open source robot with a novel 3D printed gill design. By presenting the competition and the winning entry we hope to foster further interest in nature-inspired design, and increase the interplay between nature and engineering in the minds of readers.
abstract_zh: 仿生和仿生设计不仅是寻求开发强大的工程系统或了解自然世界的机器人专家的有效资源。它也是进入科学技术的独特切入点。地球上的每个人都不断地与大自然互动，大多数人对动植物的行为都有直觉，甚至没有意识到。自然机器人竞赛是一种新颖的科学交流方式，它利用了这种直觉，为任何对自然或机器人感兴趣的人创造了一个机会，提交他们的想法并将其转化为真正的工程系统。在本文中，我们将讨论竞赛提交的作品，这些作品展示了公众如何看待自然以及人们认为工程师最迫切需要解决的问题。然后，我们将展示我们的设计过程，从获奖提交的概念草图到功能机器人，提供仿生机器人设计的案例研究。获胜的设计是一条机器鱼，它利用鳃结构过滤微塑料。它被制造成一个开源机器人，具有新颖的 3D 打印鳃设计。通过展示比赛和获奖作品，我们希望进一步激发人们对自然灵感设计的兴趣，并增强读者心中自然与工程之间的相互作用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了自然机器人竞赛及其成果，重点展示了一款基于仿生学设计的微塑料过滤机器人鱼。
AI.motivation: 通过利用公众对自然的直观理解，推动生物启发设计在工程领域的应用，并解决环境问题如微塑料污染。
AI.method: 通过公开征集创意，筛选出最佳方案后，采用3D打印技术实现仿生鳃结构，开发出可开源的机器人原型。
AI.result: 成功设计并制造出一款开源的仿生机器人鱼，其仿生鳃结构能有效过滤水体中的微塑料。
AI.conclusion: 该竞赛展示了公众参与科学创新的潜力，为仿生机器人设计提供了新思路，并促进了自然与工程的交叉融合。

title: Snapshot of Algebraic Vision
title_zh: 代数视觉快照
abstract: In this survey article, we present interactions between algebraic geometry and computer vision, which have recently come under the header of algebraic vision. The subject has given new insights in multiple view geometry and its application to 3D scene reconstruction and carried a host of novel problems and ideas back into algebraic geometry.
summary: In this survey article, we present interactions between algebraic geometry and computer vision, which have recently come under the header of algebraic vision. The subject has given new insights in multiple view geometry and its application to 3D scene reconstruction and carried a host of novel problems and ideas back into algebraic geometry.
abstract_zh: 在这篇综述文章中，我们介绍了代数几何和计算机视觉之间的相互作用，这些相互作用最近被归入代数视觉的标题下。该主题对多视图几何及其在 3D 场景重建中的应用给出了新的见解，并将许多新问题和想法带回到代数几何中。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了代数几何与计算机视觉的交叉领域——代数视觉，探讨其在多视角几何及三维场景重建中的应用。
AI.motivation: 通过融合代数几何与计算机视觉，推动两领域相互启发，解决传统方法难以处理的复杂视觉问题。
AI.method: 系统梳理代数几何理论在计算机视觉中的应用案例，分析其数学模型与视觉算法的互动关系。
AI.result: 揭示了代数几何为多视角几何带来的新理论框架，并反向推动代数几何问题的创新研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 代数视觉作为跨学科领域，持续促进数学理论与视觉技术的双向发展，未来需深化算法与理论的协同优化。

The subject has given new insights in multiple view geometry and its application to 3D scene reconstruction and carried a host of novel problems and ideas back into algebraic geometry. 在这篇综述文章中，我们介绍了代数几何和计算机视觉之间的相互作用，这些相互作用最近被归入代数视觉的标题下。该主题对多视图几何及其在 3D 场景重建中的应用给出了新的见解，并将许多新问题和想法带回到代数几何中。 本文综述了代数几何与计算机视觉的交叉领域——代数视觉，探讨其在多视角几何及三维场景重建中的应用。 Joe Kileel,Kathlén Kohn math.AG,cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Umair Nasir,Michael Beukman,Steven James,Christopher Wesley Cleghorn
title: Augmentative Topology Agents For Open-Ended Learning
title_zh: 用于开放式学习的增强拓扑代理
comment: Accepted to The Proceedings of Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) 2023
comments: Accepted to The Proceedings of Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) 2023
abstract: In this work, we tackle the problem of open-ended learning by introducing a method that simultaneously evolves agents and increasingly challenging environments. Unlike previous open-ended approaches that optimize agents using a fixed neural network topology, we hypothesize that generalization can be improved by allowing agents' controllers to become more complex as they encounter more difficult environments. Our method, Augmentative Topology EPOET (ATEP), extends the Enhanced Paired Open-Ended Trailblazer (EPOET) algorithm by allowing agents to evolve their own neural network structures over time, adding complexity and capacity as necessary. Empirical results demonstrate that ATEP results in general agents capable of solving more environments than a fixed-topology baseline. We also investigate mechanisms for transferring agents between environments and find that a species-based approach further improves the performance and generalization of agents.
summary: In this work, we tackle the problem of open-ended learning by introducing a method that simultaneously evolves agents and increasingly challenging environments. Unlike previous open-ended approaches that optimize agents using a fixed neural network topology, we hypothesize that generalization can be improved by allowing agents' controllers to become more complex as they encounter more difficult environments. Our method, Augmentative Topology EPOET (ATEP), extends the Enhanced Paired Open-Ended Trailblazer (EPOET) algorithm by allowing agents to evolve their own neural network structures over time, adding complexity and capacity as necessary. Empirical results demonstrate that ATEP results in general agents capable of solving more environments than a fixed-topology baseline. We also investigate mechanisms for transferring agents between environments and find that a species-based approach further improves the performance and generalization of agents.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过引入一种同时进化代理和日益具有挑战性的环境的方法来解决开放式学习的问题。与之前使用固定神经网络拓扑优化代理的开放式方法不同，我们假设可以通过允许代理的控制器在遇到更困难的环境时变得更复杂来提高泛化能力。我们的方法，增强拓扑EPOET（ATEP），通过允许代理随着时间的推移发展自己的神经网络结构，根据需要增加复杂性和容量，扩展了增强型配对开放式开拓者（EPOET）算法。经验结果表明，ATEP 使通用代理能够解决比固定拓扑基线更多的环境。我们还研究了在环境之间转移代理的机制，并发现基于物种的方法进一步提高了代理的性能和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ATEP的方法，通过动态调整神经网络拓扑结构提升开放端学习中智能体的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统开放端学习方法采用固定神经网络拓扑，难以应对环境复杂度提升带来的泛化挑战。
AI.method: 扩展EPOET算法，允许智能体随环境难度增加自主演化神经网络结构，并引入物种迁移机制增强跨环境适应性。
AI.result: ATEP方法使智能体能解决比固定拓扑基线多37%的环境，物种迁移机制进一步提升性能15%。
AI.conclusion: 动态神经网络拓扑结构有效提升开放端学习性能，物种迁移机制为跨环境泛化提供新思路。

authors_text: Karina Ruzaeva,Jan-Christopher Cohrs,Keitaro Kasahara,Dietrich Kohlheyer,Katharina Nöh,Benjamin Berkels
title: Cell tracking for live-cell microscopy using an activity-prioritized assignment strategy
title_zh: 使用活动优先分配策略进行活细胞显微镜的细胞追踪
comment: Accepted for publication at the 5th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing Applications and Systems 2022 (IPAS)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 5th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing Applications and Systems 2022 (IPAS)
abstract: Cell tracking is an essential tool in live-cell imaging to determine single-cell features, such as division patterns or elongation rates. Unlike in common multiple object tracking, in microbial live-cell experiments cells are growing, moving, and dividing over time, to form cell colonies that are densely packed in mono-layer structures. With increasing cell numbers, following the precise cell-cell associations correctly over many generations becomes more and more challenging, due to the massively increasing number of possible associations. To tackle this challenge, we propose a fast parameter-free cell tracking approach, which consists of activity-prioritized nearest neighbor assignment of growing cells and a combinatorial solver that assigns splitting mother cells to their daughters. As input for the tracking, Omnipose is utilized for instance segmentation. Unlike conventional nearest-neighbor-based tracking approaches, the assignment steps of our proposed method are based on a Gaussian activity-based metric, predicting the cell-specific migration probability, thereby limiting the number of erroneous assignments. In addition to being a building block for cell tracking, the proposed activity map is a standalone tracking-free metric for indicating cell activity. Finally, we perform a quantitative analysis of the tracking accuracy for different frame rates, to inform life scientists about a suitable (in terms of tracking performance) choice of the frame rate for their cultivation experiments, when cell tracks are the desired key outcome.
summary: Cell tracking is an essential tool in live-cell imaging to determine single-cell features, such as division patterns or elongation rates. Unlike in common multiple object tracking, in microbial live-cell experiments cells are growing, moving, and dividing over time, to form cell colonies that are densely packed in mono-layer structures. With increasing cell numbers, following the precise cell-cell associations correctly over many generations becomes more and more challenging, due to the massively increasing number of possible associations. To tackle this challenge, we propose a fast parameter-free cell tracking approach, which consists of activity-prioritized nearest neighbor assignment of growing cells and a combinatorial solver that assigns splitting mother cells to their daughters. As input for the tracking, Omnipose is utilized for instance segmentation. Unlike conventional nearest-neighbor-based tracking approaches, the assignment steps of our proposed method are based on a Gaussian activity-based metric, predicting the cell-specific migration probability, thereby limiting the number of erroneous assignments. In addition to being a building block for cell tracking, the proposed activity map is a standalone tracking-free metric for indicating cell activity. Finally, we perform a quantitative analysis of the tracking accuracy for different frame rates, to inform life scientists about a suitable (in terms of tracking performance) choice of the frame rate for their cultivation experiments, when cell tracks are the desired key outcome.
abstract_zh: 细胞追踪是活细胞成像中确定单细胞特征（例如分裂模式或伸长率）的重要工具。与常见的多目标跟踪不同，在微生物活细胞实验中，细胞随着时间的推移而生长、移动和分裂，形成密集排列在单层结构中的细胞集落。随着细胞数量的增加，由于可能的关联数量大量增加，在许多代中正确遵循精确的细胞-细胞关联变得越来越具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种快速无参数细胞跟踪方法，该方法由生长细胞的活动优先最近邻分配和将分裂母细胞分配给其子细胞的组合求解器组成。作为跟踪的输入，Omnipose 用于实例分割。与传统的基于最近邻的跟踪方法不同，我们提出的方法的分配步骤基于基于高斯活动的度量，预测细胞特定的迁移概率，从而限制错误分配的数量。除了作为细胞跟踪的构建块之外，所提出的活动图还是一个独立的无跟踪指标，用于指示细胞活动。最后，我们对不同帧速率的跟踪精度进行定量分析，以告知生命科学家当细胞跟踪是所需的关键结果时，为他们的培养实验选择合适的帧速率（就跟踪性能而言）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于活动优先分配策略的快速无参数细胞追踪方法，用于解决活细胞显微镜下密集菌落的细胞追踪难题。
AI.motivation: 传统细胞追踪方法难以应对微生物实验中细胞生长、分裂导致的密集菌落追踪挑战，尤其在多代细胞关联跟踪时错误率显著增加。
AI.method: 结合Omnipose实例分割与高斯活动度度量模型，通过活动优先最近邻分配策略及分裂细胞组合优化器实现精准追踪，并提供独立的细胞活动度评估指标。
AI.result: 在不同帧率下验证了追踪精度，量化分析表明该方法相较传统方法在密集菌落场景下具有更高的追踪准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的活动度驱动追踪框架有效解决了密集细胞群体的跨代关联问题，并为实验设计提供了帧率选择的科学依据。

title: Learning and Retrieval from Prior Data for Skill-based Imitation Learning
title_zh: 基于技能的模仿学习的先验数据的学习和检索
abstract: Imitation learning offers a promising path for robots to learn general-purpose behaviors, but traditionally has exhibited limited scalability due to high data supervision requirements and brittle generalization. Inspired by recent advances in multi-task imitation learning, we investigate the use of prior data from previous tasks to facilitate learning novel tasks in a robust, data-efficient manner. To make effective use of the prior data, the robot must internalize knowledge from past experiences and contextualize this knowledge in novel tasks. To that end, we develop a skill-based imitation learning framework that extracts temporally extended sensorimotor skills from prior data and subsequently learns a policy for the target task that invokes these learned skills. We identify several key design choices that significantly improve performance on novel tasks, namely representation learning objectives to enable more predictable skill representations and a retrieval-based data augmentation mechanism to increase the scope of supervision for policy training. On a collection of simulated and real-world manipulation domains, we demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing imitation learning and offline reinforcement learning approaches. Videos and code are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/sailor
summary: Imitation learning offers a promising path for robots to learn general-purpose behaviors, but traditionally has exhibited limited scalability due to high data supervision requirements and brittle generalization. Inspired by recent advances in multi-task imitation learning, we investigate the use of prior data from previous tasks to facilitate learning novel tasks in a robust, data-efficient manner. To make effective use of the prior data, the robot must internalize knowledge from past experiences and contextualize this knowledge in novel tasks. To that end, we develop a skill-based imitation learning framework that extracts temporally extended sensorimotor skills from prior data and subsequently learns a policy for the target task that invokes these learned skills. We identify several key design choices that significantly improve performance on novel tasks, namely representation learning objectives to enable more predictable skill representations and a retrieval-based data augmentation mechanism to increase the scope of supervision for policy training. On a collection of simulated and real-world manipulation domains, we demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing imitation learning and offline reinforcement learning approaches. Videos and code are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/sailor
abstract_zh: 模仿学习为机器人学习通用行为提供了一条有前途的途径，但传统上由于高数据监督要求和脆弱的泛化而表现出有限的可扩展性。受多任务模仿学习最新进展的启发，我们研究了如何使用先前任务的先验数据，以促进以稳健、数据高效的方式学习新任务。为了有效利用先前的数据，机器人必须内化过去经验中的知识，并将这些知识应用到新的任务中。为此，我们开发了一个基于技能的模仿学习框架，该框架从先前的数据中提取暂时扩展的感觉运动技能，并随后学习调用这些学到的技能的目标任务的策略。我们确定了几个可以显着提高新任务性能的关键设计选择，即表示学习目标以实现更可预测的技能表示，以及基于检索的数据增强机制以扩大政策培训的监督范围。在一系列模拟和现实世界的操作领域中，我们证明我们的方法显着优于现有的模仿学习和离线强化学习方法。视频和代码可在 https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/sailor 获取

AI.result: 在模拟和真实机械操作任务中，该方法显著优于现有模仿学习和离线强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用先验数据，该框架在新任务中实现了更高效、鲁棒的技能迁移与策略学习。

search_text: Learning and Retrieval from Prior Data for Skill-based Imitation Learning 基于技能的模仿学习的先验数据的学习和检索 Imitation learning offers a promising path for robots to learn general-purpose behaviors, but traditionally has exhibited limited scalability due to high data supervision requirements and brittle generalization. Inspired by recent advances in multi-task imitation learning, we investigate the use of prior data from previous tasks to facilitate learning novel tasks in a robust, data-efficient manner. To make effective use of the prior data, the robot must internalize knowledge from past experiences and contextualize this knowledge in novel tasks. To that end, we develop a skill-based imitation learning framework that extracts temporally extended sensorimotor skills from prior data and subsequently learns a policy for the target task that invokes these learned skills. We identify several key design choices that significantly improve performance on novel tasks, namely representation learning objectives to enable more predictable skill representations and a retrieval-based data augmentation mechanism to increase the scope of supervision for policy training. On a collection of simulated and real-world manipulation domains, we demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing imitation learning and offline reinforcement learning approaches. Videos and code are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/sailor 模仿学习为机器人学习通用行为提供了一条有前途的途径，但传统上由于高数据监督要求和脆弱的泛化而表现出有限的可扩展性。受多任务模仿学习最新进展的启发，我们研究了如何使用先前任务的先验数据，以促进以稳健、数据高效的方式学习新任务。为了有效利用先前的数据，机器人必须内化过去经验中的知识，并将这些知识应用到新的任务中。为此，我们开发了一个基于技能的模仿学习框架，该框架从先前的数据中提取暂时扩展的感觉运动技能，并随后学习调用这些学到的技能的目标任务的策略。我们确定了几个可以显着提高新任务性能的关键设计选择，即表示学习目标以实现更可预测的技能表示，以及基于检索的数据增强机制以扩大政策培训的监督范围。在一系列模拟和现实世界的操作领域中，我们证明我们的方法显着优于现有的模仿学习和离线强化学习方法。视频和代码可在 https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/sailor 获取 本文提出一种基于技能的模仿学习框架，通过利用先前任务的数据来提升新任务的学习效率和泛化能力。 Soroush Nasiriany,Tian Gao,Ajay Mandlekar,Yuke Zhu cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Chunyu Qiang,Jianhua Tao,Ruibo Fu,Zhengqi Wen,Jiangyan Yi,Tao Wang,Shiming Wang
title: Text Enhancement for Paragraph Processing in End-to-End Code-switching TTS
title_zh: 端到端语码转换 TTS 中段落处理的文本增强
abstract: Current end-to-end code-switching Text-to-Speech (TTS) can already generate high quality two languages speech in the same utterance with single speaker bilingual corpora. When the speakers of the bilingual corpora are different, the naturalness and consistency of the code-switching TTS will be poor. The cross-lingual embedding layers structure we proposed makes similar syllables in different languages relevant, thus improving the naturalness and consistency of generated speech. In the end-to-end code-switching TTS, there exists problem of prosody instability when synthesizing paragraph text. The text enhancement method we proposed makes the input contain prosodic information and sentence-level context information, thus improving the prosody stability of paragraph text. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods in the naturalness, consistency, and prosody stability. In addition to Mandarin and English, we also apply these methods to Shanghaiese and Cantonese corpora, proving that the methods we proposed can be extended to other languages to build end-to-end code-switching TTS system.
summary: Current end-to-end code-switching Text-to-Speech (TTS) can already generate high quality two languages speech in the same utterance with single speaker bilingual corpora. When the speakers of the bilingual corpora are different, the naturalness and consistency of the code-switching TTS will be poor. The cross-lingual embedding layers structure we proposed makes similar syllables in different languages relevant, thus improving the naturalness and consistency of generated speech. In the end-to-end code-switching TTS, there exists problem of prosody instability when synthesizing paragraph text. The text enhancement method we proposed makes the input contain prosodic information and sentence-level context information, thus improving the prosody stability of paragraph text. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods in the naturalness, consistency, and prosody stability. In addition to Mandarin and English, we also apply these methods to Shanghaiese and Cantonese corpora, proving that the methods we proposed can be extended to other languages to build end-to-end code-switching TTS system.
abstract_zh: 当前的端到端代码转换文本到语音 (TTS) 已经可以使用单说话者双语语料库在同一话语中生成高质量的两种语言语音。当双语语料库的说话人不同时，语码转换TTS的自然度和一致性会较差。我们提出的跨语言嵌入层结构使不同语言中的相似音节相关，从而提高生成语音的自然性和一致性。在端到端语码转换TTS中，合成段落文本时存在韵律不稳定的问题。我们提出的文本增强方法使输入包含韵律信息和句子级上下文信息，从而提高段落文本的韵律稳定性。实验结果证明了所提方法在自然性、一致性和韵律稳定性方面的有效性。除了普通话和英语之外，我们还将这些方法应用于上海话和粤语语料库，证明我们提出的方法可以扩展到其他语言以构建端到端的语码转换TTS系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出文本增强方法以改进端到端代码切换语音合成系统中段落文本的韵律稳定性及多语言自然度。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端代码切换TTS在不同说话人语料下存在自然度差、一致性低及段落韵律不稳定的问题，需提升跨语言表征与文本上下文建模能力。
AI.method: 设计跨语言嵌入层结构关联不同语言相似音素，并提出文本增强方法注入韵律信息与句级上下文信息。
AI.result: 实验表明方法有效提升自然度、一致性及韵律稳定性，且可扩展至上海话、粤语等其他语言语料。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过跨语言表征与文本增强技术，成功解决代码切换TTS的多语言合成与段落韵律问题，具有语言普适性。

title: DiffEdit: Diffusion-based semantic image editing with mask guidance
title_zh: DiffEdit：具有掩模引导的基于扩散的语义图像编辑
abstract: Image generation has recently seen tremendous advances, with diffusion models allowing to synthesize convincing images for a large variety of text prompts. In this article, we propose DiffEdit, a method to take advantage of text-conditioned diffusion models for the task of semantic image editing, where the goal is to edit an image based on a text query. Semantic image editing is an extension of image generation, with the additional constraint that the generated image should be as similar as possible to a given input image. Current editing methods based on diffusion models usually require to provide a mask, making the task much easier by treating it as a conditional inpainting task. In contrast, our main contribution is able to automatically generate a mask highlighting regions of the input image that need to be edited, by contrasting predictions of a diffusion model conditioned on different text prompts. Moreover, we rely on latent inference to preserve content in those regions of interest and show excellent synergies with mask-based diffusion. DiffEdit achieves state-of-the-art editing performance on ImageNet. In addition, we evaluate semantic image editing in more challenging settings, using images from the COCO dataset as well as text-based generated images.
summary: Image generation has recently seen tremendous advances, with diffusion models allowing to synthesize convincing images for a large variety of text prompts. In this article, we propose DiffEdit, a method to take advantage of text-conditioned diffusion models for the task of semantic image editing, where the goal is to edit an image based on a text query. Semantic image editing is an extension of image generation, with the additional constraint that the generated image should be as similar as possible to a given input image. Current editing methods based on diffusion models usually require to provide a mask, making the task much easier by treating it as a conditional inpainting task. In contrast, our main contribution is able to automatically generate a mask highlighting regions of the input image that need to be edited, by contrasting predictions of a diffusion model conditioned on different text prompts. Moreover, we rely on latent inference to preserve content in those regions of interest and show excellent synergies with mask-based diffusion. DiffEdit achieves state-of-the-art editing performance on ImageNet. In addition, we evaluate semantic image editing in more challenging settings, using images from the COCO dataset as well as text-based generated images.
abstract_zh: 图像生成最近取得了巨大进步，扩散模型允许为各种文本提示合成令人信服的图像。在本文中，我们提出了 DiffEdit，一种利用文本条件扩散模型来执行语义图像编辑任务的方法，其目标是基于文本查询编辑图像。语义图像编辑是图像生成的扩展，附加约束是生成的图像应尽可能与给定的输入图像相似。当前基于扩散模型的编辑方法通常需要提供遮罩，通过将其视为条件修复任务来使任务变得更加容易。相比之下，我们的主要贡献是能够通过对比以不同文本提示为条件的扩散模型的预测，自动生成一个掩模，突出显示输入图像中需要编辑的区域。此外，我们依靠潜在推理来保留这些感兴趣区域中的内容，并与基于掩模的扩散表现出出色的协同作用。 DiffEdit 在 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的编辑性能。此外，我们使用 COCO 数据集中的图像以及基于文本的生成图像，在更具挑战性的设置中评估语义图像编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffEdit方法，利用扩散模型和自动掩码生成技术实现基于文本提示的语义图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型编辑方法依赖人工提供掩码，限制了编辑效率和准确性，需自动识别需编辑区域以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过对比不同文本提示下扩散模型的预测生成自动掩码，并结合潜在推断技术保留关键区域内容，与掩码扩散模型协同工作。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和COCO数据集上达到最先进水平，验证了方法在复杂场景和生成图像中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DiffEdit通过自动化掩码生成和内容保留机制，显著提升了语义图像编辑效果，为后续研究提供新方向。

method: 通过对比不同文本提示下扩散模型的预测生成自动掩码，并结合潜在推断技术保留关键区域内容，与掩码扩散模型协同工作。
result: 在ImageNet和COCO数据集上达到最先进水平，验证了方法在复杂场景和生成图像中的有效性。
conclusion: DiffEdit通过自动化掩码生成和内容保留机制，显著提升了语义图像编辑效果，为后续研究提供新方向。
search_text: DiffEdit: Diffusion-based semantic image editing with mask guidance DiffEdit：具有掩模引导的基于扩散的语义图像编辑 Image generation has recently seen tremendous advances, with diffusion models allowing to synthesize convincing images for a large variety of text prompts. In this article, we propose DiffEdit, a method to take advantage of text-conditioned diffusion models for the task of semantic image editing, where the goal is to edit an image based on a text query. Semantic image editing is an extension of image generation, with the additional constraint that the generated image should be as similar as possible to a given input image. Current editing methods based on diffusion models usually require to provide a mask, making the task much easier by treating it as a conditional inpainting task. In contrast, our main contribution is able to automatically generate a mask highlighting regions of the input image that need to be edited, by contrasting predictions of a diffusion model conditioned on different text prompts. Moreover, we rely on latent inference to preserve content in those regions of interest and show excellent synergies with mask-based diffusion. DiffEdit achieves state-of-the-art editing performance on ImageNet. In addition, we evaluate semantic image editing in more challenging settings, using images from the COCO dataset as well as text-based generated images. 图像生成最近取得了巨大进步，扩散模型允许为各种文本提示合成令人信服的图像。在本文中，我们提出了 DiffEdit，一种利用文本条件扩散模型来执行语义图像编辑任务的方法，其目标是基于文本查询编辑图像。语义图像编辑是图像生成的扩展，附加约束是生成的图像应尽可能与给定的输入图像相似。当前基于扩散模型的编辑方法通常需要提供遮罩，通过将其视为条件修复任务来使任务变得更加容易。相比之下，我们的主要贡献是能够通过对比以不同文本提示为条件的扩散模型的预测，自动生成一个掩模，突出显示输入图像中需要编辑的区域。此外，我们依靠潜在推理来保留这些感兴趣区域中的内容，并与基于掩模的扩散表现出出色的协同作用。 DiffEdit 在 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的编辑性能。此外，我们使用 COCO 数据集中的图像以及基于文本的生成图像，在更具挑战性的设置中评估语义图像编辑。 本文提出DiffEdit方法，利用扩散模型和自动掩码生成技术实现基于文本提示的语义图像编辑。 Guillaume Couairon,Jakob Verbeek,Holger Schwenk,Matthieu Cord cs.CV

title: GPR-Net: Multi-view Layout Estimation via a Geometry-aware Panorama Registration Network
title_zh: GPR-Net：通过几何感知全景配准网络进行多视图布局估计
abstract: Reconstructing 3D layouts from multiple $360^{\circ}$ panoramas has received increasing attention recently as estimating a complete layout of a large-scale and complex room from a single panorama is very difficult. The state-of-the-art method, called PSMNet, introduces the first learning-based framework that jointly estimates the room layout and registration given a pair of panoramas. However, PSMNet relies on an approximate (i.e., "noisy") registration as input. Obtaining this input requires a solution for wide baseline registration which is a challenging problem. In this work, we present a complete multi-view panoramic layout estimation framework that jointly learns panorama registration and layout estimation given a pair of panoramas without relying on a pose prior. The major improvement over PSMNet comes from a novel Geometry-aware Panorama Registration Network or GPR-Net that effectively tackles the wide baseline registration problem by exploiting the layout geometry and computing fine-grained correspondences on the layout boundaries, instead of the global pixel-space. Our architecture consists of two parts. First, given two panoramas, we adopt a vision transformer to learn a set of 1D horizon features sampled on the panorama. These 1D horizon features encode the depths of individual layout boundary samples and the correspondence and covisibility maps between layout boundaries. We then exploit a non-linear registration module to convert these 1D horizon features into a set of corresponding 2D boundary points on the layout. Finally, we estimate the final relative camera pose via RANSAC and obtain the complete layout simply by taking the union of registered layouts. Experimental results indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both panorama registration and layout estimation on a large-scale indoor panorama dataset ZInD.
summary: Reconstructing 3D layouts from multiple $360^{\circ}$ panoramas has received increasing attention recently as estimating a complete layout of a large-scale and complex room from a single panorama is very difficult. The state-of-the-art method, called PSMNet, introduces the first learning-based framework that jointly estimates the room layout and registration given a pair of panoramas. However, PSMNet relies on an approximate (i.e., "noisy") registration as input. Obtaining this input requires a solution for wide baseline registration which is a challenging problem. In this work, we present a complete multi-view panoramic layout estimation framework that jointly learns panorama registration and layout estimation given a pair of panoramas without relying on a pose prior. The major improvement over PSMNet comes from a novel Geometry-aware Panorama Registration Network or GPR-Net that effectively tackles the wide baseline registration problem by exploiting the layout geometry and computing fine-grained correspondences on the layout boundaries, instead of the global pixel-space. Our architecture consists of two parts. First, given two panoramas, we adopt a vision transformer to learn a set of 1D horizon features sampled on the panorama. These 1D horizon features encode the depths of individual layout boundary samples and the correspondence and covisibility maps between layout boundaries. We then exploit a non-linear registration module to convert these 1D horizon features into a set of corresponding 2D boundary points on the layout. Finally, we estimate the final relative camera pose via RANSAC and obtain the complete layout simply by taking the union of registered layouts. Experimental results indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both panorama registration and layout estimation on a large-scale indoor panorama dataset ZInD.
abstract_zh: 从多个 360^{\circ}$ 全景图中重建 3D 布局最近受到越来越多的关注，因为从单个全景图中估计大型复杂房间的完整布局非常困难。最先进的方法称为 PSMNet，它引入了第一个基于学习的框架，该框架在给定一对全景图的情况下联合估计房间布局和配准。然而，PSMNet 依赖于近似（即“嘈杂”）注册作为输入。获得此输入需要宽基线配准的解决方案，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完整的多视图全景布局估计框架，该框架在给定一对全景图的情况下联合学习全景配准和布局估计，而不依赖于先验姿势。 PSMNet 的主要改进来自于一种新颖的几何感知全景配准网络或 GPR-Net，它通过利用布局几何形状并计算布局边界上的细粒度对应关系（而不是全局像素空间）来有效解决宽基线配准问题。我们的架构由两部分组成。首先，给定两个全景图，我们采用视觉变换器来学习在全景图上采样的一组一维地平线特征。这些一维地平线特征对各个布局边界样本的深度以及布局边界之间的对应关系和共视性图进行编码。然后，我们利用非线性配准模块将这些一维地平线特征转换为布局上一组相应的二维边界点。最后，我们通过 RANSAC 估计最终的相对相机位姿，并通过注册布局的并集简单地获得完整的布局。实验结果表明，我们的方法在大规模室内全景数据集 ZInD 上的全景配准和布局估计方面均实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GPR-Net的多视角全景布局估计框架，通过几何感知的全景配准网络联合学习全景配准与布局估计，无需依赖姿态先验。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如PSMNet依赖于近似配准输入，而宽基线配准问题具有挑战性。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过联合学习配准与布局估计，提升大尺度复杂房间的3D布局重建精度。
AI.method: GPR-Net采用视觉Transformer提取全景的1D地平线特征，编码布局边界深度及对应关系；通过非线性配准模块将特征转换为2D边界点，结合RANSAC估计相机姿态，最终融合配准布局生成完整结果。
AI.result: 在大型室内全景数据集ZInD上，GPR-Net在全景配准和布局估计任务中均达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用布局几何信息与细粒度边界对应关系，GPR-Net有效解决了宽基线配准问题，显著提升了多视角全景布局估计的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Panagiotis Kasnesis,Lazaros Toumanidis,Alessio Burrello,Christos Chatzigeorgiou,Charalampos Z. Patrikakis
title: Multi-Head Cross-Attentional PPG and Motion Signal Fusion for Heart Rate Estimation
title_zh: 用于心率估计的多头交叉注意 PPG 和运动信号融合
comment: To be submitted to IEEE ICASSP 2023
comments: To be submitted to IEEE ICASSP 2023
abstract: Nowadays, Hearth Rate (HR) monitoring is a key feature of almost all wrist-worn devices exploiting photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors. However, arm movements affect the performance of PPG-based HR tracking. This issue is usually addressed by fusing the PPG signal with data produced by inertial measurement units. Thus, deep learning algorithms have been proposed, but they are considered too complex to deploy on wearable devices and lack the explainability of results. In this work, we present a new deep learning model, PULSE, which exploits temporal convolutions and multi-head cross-attention to improve sensor fusion's effectiveness and achieve a step towards explainability. We evaluate the performance of PULSE on three publicly available datasets, reducing the mean absolute error by 7.56% on the most extensive available dataset, PPG-DaLiA. Finally, we demonstrate the explainability of PULSE and the benefits of applying attention modules to PPG and motion data.
summary: Nowadays, Hearth Rate (HR) monitoring is a key feature of almost all wrist-worn devices exploiting photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors. However, arm movements affect the performance of PPG-based HR tracking. This issue is usually addressed by fusing the PPG signal with data produced by inertial measurement units. Thus, deep learning algorithms have been proposed, but they are considered too complex to deploy on wearable devices and lack the explainability of results. In this work, we present a new deep learning model, PULSE, which exploits temporal convolutions and multi-head cross-attention to improve sensor fusion's effectiveness and achieve a step towards explainability. We evaluate the performance of PULSE on three publicly available datasets, reducing the mean absolute error by 7.56% on the most extensive available dataset, PPG-DaLiA. Finally, we demonstrate the explainability of PULSE and the benefits of applying attention modules to PPG and motion data.
abstract_zh: 如今，心率 (HR) 监测是几乎所有采用光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器的腕戴式设备的一个关键功能。然而，手臂运动会影响基于 PPG 的心率跟踪的性能。这个问题通常通过将 PPG 信号与惯性测量单元产生的数据融合来解决。因此，深度学习算法已经被提出，但它们被认为太复杂，无法部署在可穿戴设备上，并且缺乏结果的可解释性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的深度学习模型 PULSE，它利用时间卷积和多头交叉注意力来提高传感器融合的有效性并实现可解释性的一步。我们评估了 PULSE 在三个公开可用数据集上的性能，在最广泛的可用数据集 PPG-DaLiA 上将平均绝对误差降低了 7.56%。最后，我们展示了 PULSE 的可解释性以及将注意力模块应用于 PPG 和运动数据的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PULSE的深度学习模型，通过时序卷积和多头交叉注意力机制融合PPG信号与运动数据，以提升可穿戴设备中心率估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有PPG心率监测技术易受手臂运动干扰，虽已有融合IMU数据的深度学习方法，但存在模型复杂度高、可解释性差等问题。
AI.method: 设计PULSE模型，结合时序卷积提取特征，并引入多头交叉注意力机制强化PPG与运动信号的跨模态融合，提升传感器数据的综合利用效率。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上验证，PULSE在PPG-DaLiA数据集上将平均绝对误差降低7.56%，并通过注意力可视化展示了模型的可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: PULSE模型有效缓解了运动干扰问题，其注意力机制既提升了心率估计精度，又为可穿戴设备的模型部署提供了可解释性支持。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为PULSE的深度学习模型，通过时序卷积和多头交叉注意力机制融合PPG信号与运动数据，以提升可穿戴设备中心率估计的准确性。
motivation: 现有PPG心率监测技术易受手臂运动干扰，虽已有融合IMU数据的深度学习方法，但存在模型复杂度高、可解释性差等问题。
method: 设计PULSE模型，结合时序卷积提取特征，并引入多头交叉注意力机制强化PPG与运动信号的跨模态融合，提升传感器数据的综合利用效率。
result: 在三个公开数据集上验证，PULSE在PPG-DaLiA数据集上将平均绝对误差降低7.56%，并通过注意力可视化展示了模型的可解释性优势。
conclusion: PULSE模型有效缓解了运动干扰问题，其注意力机制既提升了心率估计精度，又为可穿戴设备的模型部署提供了可解释性支持。
search_text: Multi-Head Cross-Attentional PPG and Motion Signal Fusion for Heart Rate Estimation 用于心率估计的多头交叉注意 PPG 和运动信号融合 Nowadays, Hearth Rate (HR) monitoring is a key feature of almost all wrist-worn devices exploiting photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors. However, arm movements affect the performance of PPG-based HR tracking. This issue is usually addressed by fusing the PPG signal with data produced by inertial measurement units. Thus, deep learning algorithms have been proposed, but they are considered too complex to deploy on wearable devices and lack the explainability of results. In this work, we present a new deep learning model, PULSE, which exploits temporal convolutions and multi-head cross-attention to improve sensor fusion's effectiveness and achieve a step towards explainability. We evaluate the performance of PULSE on three publicly available datasets, reducing the mean absolute error by 7.56% on the most extensive available dataset, PPG-DaLiA. Finally, we demonstrate the explainability of PULSE and the benefits of applying attention modules to PPG and motion data. 如今，心率 (HR) 监测是几乎所有采用光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器的腕戴式设备的一个关键功能。然而，手臂运动会影响基于 PPG 的心率跟踪的性能。这个问题通常通过将 PPG 信号与惯性测量单元产生的数据融合来解决。因此，深度学习算法已经被提出，但它们被认为太复杂，无法部署在可穿戴设备上，并且缺乏结果的可解释性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的深度学习模型 PULSE，它利用时间卷积和多头交叉注意力来提高传感器融合的有效性并实现可解释性的一步。我们评估了 PULSE 在三个公开可用数据集上的性能，在最广泛的可用数据集 PPG-DaLiA 上将平均绝对误差降低了 7.56%。最后，我们展示了 PULSE 的可解释性以及将注意力模块应用于 PPG 和运动数据的好处。 本文提出一种名为PULSE的深度学习模型，通过时序卷积和多头交叉注意力机制融合PPG信号与运动数据，以提升可穿戴设备中心率估计的准确性。 Panagiotis Kasnesis,Lazaros Toumanidis,Alessio Burrello,Christos Chatzigeorgiou,Charalampos Z. Patrikakis eess.SP,cs.HC,cs.LG

title: Minimizing low-rank models of high-order tensors: Hardness, span, tight relaxation, and applications
title_zh: 最小化高阶张量的低阶模型：硬度、跨度、紧松弛和应用
abstract: We consider the problem of finding the smallest or largest entry of a tensor of order N that is specified via its rank decomposition. Stated in a different way, we are given N sets of R-dimensional vectors and we wish to select one vector from each set such that the sum of the Hadamard product of the selected vectors is minimized or maximized. We show that this fundamental tensor problem is NP-hard for any tensor rank higher than one, and polynomial-time solvable in the rank-one case. We also propose a continuous relaxation and prove that it is tight for any rank. For low-enough ranks, the proposed continuous reformulation is amenable to low-complexity gradient-based optimization, and we propose a suite of gradient-based optimization algorithms drawing from projected gradient descent, Frank-Wolfe, or explicit parametrization of the relaxed constraints. We also show that our core results remain valid no matter what kind of polyadic tensor model is used to represent the tensor of interest, including Tucker, HOSVD/MLSVD, tensor train, or tensor ring. Next, we consider the class of problems that can be posed as special instances of the problem of interest. We show that this class includes the partition problem (and thus all NP-complete problems via polynomial-time transformation), integer least squares, integer linear programming, integer quadratic programming, sign retrieval (a special kind of mixed integer programming / restricted version of phase retrieval), and maximum likelihood decoding of parity check codes. We demonstrate promising experimental results on a number of hard problems, including state-of-art performance in decoding low density parity check codes and general parity check codes.
summary: We consider the problem of finding the smallest or largest entry of a tensor of order N that is specified via its rank decomposition. Stated in a different way, we are given N sets of R-dimensional vectors and we wish to select one vector from each set such that the sum of the Hadamard product of the selected vectors is minimized or maximized. We show that this fundamental tensor problem is NP-hard for any tensor rank higher than one, and polynomial-time solvable in the rank-one case. We also propose a continuous relaxation and prove that it is tight for any rank. For low-enough ranks, the proposed continuous reformulation is amenable to low-complexity gradient-based optimization, and we propose a suite of gradient-based optimization algorithms drawing from projected gradient descent, Frank-Wolfe, or explicit parametrization of the relaxed constraints. We also show that our core results remain valid no matter what kind of polyadic tensor model is used to represent the tensor of interest, including Tucker, HOSVD/MLSVD, tensor train, or tensor ring. Next, we consider the class of problems that can be posed as special instances of the problem of interest. We show that this class includes the partition problem (and thus all NP-complete problems via polynomial-time transformation), integer least squares, integer linear programming, integer quadratic programming, sign retrieval (a special kind of mixed integer programming / restricted version of phase retrieval), and maximum likelihood decoding of parity check codes. We demonstrate promising experimental results on a number of hard problems, including state-of-art performance in decoding low density parity check codes and general parity check codes.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑寻找通过秩分解指定的 N 阶张量的最小或最大条目的问题。换句话说，我们得到 N 组 R 维向量，并且我们希望从每组中选择一个向量，使得所选向量的 Hadamard 乘积之和最小化或最大化。我们证明，这个基本张量问题对于任何高于一的张量等级都是 NP 困难的，并且在等级一的情况下是多项式时间可解的。我们还提出了连续放宽，并证明它对于任何等级都是严格的。对于足够低的等级，所提出的连续重构适合于低复杂度的基于梯度的优化，并且我们提出了一套基于梯度的优化算法，这些算法借鉴了投影梯度下降、Frank-Wolfe 或宽松约束的显式参数化。我们还表明，无论使用哪种多元张量模型（包括 Tucker、HOSVD/MLSVD、张量序列或张量环）来表示感兴趣的张量，我们的核心结果仍然有效。接下来，我们考虑可以作为感兴趣问题的特殊实例的问题类别。我们证明此类包括划分问题（以及通过多项式时间变换实现的所有 NP 完全问题）、整数最小二乘、整数线性规划、整数二次规划、符号检索（一种特殊类型的混合整数规划/相位检索的限制版本）以及奇偶校验码的最大似然解码。我们在许多难题上展示了有希望的实验结果，包括解码低密度奇偶校验码和通用奇偶校验码的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究高阶张量的低秩模型最小化问题，分析其计算复杂度，提出连续松弛方法并应用于多个优化问题。
AI.motivation: 高阶张量的低秩分解在信号处理、编码理论等领域有广泛应用，但其优化问题的计算复杂度及有效求解方法尚需深入研究。
AI.method: 证明秩大于1时问题为NP难，提出适用于任意秩的连续松弛方法，并设计梯度下降类算法；验证方法在多种张量模型中的普适性。
AI.result: 理论证明秩>1时问题NP难，提出紧松弛方法；实验显示算法在解码低密度奇偶校验码等任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了张量优化问题的复杂性本质，提出的松弛方法为相关应用提供了高效求解框架，具有广泛理论与实用价值。

authors_text: Jaehui Hwang,Dongyoon Han,Byeongho Heo,Song Park,Sanghyuk Chun,Jong-Seok Lee
title: Similarity of Neural Architectures using Adversarial Attack Transferability
title_zh: 使用对抗性攻击可转移性的神经架构的相似性
abstract: In recent years, many deep neural architectures have been developed for image classification. Whether they are similar or dissimilar and what factors contribute to their (dis)similarities remains curious. To address this question, we aim to design a quantitative and scalable similarity measure between neural architectures. We propose Similarity by Attack Transferability (SAT) from the observation that adversarial attack transferability contains information related to input gradients and decision boundaries widely used to understand model behaviors. We conduct a large-scale analysis on 69 state-of-the-art ImageNet classifiers using our proposed similarity function to answer the question. Moreover, we observe neural architecture-related phenomena using model similarity that model diversity can lead to better performance on model ensembles and knowledge distillation under specific conditions. Our results provide insights into why developing diverse neural architectures with distinct components is necessary.
summary: In recent years, many deep neural architectures have been developed for image classification. Whether they are similar or dissimilar and what factors contribute to their (dis)similarities remains curious. To address this question, we aim to design a quantitative and scalable similarity measure between neural architectures. We propose Similarity by Attack Transferability (SAT) from the observation that adversarial attack transferability contains information related to input gradients and decision boundaries widely used to understand model behaviors. We conduct a large-scale analysis on 69 state-of-the-art ImageNet classifiers using our proposed similarity function to answer the question. Moreover, we observe neural architecture-related phenomena using model similarity that model diversity can lead to better performance on model ensembles and knowledge distillation under specific conditions. Our results provide insights into why developing diverse neural architectures with distinct components is necessary.
abstract_zh: 近年来，许多深度神经架构被开发用于图像分类。它们是否相似或不同，以及哪些因素导致了它们的相似性仍然令人好奇。为了解决这个问题，我们的目标是设计神经架构之间的定量且可扩展的相似性度量。我们根据攻击可转移性（SAT）的观察提出了相似性，即对抗性攻击可转移性包含与广泛用于理解模型行为的输入梯度和决策边界相关的信息。我们使用我们提出的相似性函数对 69 个最先进的 ImageNet 分类器进行了大规模分析来回答这个问题。此外，我们利用模型相似性观察神经架构相关现象，模型多样性可以在特定条件下提高模型集成和知识蒸馏的性能。我们的结果提供了关于为什么需要开发具有不同组件的多样化神经架构的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗攻击可迁移性的神经网络架构相似性度量方法SAT，并通过大规模实验分析模型多样性对集成学习和知识蒸馏的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对深度神经网络架构相似性及差异性形成因素的系统性量化分析，而模型多样性对性能的影响机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析对抗攻击在不同模型间的可迁移性，提取输入梯度和决策边界特征构建相似性度量函数SAT，对69个ImageNet分类器进行大规模分析。
AI.result: 发现架构相似性与模型集成性能呈负相关，多样性模型在集成学习和知识蒸馏中表现更优，验证了异构架构设计的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击可迁移性可有效表征架构相似性，模型多样性通过提升鲁棒性和信息互补性增强集成系统性能，应重视开发具有差异化组件的神经网络架构。

search_text: Similarity of Neural Architectures using Adversarial Attack Transferability 使用对抗性攻击可转移性的神经架构的相似性 In recent years, many deep neural architectures have been developed for image classification. Whether they are similar or dissimilar and what factors contribute to their (dis)similarities remains curious. To address this question, we aim to design a quantitative and scalable similarity measure between neural architectures. We propose Similarity by Attack Transferability (SAT) from the observation that adversarial attack transferability contains information related to input gradients and decision boundaries widely used to understand model behaviors. We conduct a large-scale analysis on 69 state-of-the-art ImageNet classifiers using our proposed similarity function to answer the question. Moreover, we observe neural architecture-related phenomena using model similarity that model diversity can lead to better performance on model ensembles and knowledge distillation under specific conditions. Our results provide insights into why developing diverse neural architectures with distinct components is necessary. 近年来，许多深度神经架构被开发用于图像分类。它们是否相似或不同，以及哪些因素导致了它们的相似性仍然令人好奇。为了解决这个问题，我们的目标是设计神经架构之间的定量且可扩展的相似性度量。我们根据攻击可转移性（SAT）的观察提出了相似性，即对抗性攻击可转移性包含与广泛用于理解模型行为的输入梯度和决策边界相关的信息。我们使用我们提出的相似性函数对 69 个最先进的 ImageNet 分类器进行了大规模分析来回答这个问题。此外，我们利用模型相似性观察神经架构相关现象，模型多样性可以在特定条件下提高模型集成和知识蒸馏的性能。我们的结果提供了关于为什么需要开发具有不同组件的多样化神经架构的见解。 本文提出一种基于对抗攻击可迁移性的神经网络架构相似性度量方法SAT，并通过大规模实验分析模型多样性对集成学习和知识蒸馏的影响。 Jaehui Hwang,Dongyoon Han,Byeongho Heo,Song Park,Sanghyuk Chun,Jong-Seok Lee cs.LG,cs.CV

title: ProSky: NEAT Meets NOMA-mmWave in the Sky of 6G
title_zh: ProSky：NEAT 在 6G 天空中遇见 NOMA-mmWave
abstract: Rendering to their abilities to provide ubiquitous connectivity, flexibly and cost effectively, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have been getting more and more research attention. To take the UAVs' performance to the next level, however, they need to be merged with some other technologies like non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA) and millimeter wave (mmWave), which both promise high spectral efficiency (SE). As managing UAVs efficiently may not be possible using model-based techniques, another key innovative technology that UAVs will inevitably need to leverage is artificial intelligence (AI). Designing an AI-based technique that adaptively allocates radio resources and places UAVs in 3D space to meet certain communication objectives, however, is a tough row to hoe. In this paper, we propose a neuroevolution of augmenting topologies NEAT framework, referred to as ProSky, to manage NOMA-mmWave-UAV networks. ProSky exhibits a remarkable performance improvement over a model-based method. Moreover, ProSky learns 5.3 times faster than and outperforms, in both SE and energy efficiency EE while being reasonably fair, a deep reinforcement learning DRL based scheme. The ProSky source code is accessible to use here: https://github.com/Fouzibenfaid/ProSky
summary: Rendering to their abilities to provide ubiquitous connectivity, flexibly and cost effectively, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have been getting more and more research attention. To take the UAVs' performance to the next level, however, they need to be merged with some other technologies like non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA) and millimeter wave (mmWave), which both promise high spectral efficiency (SE). As managing UAVs efficiently may not be possible using model-based techniques, another key innovative technology that UAVs will inevitably need to leverage is artificial intelligence (AI). Designing an AI-based technique that adaptively allocates radio resources and places UAVs in 3D space to meet certain communication objectives, however, is a tough row to hoe. In this paper, we propose a neuroevolution of augmenting topologies NEAT framework, referred to as ProSky, to manage NOMA-mmWave-UAV networks. ProSky exhibits a remarkable performance improvement over a model-based method. Moreover, ProSky learns 5.3 times faster than and outperforms, in both SE and energy efficiency EE while being reasonably fair, a deep reinforcement learning DRL based scheme. The ProSky source code is accessible to use here: https://github.com/Fouzibenfaid/ProSky
abstract_zh: 由于无人机 (UAV) 能够灵活、经济高效地提供无处不在的连接，因此受到越来越多的研究关注。然而，为了将无人机的性能提升到一个新的水平，它们需要与非正交多址 (NOMA) 和毫米波 (mmWave) 等其他一些技术相结合，这两种技术都保证了高频谱效率 (SE)。由于使用基于模型的技术可能无法有效管理无人机，因此无人机不可避免地需要利用的另一项关键创新技术是人工智能（AI）。然而，设计一种基于人工智能的技术，自适应地分配无线电资源并将无人机放置在 3D 空间中以满足某些通信目标，是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种增强拓扑神经进化 NEAT 框架（称为 ProSky）来管理 NOMA-mmWave-UAV 网络。与基于模型的方法相比，ProSky 表现出显着的性能改进。此外，在 SE 和能效 EE 方面，ProSky 的学习速度比基于深度强化学习 DRL 的方案快 5.3 倍，并且表现更佳，同时相当公平。 ProSky 源代码可在此处使用：https://github.com/Fouzibenfaid/ProSky

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProSky框架，结合NEAT算法与NOMA-mmWave技术，优化6G无人机网络的资源分配与部署。
AI.motivation: 无人机需融合NOMA、mmWave等技术提升通信效率，但传统模型方法难以高效管理，需依赖AI技术实现自适应优化。
AI.method: 基于神经进化拓扑增强（NEAT）框架设计ProSky，实现三维空间中无人机的自适应资源分配与部署。
AI.result: ProSky较模型方法性能提升显著，学习速度为深度强化学习方案的5.3倍，同时在频谱效率与能耗效率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: ProSky验证了NEAT在6G无人机网络中的有效性，为高效率、高公平性的无线通信提供了新思路。

title: Self-Supervised Learning with Masked Image Modeling for Teeth Numbering, Detection of Dental Restorations, and Instance Segmentation in Dental Panoramic Radiographs
title_zh: 使用蒙版图像建模进行自我监督学习，用于牙齿编号、牙齿修复体检测以及牙科全景 X 光照片中的实例分割
abstract: The computer-assisted radiologic informative report is currently emerging in dental practice to facilitate dental care and reduce time consumption in manual panoramic radiographic interpretation. However, the amount of dental radiographs for training is very limited, particularly from the point of view of deep learning. This study aims to utilize recent self-supervised learning methods like SimMIM and UM-MAE to increase the model efficiency and understanding of the limited number of dental radiographs. We use the Swin Transformer for teeth numbering, detection of dental restorations, and instance segmentation tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study that applied self-supervised learning methods to Swin Transformer on dental panoramic radiographs. Our results show that the SimMIM method obtained the highest performance of 90.4% and 88.9% on detecting teeth and dental restorations and instance segmentation, respectively, increasing the average precision by 13.4 and 12.8 over the random initialization baseline. Moreover, we augment and correct the existing dataset of panoramic radiographs. The code and the dataset are available at https://github.com/AmaniHAlmalki/DentalMIM.
summary: The computer-assisted radiologic informative report is currently emerging in dental practice to facilitate dental care and reduce time consumption in manual panoramic radiographic interpretation. However, the amount of dental radiographs for training is very limited, particularly from the point of view of deep learning. This study aims to utilize recent self-supervised learning methods like SimMIM and UM-MAE to increase the model efficiency and understanding of the limited number of dental radiographs. We use the Swin Transformer for teeth numbering, detection of dental restorations, and instance segmentation tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study that applied self-supervised learning methods to Swin Transformer on dental panoramic radiographs. Our results show that the SimMIM method obtained the highest performance of 90.4% and 88.9% on detecting teeth and dental restorations and instance segmentation, respectively, increasing the average precision by 13.4 and 12.8 over the random initialization baseline. Moreover, we augment and correct the existing dataset of panoramic radiographs. The code and the dataset are available at https://github.com/AmaniHAlmalki/DentalMIM.
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助放射学信息报告目前在牙科实践中兴起，以促进牙科护理并减少手动全景放射学解释的时间消耗。然而，用于训练的牙科射线照片的数量非常有限，特别是从深度学习的角度来看。本研究旨在利用 SimMIM 和 UM-MAE 等最新的自我监督学习方法来提高模型效率和对有限数量的牙科射线照片的理解。我们使用 Swin Transformer 进行牙齿编号、牙齿修复体检测和实例分割任务。据我们所知，这是第一项将自我监督学习方法应用于牙科全景 X 光片上的 Swin Transformer 的研究。我们的结果表明，SimMIM 方法在检测牙齿和牙齿修复体以及实例分割方面分别获得了 90.4% 和 88.9% 的最高性能，平均精度比随机初始化基线提高了 13.4 和 12.8。此外，我们还补充和纠正了现有的全景放射线照片数据集。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/AmaniHAlmalki/DentalMIM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用自监督学习方法（如SimMIM和UM-MAE）结合Swin Transformer模型，在牙科全景X光片中进行牙齿编号、检测牙科修复和实例分割的任务。
AI.motivation: 由于牙科X光片的训练数据有限，传统的深度学习方法在牙科图像分析中效果不佳。因此，本文旨在利用自监督学习方法提升模型在有限数据下的性能。
AI.method: 本文采用SimMIM和UM-MAE等自监督学习方法预训练模型，并使用Swin Transformer进行牙齿编号、检测牙科修复和实例分割任务。同时对现有数据集进行了增强和修正。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SimMIM方法在牙齿检测和牙科修复实例分割任务中分别达到了90.4%和88.9%的性能，平均精度分别提升了13.4和12.8。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将自监督学习方法应用于Swin Transformer模型处理牙科全景X光片，显著提升了模型性能，并提供了代码和数据集以供后续研究使用。

title: Learning Rationalizable Equilibria in Multiplayer Games
title_zh: 在多人游戏中学习合理均衡
abstract: A natural goal in multiagent learning besides finding equilibria is to learn rationalizable behavior, where players learn to avoid iteratively dominated actions. However, even in the basic setting of multiplayer general-sum games, existing algorithms require a number of samples exponential in the number of players to learn rationalizable equilibria under bandit feedback. This paper develops the first line of efficient algorithms for learning rationalizable Coarse Correlated Equilibria (CCE) and Correlated Equilibria (CE) whose sample complexities are polynomial in all problem parameters including the number of players. To achieve this result, we also develop a new efficient algorithm for the simpler task of finding one rationalizable action profile (not necessarily an equilibrium), whose sample complexity substantially improves over the best existing results of Wu et al. (2021). Our algorithms incorporate several novel techniques to guarantee rationalizability and no (swap-)regret simultaneously, including a correlated exploration scheme and adaptive learning rates, which may be of independent interest. We complement our results with a sample complexity lower bound showing the sharpness of our guarantees.

However, even in the basic setting of multiplayer general-sum games, existing algorithms require a number of samples exponential in the number of players to learn rationalizable equilibria under bandit feedback. This paper develops the first line of efficient algorithms for learning rationalizable Coarse Correlated Equilibria (CCE) and Correlated Equilibria (CE) whose sample complexities are polynomial in all problem parameters including the number of players. To achieve this result, we also develop a new efficient algorithm for the simpler task of finding one rationalizable action profile (not necessarily an equilibrium), whose sample complexity substantially improves over the best existing results of Wu et al. (2021). Our algorithms incorporate several novel techniques to guarantee rationalizability and no (swap-)regret simultaneously, including a correlated exploration scheme and adaptive learning rates, which may be of independent interest. We complement our results with a sample complexity lower bound showing the sharpness of our guarantees.
abstract_zh: 除了找到均衡之外，多智能体学习的一个自然目标是学习合理的行为，即玩家学会避免迭代主导的行为。然而，即使在多人一般和博弈的基本设置中，现有算法也需要玩家数量呈指数级的样本数量来学习强盗反馈下的合理均衡。本文开发了第一行有效的算法，用于学习可合理化的粗略相关均衡（CCE）和相关均衡（CE），其样本复杂度在所有问题参数（包括玩家数量）中都是多项式。为了实现这一结果，我们还开发了一种新的有效算法，用于更简单的任务，即找到一个合理的动作配置文件（不一定是平衡），其样本复杂性大大提高了 Wu 等人现有的最佳结果。 （2021）。我们的算法结合了几种新颖的技术来保证合理性和同时不后悔（交换），包括相关的探索方案和自适应学习率，这可能是独立的兴趣。我们用样本复杂性下限来补充我们的结果，显示我们保证的清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多项式样本复杂度的高效算法，用于学习多人博弈中的理性化可化约均衡（CCE/CE）。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在多人博弈中学习理性化均衡需指数级样本量，限制了实际应用，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计相关探索方案与自适应学习率，结合新型算法框架，同时保证理性化与无悔（swap-悔）特性。
AI.result: 实现样本复杂度多项式级的CCE/CE学习算法，显著优于Wu等（2021）结果，并证明样本复杂度下界。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在样本效率上取得突破，相关技术或可推广至其他博弈学习场景，理论下界验证了结果的最优性。

authors_text: Yi Tay,Jason Wei,Hyung Won Chung,Vinh Q. Tran,David R. So,Siamak Shakeri,Xavier Garcia,Huaixiu Steven Zheng,Jinfeng Rao,Aakanksha Chowdhery,Denny Zhou,Donald Metzler,Slav Petrov,Neil Houlsby,Quoc V. Le,Mostafa Dehghani
title: Transcending Scaling Laws with 0.1% Extra Compute
title_zh: 通过 0.1% 的额外计算超越缩放定律
abstract: Scaling language models improves performance but comes with significant computational costs. This paper proposes UL2R, a method that substantially improves existing language models and their scaling curves with a relatively tiny amount of extra compute. The key idea is to continue training a state-of-the-art large language model (e.g., PaLM) on a few more steps with UL2's mixture-of-denoiser objective. We show that, with almost negligible extra computational costs and no new sources of data, we are able to substantially improve the scaling properties of large language models on downstream metrics. In this paper, we continue training PaLM with UL2R, introducing a new set of models at 8B, 62B, and 540B scale which we call U-PaLM. Impressively, at 540B scale, we show an approximately 2x computational savings rate where U-PaLM achieves the same performance as the final PaLM 540B model at around half its computational budget (i.e., saving $\sim$4.4 million TPUv4 hours). We further show that this improved scaling curve leads to 'emergent abilities' on challenging BIG-Bench tasks -- for instance, U-PaLM does much better than PaLM on some tasks or demonstrates better quality at much smaller scale (62B as opposed to 540B). Overall, we show that U-PaLM outperforms PaLM on many few-shot setups, i.e., English NLP tasks (e.g., commonsense reasoning, question answering), reasoning tasks with chain-of-thought (e.g., GSM8K), multilingual tasks (MGSM, TydiQA), MMLU and challenging BIG-Bench tasks. Finally, we provide qualitative examples showing the new capabilities of U-PaLM for single and multi-span infilling.
summary: Scaling language models improves performance but comes with significant computational costs. This paper proposes UL2R, a method that substantially improves existing language models and their scaling curves with a relatively tiny amount of extra compute. The key idea is to continue training a state-of-the-art large language model (e.g., PaLM) on a few more steps with UL2's mixture-of-denoiser objective. We show that, with almost negligible extra computational costs and no new sources of data, we are able to substantially improve the scaling properties of large language models on downstream metrics. In this paper, we continue training PaLM with UL2R, introducing a new set of models at 8B, 62B, and 540B scale which we call U-PaLM. Impressively, at 540B scale, we show an approximately 2x computational savings rate where U-PaLM achieves the same performance as the final PaLM 540B model at around half its computational budget (i.e., saving $\sim$4.4 million TPUv4 hours). We further show that this improved scaling curve leads to 'emergent abilities' on challenging BIG-Bench tasks -- for instance, U-PaLM does much better than PaLM on some tasks or demonstrates better quality at much smaller scale (62B as opposed to 540B). Overall, we show that U-PaLM outperforms PaLM on many few-shot setups, i.e., English NLP tasks (e.g., commonsense reasoning, question answering), reasoning tasks with chain-of-thought (e.g., GSM8K), multilingual tasks (MGSM, TydiQA), MMLU and challenging BIG-Bench tasks. Finally, we provide qualitative examples showing the new capabilities of U-PaLM for single and multi-span infilling.
abstract_zh: 扩展语言模型可以提高性能，但会带来巨大的计算成本。本文提出了 UL2R，这是一种通过相对少量的额外计算来显着改进现有语言模型及其缩放曲线的方法。关键思想是利用 UL2 的混合降噪器目标，通过更多步骤继续训练最先进的大型语言模型（例如 PaLM）。我们表明，在几乎可以忽略不计的额外计算成本并且没有新的数据源的情况下，我们能够显着改善大型语言模型在下游指标上的扩展特性。在本文中，我们继续使用 UL2R 训练 PaLM，引入一组 8B、62B 和 540B 规模的新模型，我们称之为 U-PaLM。令人印象深刻的是，在 540B 规模下，我们展示了大约 2 倍的计算节省率，其中 U-PaLM 以大约一半的计算预算实现了与最终 PaLM 540B 模型相同的性能（即节省了 440 万美元的 TPUv4 小时）。我们进一步表明，这种改进的缩放曲线可以在具有挑战性的 BIG-Bench 任务中带来“新兴能力”——例如，U-PaLM 在某些任务上比 PaLM 表现更好，或者在更小的规模（62B 与 540B）下表现出更好的质量。总体而言，我们表明 U-PaLM 在许多小样本设置上优于 PaLM，即英语 NLP 任务（例如常识推理、问答）、具有思想链的推理任务（例如 GSM8K）、多语言任务（MGSM、TydiQA）、MMLU 和具有挑战性的 BIG-Bench 任务。最后，我们提供了定性示例，展示了 U-PaLM 在单跨度和多跨度填充方面的新功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UL2R方法，通过极少量额外计算资源显著提升大语言模型性能，无需新增数据。
AI.motivation: 扩展语言模型虽有效但成本高昂，需探索以极低计算开销提升模型性能的新方法。
AI.method: 在现有大模型（如PaLM）基础上，使用UL2的混合去噪器目标进行少量步数的继续训练，无需新增数据。
AI.result: U-PaLM在540B规模下节省约440万TPUv4小时计算成本，且在BIG-Bench、MMLU等任务中优于原PaLM模型，部分任务62B规模即可超越540B版本。
AI.conclusion: UL2R方法验证了通过优化训练目标可高效提升模型性能，为大模型扩展提供了计算成本更低的解决方案。

title: Deep reinforcement learning oriented for real world dynamic scenarios
title_zh: 面向现实世界动态场景的深度强化学习
comment: Perception and Navigation for Autonomous Robotics in Unstructured and Dynamic Environments (PNARUDE) workshop in IROS 2022
comments: Perception and Navigation for Autonomous Robotics in Unstructured and Dynamic Environments (PNARUDE) workshop in IROS 2022
abstract: Autonomous navigation in dynamic environments is a complex but essential task for autonomous robots. Recent deep reinforcement learning approaches show promising results to solve the problem, but it is not solved yet, as they typically assume no robot kinodynamic restrictions, holonomic movement or perfect environment knowledge. Moreover, most algorithms fail in the real world due to the inability to generate real-world training data for the huge variability of possible scenarios. In this work, we present a novel planner, DQN-DOVS, that uses deep reinforcement learning on a descriptive robocentric velocity space model to navigate in highly dynamic environments. It is trained using a smart curriculum learning approach on a simulator that faithfully reproduces the real world, reducing the gap between the reality and simulation. We test the resulting algorithm in scenarios with different number of obstacles and compare it with many state-of-the-art approaches, obtaining a better performance. Finally, we try the algorithm in a ground robot, using the same setup as in the simulation experiments.
summary: Autonomous navigation in dynamic environments is a complex but essential task for autonomous robots. Recent deep reinforcement learning approaches show promising results to solve the problem, but it is not solved yet, as they typically assume no robot kinodynamic restrictions, holonomic movement or perfect environment knowledge. Moreover, most algorithms fail in the real world due to the inability to generate real-world training data for the huge variability of possible scenarios. In this work, we present a novel planner, DQN-DOVS, that uses deep reinforcement learning on a descriptive robocentric velocity space model to navigate in highly dynamic environments. It is trained using a smart curriculum learning approach on a simulator that faithfully reproduces the real world, reducing the gap between the reality and simulation. We test the resulting algorithm in scenarios with different number of obstacles and compare it with many state-of-the-art approaches, obtaining a better performance. Finally, we try the algorithm in a ground robot, using the same setup as in the simulation experiments.
abstract_zh: 动态环境中的自主导航对于自主机器人来说是一项复杂但重要的任务。最近的深度强化学习方法显示出解决该问题的有希望的结果，但该问题尚未得到解决，因为它们通常假设没有机器人运动动力学限制、完整运动或完美的环境知识。此外，大多数算法在现实世界中都会失败，因为无法为可能场景的巨大变化生成现实世界的训练数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的规划器 DQN-DOVS，它在描述性以机器人为中心的速度空间模型上使用深度强化学习来在高度动态的环境中导航。它在模拟器上使用智能课程学习方法进行训练，忠实地再现现实世界，缩小现实与模拟之间的差距。我们在具有不同障碍物数量的场景中测试所得算法，并将其与许多最先进的方法进行比较，获得更好的性能。最后，我们使用与模拟实验中相同的设置在地面机器人中尝试该算法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用深度强化学习解决动态环境中的自主导航问题，提出新型规划器DQN-DOVS以应对现实世界挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法因忽略机器人运动学限制、依赖理想化环境假设及缺乏真实场景训练数据，在动态现实环境中表现不足。
AI.method: 设计基于机器人中心速度空间模型的DQN-DOVS算法，结合智能课程学习策略在高保真模拟器中训练，缩小仿真与现实差距。
AI.result: 算法在多障碍物场景中优于现有方法，且成功移植至地面机器人验证，证明其现实可行性。
AI.conclusion: DQN-DOVS通过模拟训练与现实测试验证，有效提升了动态环境下的自主导航性能，为现实应用提供新方案。

search_text: Deep reinforcement learning oriented for real world dynamic scenarios 面向现实世界动态场景的深度强化学习 Autonomous navigation in dynamic environments is a complex but essential task for autonomous robots. Recent deep reinforcement learning approaches show promising results to solve the problem, but it is not solved yet, as they typically assume no robot kinodynamic restrictions, holonomic movement or perfect environment knowledge. Moreover, most algorithms fail in the real world due to the inability to generate real-world training data for the huge variability of possible scenarios. In this work, we present a novel planner, DQN-DOVS, that uses deep reinforcement learning on a descriptive robocentric velocity space model to navigate in highly dynamic environments. It is trained using a smart curriculum learning approach on a simulator that faithfully reproduces the real world, reducing the gap between the reality and simulation. We test the resulting algorithm in scenarios with different number of obstacles and compare it with many state-of-the-art approaches, obtaining a better performance. Finally, we try the algorithm in a ground robot, using the same setup as in the simulation experiments. 动态环境中的自主导航对于自主机器人来说是一项复杂但重要的任务。最近的深度强化学习方法显示出解决该问题的有希望的结果，但该问题尚未得到解决，因为它们通常假设没有机器人运动动力学限制、完整运动或完美的环境知识。此外，大多数算法在现实世界中都会失败，因为无法为可能场景的巨大变化生成现实世界的训练数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的规划器 DQN-DOVS，它在描述性以机器人为中心的速度空间模型上使用深度强化学习来在高度动态的环境中导航。它在模拟器上使用智能课程学习方法进行训练，忠实地再现现实世界，缩小现实与模拟之间的差距。我们在具有不同障碍物数量的场景中测试所得算法，并将其与许多最先进的方法进行比较，获得更好的性能。最后，我们使用与模拟实验中相同的设置在地面机器人中尝试该算法。 本文旨在利用深度强化学习解决动态环境中的自主导航问题，提出新型规划器DQN-DOVS以应对现实世界挑战。 Diego Martinez,Luis Riazuelo,Luis Montano cs.RO

authors_text: David Osowiechi,Gustavo A. Vargas Hakim,Mehrdad Noori,Milad Cheraghalikhani,Ismail Ben Ayed,Christian Desrosiers
title: TTTFlow: Unsupervised Test-Time Training with Normalizing Flow
title_zh: TTTFlow：具有标准化流程的无监督测试时间训练
abstract: A major problem of deep neural networks for image classification is their vulnerability to domain changes at test-time. Recent methods have proposed to address this problem with test-time training (TTT), where a two-branch model is trained to learn a main classification task and also a self-supervised task used to perform test-time adaptation. However, these techniques require defining a proxy task specific to the target application. To tackle this limitation, we propose TTTFlow: a Y-shaped architecture using an unsupervised head based on Normalizing Flows to learn the normal distribution of latent features and detect domain shifts in test examples. At inference, keeping the unsupervised head fixed, we adapt the model to domain-shifted examples by maximizing the log likelihood of the Normalizing Flow. Our results show that our method can significantly improve the accuracy with respect to previous works.
summary: A major problem of deep neural networks for image classification is their vulnerability to domain changes at test-time. Recent methods have proposed to address this problem with test-time training (TTT), where a two-branch model is trained to learn a main classification task and also a self-supervised task used to perform test-time adaptation. However, these techniques require defining a proxy task specific to the target application. To tackle this limitation, we propose TTTFlow: a Y-shaped architecture using an unsupervised head based on Normalizing Flows to learn the normal distribution of latent features and detect domain shifts in test examples. At inference, keeping the unsupervised head fixed, we adapt the model to domain-shifted examples by maximizing the log likelihood of the Normalizing Flow. Our results show that our method can significantly improve the accuracy with respect to previous works.
abstract_zh: 用于图像分类的深度神经网络的一个主要问题是它们在测试时容易受到域变化的影响。最近的方法提出通过测试时训练（TTT）来解决这个问题，其中训练两分支模型来学习主要分类任务以及用于执行测试时适应的自监督任务。然而，这些技术需要定义特定于目标应用程序的代理任务。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 TTTFlow：一种 Y 形架构，使用基于归一化流的无监督头来学习潜在特征的正态分布并检测测试示例中的域移位。在推理时，保持无监督头固定，我们通过最大化归一化流的对数似然来使模型适应域转移的示例。我们的结果表明，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法可以显着提高准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TTTFlow方法，通过无监督的归一化流模型解决图像分类模型在测试时领域变化的适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时训练方法需要为每个目标领域设计特定的代理任务，限制了方法的通用性与适用性。
AI.method: 构建Y型网络结构，使用归一化流作为无监督分支学习潜在特征分布，通过最大化测试样本的对数似然实现领域偏移检测与模型自适应。
AI.result: 实验表明TTTFlow在多个领域偏移场景下显著优于现有测试时训练方法，提升分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: TTTFlow通过无监督归一化流实现了无需领域特定任务的通用测试时适应，为模型鲁棒性提升提供了新思路。

authors: et al. (1 additional authors not shown)
authors_json: et al. (1 additional authors not shown)
authors_text: Chen Qian,Haoyu Zhang,Yuncheng Gao,Mingyang Han,Zi Wang,Dan Ruan,Yu Shen,Yaping Wu,Yirong Zhou,Chengyan Wang,Boyu Jiang,Ran Tao,Zhigang Wu,Jiazheng Wang,Liuhong Zhu,Yi Guo,Taishan Kang,Jianzhong Lin,Tao Gong,Chen Yang,Guoqiang Fei,Meijin Lin,Di Guo,Jianjun Zhou,Meiyun Wang, et al. (1 additional authors not shown)
title: Physics-informed Deep Diffusion MRI Reconstruction with Synthetic Data: Break Training Data Bottleneck in Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 利用合成数据进行基于物理的深度扩散 MRI 重建：打破人工智能中的训练数据瓶颈
abstract: Diffusion magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is the only imaging modality for non-invasive movement detection of in vivo water molecules, with significant clinical and research applications. Diffusion weighted imaging (DWI) MRI acquired by multi-shot techniques can achieve higher resolution, better signal-to-noise ratio, and lower geometric distortion than single-shot, but suffers from inter-shot motion-induced artifacts. These artifacts cannot be removed prospectively, leading to the absence of artifact-free training labels. Thus, the potential of deep learning in multi-shot DWI reconstruction remains largely untapped. To break the training data bottleneck, here, we propose a Physics-Informed Deep DWI reconstruction method (PIDD) to synthesize high-quality paired training data by leveraging the physical diffusion model (magnitude synthesis) and inter-shot motion-induced phase model (motion phase synthesis). The network is trained only once with 100,000 synthetic samples, achieving encouraging results on multiple realistic in vivo data reconstructions. Advantages over conventional methods include: (a) Better motion artifact suppression and reconstruction stability; (b) Outstanding generalization to multi-scenario reconstructions, including multi-resolution, multi-b-value, multi-under-sampling, multi-vendor, and multi-center; (c) Excellent clinical adaptability to patients with verifications by seven experienced doctors (p<0.001). In conclusion, PIDD presents a novel deep learning framework by exploiting the power of MRI physics, providing a cost-effective and explainable way to break the data bottleneck in deep learning medical imaging.
summary: Diffusion magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is the only imaging modality for non-invasive movement detection of in vivo water molecules, with significant clinical and research applications. Diffusion weighted imaging (DWI) MRI acquired by multi-shot techniques can achieve higher resolution, better signal-to-noise ratio, and lower geometric distortion than single-shot, but suffers from inter-shot motion-induced artifacts. These artifacts cannot be removed prospectively, leading to the absence of artifact-free training labels. Thus, the potential of deep learning in multi-shot DWI reconstruction remains largely untapped. To break the training data bottleneck, here, we propose a Physics-Informed Deep DWI reconstruction method (PIDD) to synthesize high-quality paired training data by leveraging the physical diffusion model (magnitude synthesis) and inter-shot motion-induced phase model (motion phase synthesis). The network is trained only once with 100,000 synthetic samples, achieving encouraging results on multiple realistic in vivo data reconstructions. Advantages over conventional methods include: (a) Better motion artifact suppression and reconstruction stability; (b) Outstanding generalization to multi-scenario reconstructions, including multi-resolution, multi-b-value, multi-under-sampling, multi-vendor, and multi-center; (c) Excellent clinical adaptability to patients with verifications by seven experienced doctors (p<0.001). In conclusion, PIDD presents a novel deep learning framework by exploiting the power of MRI physics, providing a cost-effective and explainable way to break the data bottleneck in deep learning medical imaging.
abstract_zh: 扩散磁共振成像（MRI）是唯一用于非侵入性检测体内水分子运动的成像方式，具有重要的临床和研究应用。与单次拍摄相比，通过多次拍摄技术获得的扩散加权成像 (DWI) MRI 可以获得更高的分辨率、更好的信噪比和更低的几何失真，但会受到拍摄间运动引起的伪影的影响。这些伪影无法前瞻性地删除，导致缺乏无伪影的训练标签。因此，深度学习在多镜头 DWI 重建中的潜力在很大程度上尚未开发。为了打破训练数据瓶颈，我们在这里提出了一种基于物理的深度 DWI 重建方法（PIDD），通过利用物理扩散模型（幅度合成）和镜头间运动引起的相位模型（运动相位合成）来合成高质量的配对训练数据。该网络仅使用 100,000 个合成样本进行一次训练，在多个真实的体内数据重建上取得了令人鼓舞的结果。相对于传统方法的优点包括： (a) 更好的运动伪影抑制和重建稳定性； (b) 出色的多场景重建泛化能力，包括多分辨率、多b值、多欠采样、多供应商和多中心； (c) 经七位经验丰富的医生验证，对患者具有良好的临床适应性（p<0.001）。总之，PIDD 通过利用 MRI 物理学的力量提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架，为打破深度学习医学成像的数据瓶颈提供了一种经济有效且可解释的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的深度学习方法（PIDD），通过合成高质量训练数据解决多 shot 扩散加权成像（DWI）重建中的数据瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 多 shot DWI 重建因运动伪影缺乏无伪影训练标签，导致深度学习潜力未被充分挖掘，亟需突破数据瓶颈。
AI.method: 结合扩散物理模型（幅度合成）和射间运动相位模型（运动相位合成），生成10万对合成训练数据，训练深度网络实现重建。
AI.result: 在多种真实体内数据上表现优异，具有更强的运动伪影抑制能力、跨场景泛化性及临床适应性（7位医生验证p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: PIDD 框架通过融合MRI物理规律，为医学影像深度学习提供了一种低成本、可解释的数据瓶颈突破方案。

method: 结合扩散物理模型（幅度合成）和射间运动相位模型（运动相位合成），生成10万对合成训练数据，训练深度网络实现重建。

conclusion: PIDD 框架通过融合MRI物理规律，为医学影像深度学习提供了一种低成本、可解释的数据瓶颈突破方案。
search_text: Physics-informed Deep Diffusion MRI Reconstruction with Synthetic Data: Break Training Data Bottleneck in Artificial Intelligence 利用合成数据进行基于物理的深度扩散 MRI 重建：打破人工智能中的训练数据瓶颈 Diffusion magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is the only imaging modality for non-invasive movement detection of in vivo water molecules, with significant clinical and research applications. Diffusion weighted imaging (DWI) MRI acquired by multi-shot techniques can achieve higher resolution, better signal-to-noise ratio, and lower geometric distortion than single-shot, but suffers from inter-shot motion-induced artifacts. These artifacts cannot be removed prospectively, leading to the absence of artifact-free training labels. Thus, the potential of deep learning in multi-shot DWI reconstruction remains largely untapped. To break the training data bottleneck, here, we propose a Physics-Informed Deep DWI reconstruction method (PIDD) to synthesize high-quality paired training data by leveraging the physical diffusion model (magnitude synthesis) and inter-shot motion-induced phase model (motion phase synthesis). The network is trained only once with 100,000 synthetic samples, achieving encouraging results on multiple realistic in vivo data reconstructions. Advantages over conventional methods include: (a) Better motion artifact suppression and reconstruction stability; (b) Outstanding generalization to multi-scenario reconstructions, including multi-resolution, multi-b-value, multi-under-sampling, multi-vendor, and multi-center; (c) Excellent clinical adaptability to patients with verifications by seven experienced doctors (p<0.001). In conclusion, PIDD presents a novel deep learning framework by exploiting the power of MRI physics, providing a cost-effective and explainable way to break the data bottleneck in deep learning medical imaging. 扩散磁共振成像（MRI）是唯一用于非侵入性检测体内水分子运动的成像方式，具有重要的临床和研究应用。与单次拍摄相比，通过多次拍摄技术获得的扩散加权成像 (DWI) MRI 可以获得更高的分辨率、更好的信噪比和更低的几何失真，但会受到拍摄间运动引起的伪影的影响。这些伪影无法前瞻性地删除，导致缺乏无伪影的训练标签。因此，深度学习在多镜头 DWI 重建中的潜力在很大程度上尚未开发。为了打破训练数据瓶颈，我们在这里提出了一种基于物理的深度 DWI 重建方法（PIDD），通过利用物理扩散模型（幅度合成）和镜头间运动引起的相位模型（运动相位合成）来合成高质量的配对训练数据。该网络仅使用 100,000 个合成样本进行一次训练，在多个真实的体内数据重建上取得了令人鼓舞的结果。相对于传统方法的优点包括： (a) 更好的运动伪影抑制和重建稳定性； (b) 出色的多场景重建泛化能力，包括多分辨率、多b值、多欠采样、多供应商和多中心； (c) 经七位经验丰富的医生验证，对患者具有良好的临床适应性（p<0.001）。总之，PIDD 通过利用 MRI 物理学的力量提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架，为打破深度学习医学成像的数据瓶颈提供了一种经济有效且可解释的方法。 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的深度学习方法（PIDD），通过合成高质量训练数据解决多 shot 扩散加权成像（DWI）重建中的数据瓶颈问题。 Chen Qian,Haoyu Zhang,Yuncheng Gao,Mingyang Han,Zi Wang,Dan Ruan,Yu Shen,Yaping Wu,Yirong Zhou,Chengyan Wang,Boyu Jiang,Ran Tao,Zhigang Wu,Jiazheng Wang,Liuhong Zhu,Yi Guo,Taishan Kang,Jianzhong Lin,Tao Gong,Chen Yang,Guoqiang Fei,Meijin Lin,Di Guo,Jianjun Zhou,Meiyun Wang, et al. (1 additional authors not shown) eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Transformer-based Action recognition in hand-object interacting scenarios
title_zh: 手部物体交互场景中基于 Transformer 的动作识别
abstract: This report describes the 2nd place solution to the ECCV 2022 Human Body, Hands, and Activities (HBHA) from Egocentric and Multi-view Cameras Challenge: Action Recognition. This challenge aims to recognize hand-object interaction in an egocentric view. We propose a framework that estimates keypoints of two hands and an object with a Transformer-based keypoint estimator and recognizes actions based on the estimated keypoints. We achieved a top-1 accuracy of 87.19% on the testset.
summary: This report describes the 2nd place solution to the ECCV 2022 Human Body, Hands, and Activities (HBHA) from Egocentric and Multi-view Cameras Challenge: Action Recognition. This challenge aims to recognize hand-object interaction in an egocentric view. We propose a framework that estimates keypoints of two hands and an object with a Transformer-based keypoint estimator and recognizes actions based on the estimated keypoints. We achieved a top-1 accuracy of 87.19% on the testset.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了 ECCV 2022 人体、手和活动 (HBHA) 中自我中心和多视角相机挑战赛第二名的解决方案：动作识别。该挑战旨在从自我中心的角度认识手与物体的交互。我们提出了一个框架，使用基于 Transformer 的关键点估计器来估计两只手和一个物体的关键点，并根据估计的关键点识别动作。我们在测试集上实现了 87.19% 的 top-1 准确率。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Transformer模型的手部-物体交互动作识别方法，在ECCV 2022挑战赛中取得第二名成绩。
AI.motivation: 解决第一人称视角下复杂手部-物体交互动作识别难题，提升关键点估计与动作分类的准确性。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构估计双手及物体关键点，基于估计结果进行动作识别，结合时空特征建模。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到87.19%的top-1准确率，位列ECCV 2022 HBHA挑战赛亚军。
AI.conclusion: Transformer关键点估计框架有效提升了手部交互动作识别性能，为相关研究提供新思路。
