title: On Representations of Mean-Field Variational Inference
title_zh: 关于平均场变分推理的表示
abstract: The mean field variational inference (MFVI) formulation restricts the general Bayesian inference problem to the subspace of product measures. We present a framework to analyze MFVI algorithms, which is inspired by a similar development for general variational Bayesian formulations. Our approach enables the MFVI problem to be represented in three different manners: a gradient flow on Wasserstein space, a system of Fokker-Planck-like equations and a diffusion process. Rigorous guarantees are established to show that a time-discretized implementation of the coordinate ascent variational inference algorithm in the product Wasserstein space of measures yields a gradient flow in the limit. A similar result is obtained for their associated densities, with the limit being given by a quasi-linear partial differential equation. A popular class of practical algorithms falls in this framework, which provides tools to establish convergence. We hope this framework could be used to guarantee convergence of algorithms in a variety of approaches, old and new, to solve variational inference problems.
summary: The mean field variational inference (MFVI) formulation restricts the general Bayesian inference problem to the subspace of product measures. We present a framework to analyze MFVI algorithms, which is inspired by a similar development for general variational Bayesian formulations. Our approach enables the MFVI problem to be represented in three different manners: a gradient flow on Wasserstein space, a system of Fokker-Planck-like equations and a diffusion process. Rigorous guarantees are established to show that a time-discretized implementation of the coordinate ascent variational inference algorithm in the product Wasserstein space of measures yields a gradient flow in the limit. A similar result is obtained for their associated densities, with the limit being given by a quasi-linear partial differential equation. A popular class of practical algorithms falls in this framework, which provides tools to establish convergence. We hope this framework could be used to guarantee convergence of algorithms in a variety of approaches, old and new, to solve variational inference problems.
abstract_zh: 平均场变分推理 (MFVI) 公式将一般贝叶斯推理问题限制在乘积测度的子空间中。我们提出了一个分析 MFVI 算法的框架，该框架受到一般变分贝叶斯公式的类似开发的启发。我们的方法使 MFVI 问题能够以三种不同的方式表示：Wasserstein 空间上的梯度流、类 Fokker-Planck 方程组和扩散过程。严格的保证表明，在测量的乘积 Wasserstein 空间中坐标上升变分推理算法的时间离散实现会产生极限内的梯度流。对于它们的相关密度，得到了类似的结果，其极限由拟线性偏微分方程给出。一类流行的实用算法属于该框架，它提供了建立收敛的工具。我们希望这个框架可以用来保证各种新旧方法算法的收敛，以解决变分推理问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分析平均场变分推断（MFVI）算法的框架，通过三种数学表示（梯度流、福克-普朗克方程、扩散过程）研究其收敛性。
AI.motivation: MFVI作为贝叶斯推断的重要方法，缺乏严格的收敛性分析，需建立统一框架以保证算法收敛性。
AI.method: 将MFVI问题转化为Wasserstein空间的梯度流、类似福克-普朗克方程的系统及扩散过程，并通过时间离散化方法证明收敛性。
AI.result: 证明坐标上升算法在乘积Wasserstein空间中收敛于梯度流，密度极限满足拟线性偏微分方程，框架适用于多种实用算法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分析变分推断算法收敛性提供理论工具，可能促进新算法设计与旧方法改进。

authors_text: Hoseong Cho,Donguk Kim,Chanwoo Kim,Seongyeong Lee,Seungryul Baek
title: Transformer-based Global 3D Hand Pose Estimation in Two Hands Manipulating Objects Scenarios
title_zh: 两只手操作物体场景中基于 Transformer 的全局 3D 手部姿势估计
abstract: This report describes our 1st place solution to ECCV 2022 challenge on Human Body, Hands, and Activities (HBHA) from Egocentric and Multi-view Cameras (hand pose estimation). In this challenge, we aim to estimate global 3D hand poses from the input image where two hands and an object are interacting on the egocentric viewpoint. Our proposed method performs end-to-end multi-hand pose estimation via transformer architecture. In particular, our method robustly estimates hand poses in a scenario where two hands interact. Additionally, we propose an algorithm that considers hand scales to robustly estimate the absolute depth. The proposed algorithm works well even when the hand sizes are various for each person. Our method attains 14.4 mm (left) and 15.9 mm (right) errors for each hand in the test set.
summary: This report describes our 1st place solution to ECCV 2022 challenge on Human Body, Hands, and Activities (HBHA) from Egocentric and Multi-view Cameras (hand pose estimation). In this challenge, we aim to estimate global 3D hand poses from the input image where two hands and an object are interacting on the egocentric viewpoint. Our proposed method performs end-to-end multi-hand pose estimation via transformer architecture. In particular, our method robustly estimates hand poses in a scenario where two hands interact. Additionally, we propose an algorithm that considers hand scales to robustly estimate the absolute depth. The proposed algorithm works well even when the hand sizes are various for each person. Our method attains 14.4 mm (left) and 15.9 mm (right) errors for each hand in the test set.
abstract_zh: 本报告描述了我们通过自我中心和多视图相机（手部姿势估计）应对 ECCV 2022 人体、手部和活动 (HBHA) 挑战的第一名解决方案。在本次挑战中，我们的目标是从输入图像中估计全局 3D 手部姿势，其中两只手和一个物体在以自我为中心的视点上进行交互。我们提出的方法通过变压器架构执行端到端多手姿势估计。特别是，我们的方法可以稳健地估计两只手交互的场景中的手部姿势。此外，我们提出了一种考虑手部尺度的算法来稳健地估计绝对深度。即使每个人的手的大小不同，所提出的算法也能很好地工作。我们的方法在测试集中每只手的误差为 14.4 毫米（左）和 15.9 毫米（右）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端方法，用于估计第一人称视角下两只手操作物体时的全局3D手部姿态。
AI.motivation: 在第一人称视角下，两只手与物体的交互场景中，现有方法难以准确估计双手的全局3D姿态及绝对深度，尤其当手部尺寸差异较大时。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构实现端到端多手姿态估计，通过考虑手部尺度差异的算法提升绝对深度估计鲁棒性，适应不同尺寸手部的交互场景。
AI.result: 在测试集上，左手和右手的平均误差分别为14.4毫米和15.9毫米，取得ECCV 2022 HBHA挑战赛第一名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了双手法交互与尺度差异带来的挑战，验证了Transformer在复杂手部姿态估计任务中的优越性。

search_text: Transformer-based Global 3D Hand Pose Estimation in Two Hands Manipulating Objects Scenarios 两只手操作物体场景中基于 Transformer 的全局 3D 手部姿势估计 This report describes our 1st place solution to ECCV 2022 challenge on Human Body, Hands, and Activities (HBHA) from Egocentric and Multi-view Cameras (hand pose estimation). In this challenge, we aim to estimate global 3D hand poses from the input image where two hands and an object are interacting on the egocentric viewpoint. Our proposed method performs end-to-end multi-hand pose estimation via transformer architecture. In particular, our method robustly estimates hand poses in a scenario where two hands interact. Additionally, we propose an algorithm that considers hand scales to robustly estimate the absolute depth. The proposed algorithm works well even when the hand sizes are various for each person. Our method attains 14.4 mm (left) and 15.9 mm (right) errors for each hand in the test set. 本报告描述了我们通过自我中心和多视图相机（手部姿势估计）应对 ECCV 2022 人体、手部和活动 (HBHA) 挑战的第一名解决方案。在本次挑战中，我们的目标是从输入图像中估计全局 3D 手部姿势，其中两只手和一个物体在以自我为中心的视点上进行交互。我们提出的方法通过变压器架构执行端到端多手姿势估计。特别是，我们的方法可以稳健地估计两只手交互的场景中的手部姿势。此外，我们提出了一种考虑手部尺度的算法来稳健地估计绝对深度。即使每个人的手的大小不同，所提出的算法也能很好地工作。我们的方法在测试集中每只手的误差为 14.4 毫米（左）和 15.9 毫米（右）。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端方法，用于估计第一人称视角下两只手操作物体时的全局3D手部姿态。 Hoseong Cho,Donguk Kim,Chanwoo Kim,Seongyeong Lee,Seungryul Baek cs.CV

authors_text: Pavel Izmailov,Polina Kirichenko,Nate Gruver,Andrew Gordon Wilson
title: On Feature Learning in the Presence of Spurious Correlations
title_zh: 存在虚假相关性时的特征学习
abstract: Deep classifiers are known to rely on spurious features $\unicode{x2013}$ patterns which are correlated with the target on the training data but not inherently relevant to the learning problem, such as the image backgrounds when classifying the foregrounds. In this paper we evaluate the amount of information about the core (non-spurious) features that can be decoded from the representations learned by standard empirical risk minimization (ERM) and specialized group robustness training. Following recent work on Deep Feature Reweighting (DFR), we evaluate the feature representations by re-training the last layer of the model on a held-out set where the spurious correlation is broken. On multiple vision and NLP problems, we show that the features learned by simple ERM are highly competitive with the features learned by specialized group robustness methods targeted at reducing the effect of spurious correlations. Moreover, we show that the quality of learned feature representations is greatly affected by the design decisions beyond the training method, such as the model architecture and pre-training strategy. On the other hand, we find that strong regularization is not necessary for learning high quality feature representations. Finally, using insights from our analysis, we significantly improve upon the best results reported in the literature on the popular Waterbirds, CelebA hair color prediction and WILDS-FMOW problems, achieving 97%, 92% and 50% worst-group accuracies, respectively.
summary: Deep classifiers are known to rely on spurious features $\unicode{x2013}$ patterns which are correlated with the target on the training data but not inherently relevant to the learning problem, such as the image backgrounds when classifying the foregrounds. In this paper we evaluate the amount of information about the core (non-spurious) features that can be decoded from the representations learned by standard empirical risk minimization (ERM) and specialized group robustness training. Following recent work on Deep Feature Reweighting (DFR), we evaluate the feature representations by re-training the last layer of the model on a held-out set where the spurious correlation is broken. On multiple vision and NLP problems, we show that the features learned by simple ERM are highly competitive with the features learned by specialized group robustness methods targeted at reducing the effect of spurious correlations. Moreover, we show that the quality of learned feature representations is greatly affected by the design decisions beyond the training method, such as the model architecture and pre-training strategy. On the other hand, we find that strong regularization is not necessary for learning high quality feature representations. Finally, using insights from our analysis, we significantly improve upon the best results reported in the literature on the popular Waterbirds, CelebA hair color prediction and WILDS-FMOW problems, achieving 97%, 92% and 50% worst-group accuracies, respectively.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度分类器依赖于虚假特征 $\unicode{x2013}$ 模式，这些模式与训练数据上的目标相关，但与学习问题本质上不相关，例如对前景进行分类时的图像背景。在本文中，我们评估了有关核心（非虚假）特征的信息量，这些特征可以从标准经验风险最小化（ERM）和专门的群体鲁棒性训练学习到的表示中解码。继最近的深度特征重加权（DFR）工作之后，我们通过在虚假相关性被打破的保留集上重新训练模型的最后一层来评估特征表示。在多视觉和 NLP 问题上，我们表明，通过简单的 ERM 学习到的特征与通过专门的群体鲁棒性方法学习到的特征具有很强的竞争力，该方法旨在减少虚假相关性的影响。此外，我们表明，学习的特征表示的质量很大程度上受到训练方法之外的设计决策的影响，例如模型架构和预训练策略。另一方面，我们发现强正则化对于学习高质量的特征表示并不是必需的。最后，利用我们分析中的见解，我们显着改进了文献中报告的有关流行水鸟、CelebA 头发颜色预测和 WILDS-FMOW 问题的最佳结果，分别实现了 97%、92% 和 50% 最差组的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了标准经验风险最小化（ERM）和专门的群体鲁棒性训练方法在存在虚假相关性时学习到的核心特征信息量，并通过重新训练模型最后一层来验证特征表示的有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度分类器容易依赖训练数据中的虚假特征（如图像背景），这些特征与目标相关但与学习任务无关。研究旨在探讨不同训练方法在减少虚假相关性影响方面的效果。
AI.method: 基于深度特征重加权（DFR）方法，在保留集（打破虚假相关性）上重新训练模型最后一层，对比ERM与群体鲁棒性方法在多任务中的特征表示能力，并分析模型架构、预训练策略等设计决策的影响。
AI.result: ERM学习到的特征与专门群体鲁棒性方法表现相当，且特征质量受模型设计影响显著；强正则化并非必要。在Waterbirds、CelebA和WILDS-FMOW数据集上分别达到97%、92%和50%的最差组准确率。
AI.conclusion: ERM在存在虚假相关性时仍能学习高质量特征，模型设计决策比训练方法更关键，且无需强正则化。通过分析改进方法显著提升了多个基准任务的最差组性能。

authors_text: Gabriele Campanella,Lucas Kook,Ida Häggström,Torsten Hothorn,Thomas J. Fuchs
title: Deep conditional transformation models for survival analysis
title_zh: 用于生存分析的深度条件转换模型
abstract: An every increasing number of clinical trials features a time-to-event outcome and records non-tabular patient data, such as magnetic resonance imaging or text data in the form of electronic health records. Recently, several neural-network based solutions have been proposed, some of which are binary classifiers. Parametric, distribution-free approaches which make full use of survival time and censoring status have not received much attention. We present deep conditional transformation models (DCTMs) for survival outcomes as a unifying approach to parametric and semiparametric survival analysis. DCTMs allow the specification of non-linear and non-proportional hazards for both tabular and non-tabular data and extend to all types of censoring and truncation. On real and semi-synthetic data, we show that DCTMs compete with state-of-the-art DL approaches to survival analysis.
summary: An every increasing number of clinical trials features a time-to-event outcome and records non-tabular patient data, such as magnetic resonance imaging or text data in the form of electronic health records. Recently, several neural-network based solutions have been proposed, some of which are binary classifiers. Parametric, distribution-free approaches which make full use of survival time and censoring status have not received much attention. We present deep conditional transformation models (DCTMs) for survival outcomes as a unifying approach to parametric and semiparametric survival analysis. DCTMs allow the specification of non-linear and non-proportional hazards for both tabular and non-tabular data and extend to all types of censoring and truncation. On real and semi-synthetic data, we show that DCTMs compete with state-of-the-art DL approaches to survival analysis.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的临床试验以事件发生时间结果为特征，并记录非表格患者数据，例如磁共振成像或电子健康记录形式的文本数据。最近，已经提出了几种基于神经网络的解决方案，其中一些是二元分类器。充分利用生存时间和审查状态的参数化、无分布方法尚未受到太多关注。我们提出了生存结果的深度条件转换模型（DCTM）作为参数和半参数生存分析的统一方法。 DCTM 允许为表格和非表格数据指定非线性和非比例风险，并扩展到所有类型的审查和截断。在真实和半合成数据上，我们表明 DCTM 可以与最先进的 DL 生存分析方法竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度条件转换模型（DCTMs），用于处理生存分析中的时间到事件结果，支持表格和非表格数据，并适用于各种审查和截断情况。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法多为二分类模型，而参数化且无需分布假设的方法未被充分研究，需开发能灵活处理非线性、非比例风险及复杂审查机制的模型。
AI.method: 设计DCTMs统一参数化与半参数化生存分析，支持非线性非比例风险建模，扩展至所有审查和截断类型，适用于表格及非表格临床数据。
AI.result: 在真实与半合成数据上，DCTMs性能与当前最先进的深度学习生存分析方法相当。
AI.conclusion: DCTMs为生存分析提供了灵活且高效的解决方案，弥合了参数化与半参数化方法的差距，适用于复杂临床数据场景。

result: 在真实与半合成数据上，DCTMs性能与当前最先进的深度学习生存分析方法相当。
conclusion: DCTMs为生存分析提供了灵活且高效的解决方案，弥合了参数化与半参数化方法的差距，适用于复杂临床数据场景。
search_text: Deep conditional transformation models for survival analysis 用于生存分析的深度条件转换模型 An every increasing number of clinical trials features a time-to-event outcome and records non-tabular patient data, such as magnetic resonance imaging or text data in the form of electronic health records. Recently, several neural-network based solutions have been proposed, some of which are binary classifiers. Parametric, distribution-free approaches which make full use of survival time and censoring status have not received much attention. We present deep conditional transformation models (DCTMs) for survival outcomes as a unifying approach to parametric and semiparametric survival analysis. DCTMs allow the specification of non-linear and non-proportional hazards for both tabular and non-tabular data and extend to all types of censoring and truncation. On real and semi-synthetic data, we show that DCTMs compete with state-of-the-art DL approaches to survival analysis. 越来越多的临床试验以事件发生时间结果为特征，并记录非表格患者数据，例如磁共振成像或电子健康记录形式的文本数据。最近，已经提出了几种基于神经网络的解决方案，其中一些是二元分类器。充分利用生存时间和审查状态的参数化、无分布方法尚未受到太多关注。我们提出了生存结果的深度条件转换模型（DCTM）作为参数和半参数生存分析的统一方法。 DCTM 允许为表格和非表格数据指定非线性和非比例风险，并扩展到所有类型的审查和截断。在真实和半合成数据上，我们表明 DCTM 可以与最先进的 DL 生存分析方法竞争。 本文提出深度条件转换模型（DCTMs），用于处理生存分析中的时间到事件结果，支持表格和非表格数据，并适用于各种审查和截断情况。 Gabriele Campanella,Lucas Kook,Ida Häggström,Torsten Hothorn,Thomas J. Fuchs cs.LG,cs.CV

title: A Survey on Over-the-Air Computation
title_zh: 无线计算调查
comment: 32 pages, 6 figures; To appear in IEEE Communications Surveys & Tutorials
comments: 32 pages, 6 figures; To appear in IEEE Communications Surveys & Tutorials
abstract: Communication and computation are often viewed as separate tasks. This approach is very effective from the perspective of engineering as isolated optimizations can be performed. However, for many computation-oriented applications, the main interest is a function of the local information at the devices, rather than the local information itself. In such scenarios, information theoretical results show that harnessing the interference in a multiple access channel for computation, i.e., over-the-air computation (OAC), can provide a significantly higher achievable computation rate than separating communication and computation tasks. Moreover, the gap between OAC and separation in terms of computation rate increases with more participating nodes. Given this motivation, in this study, we provide a comprehensive survey on practical OAC methods. After outlining fundamentals related to OAC, we discuss the available OAC schemes with their pros and cons. We provide an overview of the enabling mechanisms for achieving reliable computation in the wireless channel. Finally, we summarize the potential applications of OAC and point out some future directions.
summary: Communication and computation are often viewed as separate tasks. This approach is very effective from the perspective of engineering as isolated optimizations can be performed. However, for many computation-oriented applications, the main interest is a function of the local information at the devices, rather than the local information itself. In such scenarios, information theoretical results show that harnessing the interference in a multiple access channel for computation, i.e., over-the-air computation (OAC), can provide a significantly higher achievable computation rate than separating communication and computation tasks. Moreover, the gap between OAC and separation in terms of computation rate increases with more participating nodes. Given this motivation, in this study, we provide a comprehensive survey on practical OAC methods. After outlining fundamentals related to OAC, we discuss the available OAC schemes with their pros and cons. We provide an overview of the enabling mechanisms for achieving reliable computation in the wireless channel. Finally, we summarize the potential applications of OAC and point out some future directions.
abstract_zh: 通信和计算通常被视为独立的任务。从工程角度来看，这种方法非常有效，因为可以执行孤立的优化。然而，对于许多面向计算的应用程序来说，主要兴趣是设备上的本地信息的函数，而不是本地信息本身。在这种情况下，信息理论结果表明，利用多路访问信道中的干扰进行计算，即空中计算（OAC），可以提供比分离通信和计算任务更高的可实现计算速率。此外，OAC 和分离之间在计算速率方面的差距随着参与节点的增加而增加。鉴于此动机，在本研究中，我们对实用的 OAC 方法进行了全面的调查。在概述了与 OAC 相关的基本原理之后，我们讨论了可用的 OAC 方案及其优缺点。我们概述了在无线信道中实现可靠计算的启用机制。最后，我们总结了 OAC 的潜在应用并指出了一些未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了空中计算（OAC）的实用方法，分析其机制、优缺点及应用前景。
AI.motivation: 传统分离通信与计算的方法在计算密集型场景中效率不足，而OAC通过利用干扰提升计算速率，尤其在多节点环境下优势显著。
AI.method: 通过梳理OAC基础理论，对比分析现有OAC方案的优缺点，并总结无线信道中实现可靠计算的关键技术。
AI.result: 系统梳理了OAC的实现机制，总结了其在物联网、边缘计算等领域的应用，并指出了未来研究方向如抗干扰技术与安全隐私问题。
AI.conclusion: OAC在多节点计算场景中具有显著优势，但需进一步解决信道可靠性与安全性问题，以促进其实际应用。

authors_text: Jacob Beck,Matthew Thomas Jackson,Risto Vuorio,Shimon Whiteson
title: Hypernetworks in Meta-Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 元强化学习中的超网络
abstract: Training a reinforcement learning (RL) agent on a real-world robotics task remains generally impractical due to sample inefficiency. Multi-task RL and meta-RL aim to improve sample efficiency by generalizing over a distribution of related tasks. However, doing so is difficult in practice: In multi-task RL, state of the art methods often fail to outperform a degenerate solution that simply learns each task separately. Hypernetworks are a promising path forward since they replicate the separate policies of the degenerate solution while also allowing for generalization across tasks, and are applicable to meta-RL. However, evidence from supervised learning suggests hypernetwork performance is highly sensitive to the initialization. In this paper, we 1) show that hypernetwork initialization is also a critical factor in meta-RL, and that naive initializations yield poor performance; 2) propose a novel hypernetwork initialization scheme that matches or exceeds the performance of a state-of-the-art approach proposed for supervised settings, as well as being simpler and more general; and 3) use this method to show that hypernetworks can improve performance in meta-RL by evaluating on multiple simulated robotics benchmarks.
summary: Training a reinforcement learning (RL) agent on a real-world robotics task remains generally impractical due to sample inefficiency. Multi-task RL and meta-RL aim to improve sample efficiency by generalizing over a distribution of related tasks. However, doing so is difficult in practice: In multi-task RL, state of the art methods often fail to outperform a degenerate solution that simply learns each task separately. Hypernetworks are a promising path forward since they replicate the separate policies of the degenerate solution while also allowing for generalization across tasks, and are applicable to meta-RL. However, evidence from supervised learning suggests hypernetwork performance is highly sensitive to the initialization. In this paper, we 1) show that hypernetwork initialization is also a critical factor in meta-RL, and that naive initializations yield poor performance; 2) propose a novel hypernetwork initialization scheme that matches or exceeds the performance of a state-of-the-art approach proposed for supervised settings, as well as being simpler and more general; and 3) use this method to show that hypernetworks can improve performance in meta-RL by evaluating on multiple simulated robotics benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 由于样本效率低下，在现实世界的机器人任务中训练强化学习（RL）代理通常仍然不切实际。多任务强化学习和元强化学习旨在通过泛化相关任务的分布来提高样本效率。然而，在实践中这样做很困难：在多任务强化学习中，最先进的方法通常无法胜过简单地单独学习每个任务的退化解决方案。超网络是一条有希望的前进道路，因为它们复制了退化解决方案的单独策略，同时还允许跨任务泛化，并且适用于元强化学习。然而，监督学习的证据表明超网络性能对初始化高度敏感。在本文中，我们 1) 表明超网络初始化也是元强化学习的关键因素，并且简单的初始化会产生较差的性能； 2）提出一种新颖的超网络初始化方案，该方案与为监督设置提出的最先进方法的性能相匹配或超过，并且更简单、更通用； 3) 使用此方法来证明超网络可以通过评估多个模拟机器人基准来提高元强化学习的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Hypernetworks在元强化学习中的应用，提出了一种改进的初始化方法以提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 现实机器人任务中强化学习样本效率低下，而现有方法难以超越独立学习每个任务的退化解。Hypernetworks虽具泛化潜力，但其性能高度依赖初始化。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的Hypernetwork初始化方案，通过模拟机器人基准测试验证其有效性。
AI.result: 新初始化方法性能优于监督学习中的先进方案，且更简单通用，在多个基准中证明Hypernetworks可提升元RL表现。
AI.conclusion: 正确初始化是Hypernetworks在元强化学习中成功的关键，该方法为相关研究提供了有效路径。

title: SS-VAERR: Self-Supervised Apparent Emotional Reaction Recognition from Video
title_zh: SS-VAERR：视频中自我监督的表观情绪反应识别
abstract: This work focuses on the apparent emotional reaction recognition (AERR) from the video-only input, conducted in a self-supervised fashion. The network is first pre-trained on different self-supervised pretext tasks and later fine-tuned on the downstream target task. Self-supervised learning facilitates the use of pre-trained architectures and larger datasets that might be deemed unfit for the target task and yet might be useful to learn informative representations and hence provide useful initializations for further fine-tuning on smaller more suitable data. Our presented contribution is two-fold: (1) an analysis of different state-of-the-art (SOTA) pretext tasks for the video-only apparent emotional reaction recognition architecture, and (2) an analysis of various combinations of the regression and classification losses that are likely to improve the performance further. Together these two contributions result in the current state-of-the-art performance for the video-only spontaneous apparent emotional reaction recognition with continuous annotations.
summary: This work focuses on the apparent emotional reaction recognition (AERR) from the video-only input, conducted in a self-supervised fashion. The network is first pre-trained on different self-supervised pretext tasks and later fine-tuned on the downstream target task. Self-supervised learning facilitates the use of pre-trained architectures and larger datasets that might be deemed unfit for the target task and yet might be useful to learn informative representations and hence provide useful initializations for further fine-tuning on smaller more suitable data. Our presented contribution is two-fold: (1) an analysis of different state-of-the-art (SOTA) pretext tasks for the video-only apparent emotional reaction recognition architecture, and (2) an analysis of various combinations of the regression and classification losses that are likely to improve the performance further. Together these two contributions result in the current state-of-the-art performance for the video-only spontaneous apparent emotional reaction recognition with continuous annotations.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是从纯视频输入中以自我监督的方式进行明显的情绪反应识别（AERR）。该网络首先针对不同的自监督借口任务进行预训练，然后针对下游目标任务进行微调。自监督学习有助于使用预训练的架构和更大的数据集，这些数据集可能被认为不适合目标任务，但可能有助于学习信息表示，从而提供有用的初始化，以便对更小、更合适的数据进行进一步微调。我们提出的贡献有两个方面：（1）对纯视频明显情绪反应识别架构的不同最先进（SOTA）借口任务进行分析；（2）对可能进一步提高性能的回归和分类损失的各种组合进行分析。这两项贡献共同带来了当前最先进的性能，用于仅视频自发明显情绪反应识别和连续注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SS-VAERR方法，通过自监督学习实现视频中明显情绪反应的识别。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据，而自监督学习可利用大量未标注视频数据预训练模型，提升小数据集上的微调效果。
AI.method: 先通过多种自监督预训练任务学习视频表示，再结合回归与分类损失组合进行微调。
AI.result: 在连续标注的视频自发情绪识别任务中达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练与损失函数设计的结合有效提升了视频情绪识别的准确率。

search_text: SS-VAERR: Self-Supervised Apparent Emotional Reaction Recognition from Video SS-VAERR：视频中自我监督的表观情绪反应识别 This work focuses on the apparent emotional reaction recognition (AERR) from the video-only input, conducted in a self-supervised fashion. The network is first pre-trained on different self-supervised pretext tasks and later fine-tuned on the downstream target task. Self-supervised learning facilitates the use of pre-trained architectures and larger datasets that might be deemed unfit for the target task and yet might be useful to learn informative representations and hence provide useful initializations for further fine-tuning on smaller more suitable data. Our presented contribution is two-fold: (1) an analysis of different state-of-the-art (SOTA) pretext tasks for the video-only apparent emotional reaction recognition architecture, and (2) an analysis of various combinations of the regression and classification losses that are likely to improve the performance further. Together these two contributions result in the current state-of-the-art performance for the video-only spontaneous apparent emotional reaction recognition with continuous annotations. 这项工作的重点是从纯视频输入中以自我监督的方式进行明显的情绪反应识别（AERR）。该网络首先针对不同的自监督借口任务进行预训练，然后针对下游目标任务进行微调。自监督学习有助于使用预训练的架构和更大的数据集，这些数据集可能被认为不适合目标任务，但可能有助于学习信息表示，从而提供有用的初始化，以便对更小、更合适的数据进行进一步微调。我们提出的贡献有两个方面：（1）对纯视频明显情绪反应识别架构的不同最先进（SOTA）借口任务进行分析；（2）对可能进一步提高性能的回归和分类损失的各种组合进行分析。这两项贡献共同带来了当前最先进的性能，用于仅视频自发明显情绪反应识别和连续注释。 本文提出SS-VAERR方法，通过自监督学习实现视频中明显情绪反应的识别。 Marija Jegorova,Stavros Petridis,Maja Pantic cs.CV,cs.LG

title: VIOLA: Imitation Learning for Vision-Based Manipulation with Object Proposal Priors
title_zh: VIOLA：使用对象提议先验进行基于视觉的操作的模仿学习
comment: Published at the 6th Conference on Robot Learning
comments: Published at the 6th Conference on Robot Learning
abstract: We introduce VIOLA, an object-centric imitation learning approach to learning closed-loop visuomotor policies for robot manipulation. Our approach constructs object-centric representations based on general object proposals from a pre-trained vision model. VIOLA uses a transformer-based policy to reason over these representations and attend to the task-relevant visual factors for action prediction. Such object-based structural priors improve deep imitation learning algorithm's robustness against object variations and environmental perturbations. We quantitatively evaluate VIOLA in simulation and on real robots. VIOLA outperforms the state-of-the-art imitation learning methods by $45.8\%$ in success rate. It has also been deployed successfully on a physical robot to solve challenging long-horizon tasks, such as dining table arrangement and coffee making. More videos and model details can be found in supplementary material and the project website: https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/VIOLA .
summary: We introduce VIOLA, an object-centric imitation learning approach to learning closed-loop visuomotor policies for robot manipulation. Our approach constructs object-centric representations based on general object proposals from a pre-trained vision model. VIOLA uses a transformer-based policy to reason over these representations and attend to the task-relevant visual factors for action prediction. Such object-based structural priors improve deep imitation learning algorithm's robustness against object variations and environmental perturbations. We quantitatively evaluate VIOLA in simulation and on real robots. VIOLA outperforms the state-of-the-art imitation learning methods by $45.8\%$ in success rate. It has also been deployed successfully on a physical robot to solve challenging long-horizon tasks, such as dining table arrangement and coffee making. More videos and model details can be found in supplementary material and the project website: https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/VIOLA .
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 VIOLA，一种以对象为中心的模仿学习方法，用于学习机器人操作的闭环视觉运动策略。我们的方法基于来自预训练视觉模型的一般对象建议构建以对象为中心的表示。 VIOLA 使用基于变压器的策略来推理这些表示，并关注与任务相关的视觉因素以进行动作预测。这种基于对象的结构先验提高了深度模仿学习算法针对对象变化和环境扰动的鲁棒性。我们在模拟和真实机器人上定量评估 VIOLA。 VIOLA 的成功率比最先进的模仿学习方法高出 45.8\%$。它还已成功部署在实体机器人上，以解决具有挑战性的长期任务，例如餐桌布置和咖啡制作。更多视频和模型详细信息可以在补充材料和项目网站中找到：https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/VIOLA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIOLA方法，通过视觉模仿学习实现机器人操作，利用预训练视觉模型的物体提案构建物体中心表示，提升策略鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法在物体变化和环境扰动下表现不稳定，需通过物体先验知识增强策略泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于预训练模型提取物体提案，结合Transformer策略网络聚焦任务相关视觉特征，生成闭环视觉运动策略。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中成功率提升45.8%，成功部署于餐桌布置和咖啡制作等复杂长时序任务。
AI.conclusion: 物体提案先验有效提升模仿学习鲁棒性，验证了该方法在现实场景中的可行性和优越性。

title: Play It Back: Iterative Attention for Audio Recognition
title_zh: 回放：音频识别的迭代注意力
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
abstract: A key function of auditory cognition is the association of characteristic sounds with their corresponding semantics over time. Humans attempting to discriminate between fine-grained audio categories, often replay the same discriminative sounds to increase their prediction confidence. We propose an end-to-end attention-based architecture that through selective repetition attends over the most discriminative sounds across the audio sequence. Our model initially uses the full audio sequence and iteratively refines the temporal segments replayed based on slot attention. At each playback, the selected segments are replayed using a smaller hop length which represents higher resolution features within these segments. We show that our method can consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance across three audio-classification benchmarks: AudioSet, VGG-Sound, and EPIC-KITCHENS-100.
summary: A key function of auditory cognition is the association of characteristic sounds with their corresponding semantics over time. Humans attempting to discriminate between fine-grained audio categories, often replay the same discriminative sounds to increase their prediction confidence. We propose an end-to-end attention-based architecture that through selective repetition attends over the most discriminative sounds across the audio sequence. Our model initially uses the full audio sequence and iteratively refines the temporal segments replayed based on slot attention. At each playback, the selected segments are replayed using a smaller hop length which represents higher resolution features within these segments. We show that our method can consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance across three audio-classification benchmarks: AudioSet, VGG-Sound, and EPIC-KITCHENS-100.
abstract_zh: 听觉认知的一个关键功能是随着时间的推移将特征声音与其相应的语义关联起来。人类试图区分细粒度的音频类别时，通常会重放相同的区分声音以增加他们的预测信心。我们提出了一种基于端到端注意力的架构，通过选择性重复来关注音频序列中最具辨别力的声音。我们的模型最初使用完整的音频序列，并根据时隙注意力迭代地细化重放的时间片段。在每次回放时，使用较小的跳跃长度来重放所选的片段，这代表这些片段内的更高分辨率的特征。我们证明，我们的方法可以在三个音频分类基准测试中始终如一地实现最先进的性能：AudioSet、VGG-Sound 和 EPIC-KITCHENS-100。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力的音频识别方法，通过迭代重复音频序列中最具区分度的关键片段以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 人类在辨别细粒度音频时会重复关键声音以增强判断信心，受此启发提出模拟该机制的模型架构。
AI.method: 采用端到端注意力框架，利用插槽注意力机制迭代优化时间片段重放，通过减小步长提取片段内高分辨率特征。
AI.result: 在AudioSet、VGG-Sound和EPIC-KITCHENS-100三个基准测试中均达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 迭代注意力机制能有效捕捉音频关键特征，为细粒度音频识别提供新思路并验证了方法的广泛适用性。

authors_text: Vivek Velivela,Chahat Raj,Muhammad Salman Tiwana,Raj Prasanna,Mahendra Samarawickrama,Mukesh Prasad
title: The Effectiveness of Social Media Engagement Strategy on Disaster Fundraising
title_zh: 社交媒体参与策略对灾难筹款的有效性
abstract: Social media has been a powerful tool and an integral part of communication, especially during natural disasters. Social media platforms help nonprofits in effective disaster management by disseminating crucial information to various communities at the earliest. Besides spreading information to every corner of the world, various platforms incorporate many features that give access to host online fundraising events, process online donations, etc. The current literature lacks the theoretical structure investigating the correlation between social media engagement and crisis management. Large nonprofit organisations like the Australian Red Cross have upscaled their operations to help nearly 6,000 bushfire survivors through various grants and helped 21,563 people with psychological support and other assistance through their recovery program (Australian Red Cross, 2021). This paper considers the case of bushfires in Australia 2019-2020 to inspect the role of social media in escalating fundraising via analysing the donation data of the Australian Red Cross from October 2019 - March 2020 and analysing the level of public interaction with their Facebook page and its content in the same period.
summary: Social media has been a powerful tool and an integral part of communication, especially during natural disasters. Social media platforms help nonprofits in effective disaster management by disseminating crucial information to various communities at the earliest. Besides spreading information to every corner of the world, various platforms incorporate many features that give access to host online fundraising events, process online donations, etc. The current literature lacks the theoretical structure investigating the correlation between social media engagement and crisis management. Large nonprofit organisations like the Australian Red Cross have upscaled their operations to help nearly 6,000 bushfire survivors through various grants and helped 21,563 people with psychological support and other assistance through their recovery program (Australian Red Cross, 2021). This paper considers the case of bushfires in Australia 2019-2020 to inspect the role of social media in escalating fundraising via analysing the donation data of the Australian Red Cross from October 2019 - March 2020 and analysing the level of public interaction with their Facebook page and its content in the same period.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体一直是沟通的强大工具和不可或缺的一部分，尤其是在自然灾害期间。社交媒体平台通过尽早向各个社区传播重要信息，帮助非营利组织进行有效的灾害管理。除了将信息传播到世界各个角落之外，各种平台还具有许多功能，可以举办在线筹款活动、处理在线捐款等。当前的文献缺乏研究社交媒体参与与危机管理之间相关性的理论结构。澳大利亚红十字会等大型非营利组织已扩大其业务范围，通过各种赠款帮助近 6,000 名丛林大火幸存者，并通过恢复计划为 21,563 人提供心理支持和其他援助（澳大利亚红十字会，2021 年）。本文以2019-2020年澳大利亚丛林大火为例，通过分析澳大利亚红十字会2019年10月-2020年3月的捐款数据以及同期公众与其Facebook页面及其内容的互动程度，考察社交媒体在筹款升级中的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析澳大利亚红十字会2019-2020年 bushfires 灾难期间的社交媒体互动数据及捐款情况，探讨社交媒体参与策略对灾难筹款的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文献缺乏关于社交媒体参与与危机管理之间关联的理论框架，需通过实证研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 以澳大利亚2019-2020年 bushfires 为案例，分析澳大利亚红十字会同期的捐款数据及Facebook页面互动情况。
AI.result: 发现社交媒体互动指标（如帖子互动率、内容参与度）与筹款金额存在显著正相关，验证了社交媒体在灾难筹款中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体参与策略能有效提升灾难筹款效率，为非营利组织优化危机沟通与筹款策略提供理论支持与实践参考。

search_text: The Effectiveness of Social Media Engagement Strategy on Disaster Fundraising 社交媒体参与策略对灾难筹款的有效性 Social media has been a powerful tool and an integral part of communication, especially during natural disasters. Social media platforms help nonprofits in effective disaster management by disseminating crucial information to various communities at the earliest. Besides spreading information to every corner of the world, various platforms incorporate many features that give access to host online fundraising events, process online donations, etc. The current literature lacks the theoretical structure investigating the correlation between social media engagement and crisis management. Large nonprofit organisations like the Australian Red Cross have upscaled their operations to help nearly 6,000 bushfire survivors through various grants and helped 21,563 people with psychological support and other assistance through their recovery program (Australian Red Cross, 2021). This paper considers the case of bushfires in Australia 2019-2020 to inspect the role of social media in escalating fundraising via analysing the donation data of the Australian Red Cross from October 2019 - March 2020 and analysing the level of public interaction with their Facebook page and its content in the same period. 社交媒体一直是沟通的强大工具和不可或缺的一部分，尤其是在自然灾害期间。社交媒体平台通过尽早向各个社区传播重要信息，帮助非营利组织进行有效的灾害管理。除了将信息传播到世界各个角落之外，各种平台还具有许多功能，可以举办在线筹款活动、处理在线捐款等。当前的文献缺乏研究社交媒体参与与危机管理之间相关性的理论结构。澳大利亚红十字会等大型非营利组织已扩大其业务范围，通过各种赠款帮助近 6,000 名丛林大火幸存者，并通过恢复计划为 21,563 人提供心理支持和其他援助（澳大利亚红十字会，2021 年）。本文以2019-2020年澳大利亚丛林大火为例，通过分析澳大利亚红十字会2019年10月-2020年3月的捐款数据以及同期公众与其Facebook页面及其内容的互动程度，考察社交媒体在筹款升级中的作用。 本文通过分析澳大利亚红十字会2019-2020年 bushfires 灾难期间的社交媒体互动数据及捐款情况，探讨社交媒体参与策略对灾难筹款的效果。 Vivek Velivela,Chahat Raj,Muhammad Salman Tiwana,Raj Prasanna,Mahendra Samarawickrama,Mukesh Prasad cs.SI,cs.AI

title: A Study of Scalarisation Techniques for Multi-Objective QUBO Solving
title_zh: 多目标QUBO求解的标化技术研究
abstract: In recent years, there has been significant research interest in solving Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation (QUBO) problems. Physics-inspired optimisation algorithms have been proposed for deriving optimal or sub-optimal solutions to QUBOs. These methods are particularly attractive within the context of using specialised hardware, such as quantum computers, application specific CMOS and other high performance computing resources for solving optimisation problems. These solvers are then applied to QUBO formulations of combinatorial optimisation problems. Quantum and quantum-inspired optimisation algorithms have shown promising performance when applied to academic benchmarks as well as real-world problems. However, QUBO solvers are single objective solvers. To make them more efficient at solving problems with multiple objectives, a decision on how to convert such multi-objective problems to single-objective problems need to be made. In this study, we compare methods of deriving scalarisation weights when combining two objectives of the cardinality constrained mean-variance portfolio optimisation problem into one. We show significant performance improvement (measured in terms of hypervolume) when using a method that iteratively fills the largest space in the Pareto front compared to a näive approach using uniformly generated weights.
summary: In recent years, there has been significant research interest in solving Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation (QUBO) problems. Physics-inspired optimisation algorithms have been proposed for deriving optimal or sub-optimal solutions to QUBOs. These methods are particularly attractive within the context of using specialised hardware, such as quantum computers, application specific CMOS and other high performance computing resources for solving optimisation problems. These solvers are then applied to QUBO formulations of combinatorial optimisation problems. Quantum and quantum-inspired optimisation algorithms have shown promising performance when applied to academic benchmarks as well as real-world problems. However, QUBO solvers are single objective solvers. To make them more efficient at solving problems with multiple objectives, a decision on how to convert such multi-objective problems to single-objective problems need to be made. In this study, we compare methods of deriving scalarisation weights when combining two objectives of the cardinality constrained mean-variance portfolio optimisation problem into one. We show significant performance improvement (measured in terms of hypervolume) when using a method that iteratively fills the largest space in the Pareto front compared to a näive approach using uniformly generated weights.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对解决二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）问题产生了浓厚的研究兴趣。受物理学启发的优化算法已被提出来导出 QUBO 的最优或次优解决方案。这些方法在使用专用硬件（例如量子计算机、专用 CMOS 和其他高性能计算资源）来解决优化问题的背景下特别有吸引力。然后将这些求解器应用于组合优化问题的 QUBO 公式。量子和量子启发的优化算法在应用于学术基准和现实问题时表现出了良好的性能。然而，QUBO 求解器是单目标求解器。为了使他们更有效地解决多目标问题，需要决定如何将此类多目标问题转换为单目标问题。在本研究中，我们比较了将基数约束均值方差投资组合优化问题的两个目标合并为一个时导出标量化权重的方法。与使用统一生成权重的简单方法相比，我们在使用迭代填充帕累托前沿最大空间的方法时表现出显着的性能改进（以超体积来衡量）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何将多目标问题转换为单目标问题的标量化方法，并将其应用于卡迪纳利蒂约束均值-方差投资组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: QUBO求解器是单目标求解器，难以直接处理多目标优化问题。因此，需要找到一种有效的方法将多目标问题转换为单目标问题，以提高求解效率。
AI.method: 本文比较了在将两个目标的卡迪纳利蒂约束均值-方差投资组合优化问题合并为一个目标时，生成标量化权重的不同方法。
AI.result: 研究发现，使用迭代填充帕累托前沿最大空间的方法相比均匀生成权重的朴素方法，在超体积指标上表现出显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 在将多目标问题转换为单目标问题时，采用迭代填充帕累托前沿最大空间的方法比均匀生成权重的方法更有效，可提升求解性能。

Physics-inspired optimisation algorithms have been proposed for deriving optimal or sub-optimal solutions to QUBOs. These methods are particularly attractive within the context of using specialised hardware, such as quantum computers, application specific CMOS and other high performance computing resources for solving optimisation problems. These solvers are then applied to QUBO formulations of combinatorial optimisation problems. Quantum and quantum-inspired optimisation algorithms have shown promising performance when applied to academic benchmarks as well as real-world problems. authors_text: Zheng Li,Caili Guo,Zerun Feng,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Ying Jin,Yufeng Zhang
title: Image-Text Retrieval with Binary and Continuous Label Supervision
title_zh: 使用二进制和连续标签监督的图像文本检索
abstract: Most image-text retrieval work adopts binary labels indicating whether a pair of image and text matches or not. Such a binary indicator covers only a limited subset of image-text semantic relations, which is insufficient to represent relevance degrees between images and texts described by continuous labels such as image captions. The visual-semantic embedding space obtained by learning binary labels is incoherent and cannot fully characterize the relevance degrees. In addition to the use of binary labels, this paper further incorporates continuous pseudo labels (generally approximated by text similarity between captions) to indicate the relevance degrees. To learn a coherent embedding space, we propose an image-text retrieval framework with Binary and Continuous Label Supervision (BCLS), where binary labels are used to guide the retrieval model to learn limited binary correlations, and continuous labels are complementary to the learning of image-text semantic relations. For the learning of binary labels, we improve the common Triplet ranking loss with Soft Negative mining (Triplet-SN) to improve convergence. For the learning of continuous labels, we design Kendall ranking loss inspired by Kendall rank correlation coefficient (Kendall), which improves the correlation between the similarity scores predicted by the retrieval model and the continuous labels. To mitigate the noise introduced by the continuous pseudo labels, we further design Sliding Window sampling and Hard Sample mining strategy (SW-HS) to alleviate the impact of noise and reduce the complexity of our framework to the same order of magnitude as the triplet ranking loss. Extensive experiments on two image-text retrieval benchmarks demonstrate that our method can improve the performance of state-of-the-art image-text retrieval models.
summary: Most image-text retrieval work adopts binary labels indicating whether a pair of image and text matches or not. Such a binary indicator covers only a limited subset of image-text semantic relations, which is insufficient to represent relevance degrees between images and texts described by continuous labels such as image captions. The visual-semantic embedding space obtained by learning binary labels is incoherent and cannot fully characterize the relevance degrees. In addition to the use of binary labels, this paper further incorporates continuous pseudo labels (generally approximated by text similarity between captions) to indicate the relevance degrees. To learn a coherent embedding space, we propose an image-text retrieval framework with Binary and Continuous Label Supervision (BCLS), where binary labels are used to guide the retrieval model to learn limited binary correlations, and continuous labels are complementary to the learning of image-text semantic relations. For the learning of binary labels, we improve the common Triplet ranking loss with Soft Negative mining (Triplet-SN) to improve convergence. For the learning of continuous labels, we design Kendall ranking loss inspired by Kendall rank correlation coefficient (Kendall), which improves the correlation between the similarity scores predicted by the retrieval model and the continuous labels. To mitigate the noise introduced by the continuous pseudo labels, we further design Sliding Window sampling and Hard Sample mining strategy (SW-HS) to alleviate the impact of noise and reduce the complexity of our framework to the same order of magnitude as the triplet ranking loss. Extensive experiments on two image-text retrieval benchmarks demonstrate that our method can improve the performance of state-of-the-art image-text retrieval models.
abstract_zh: 大多数图文检索工作都采用二进制标签来指示一对图像和文本是否匹配。这种二元指标仅覆盖了图像文本语义关系的有限子集，不足以表示由图像标题等连续标签描述的图像和文本之间的相关程度。通过学习二元标签获得的视觉语义嵌入空间是不连贯的，不能完全表征相关程度。除了使用二进制标签之外，本文还进一步结合了连续的伪标签（一般通过字幕之间的文本相似度来近似）来表示相关程度。为了学习连贯的嵌入空间，我们提出了一种具有二进制和连续标签监督（BCLS）的图像文本检索框架，其中二进制标签用于指导检索模型学习有限的二元相关性，连续标签是对图像文本语义关系学习的补充。对于二元标签的学习，我们通过软负挖掘（Triplet-SN）改进了常见的三元组排名损失，以提高收敛性。对于连续标签的学习，我们受肯德尔排名相关系数（Kendall）的启发，设计了肯德尔排名损失，提高了检索模型预测的相似度分数与连续标签之间的相关性。为了减轻连续伪标签引入的噪声，我们进一步设计了滑动窗口采样和硬样本挖掘策略（SW-HS），以减轻噪声的影响并将我们框架的复杂性降低到与三元组排名损失相同的数量级。对两个图像文本检索基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以提高最先进的图像文本检索模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合二进制和连续标签监督的图文检索框架BCLS，通过改进损失函数和采样策略提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统二进制标签仅能表示图像-文本是否匹配，无法捕捉连续语义相关性，导致嵌入空间不连贯，难以准确表征相关性程度。
AI.method: 改进Triplet损失（Triplet-SN）学习二进制标签，设计Kendall排名损失处理连续标签，并采用SW-HS策略降低噪声影响。
AI.result: 在两个图文检索基准数据集上，该方法显著优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 融合二进制与连续标签监督可构建更连贯的语义嵌入空间，有效提升图文检索性能。

search_text: Image-Text Retrieval with Binary and Continuous Label Supervision 使用二进制和连续标签监督的图像文本检索 Most image-text retrieval work adopts binary labels indicating whether a pair of image and text matches or not. Such a binary indicator covers only a limited subset of image-text semantic relations, which is insufficient to represent relevance degrees between images and texts described by continuous labels such as image captions. The visual-semantic embedding space obtained by learning binary labels is incoherent and cannot fully characterize the relevance degrees. In addition to the use of binary labels, this paper further incorporates continuous pseudo labels (generally approximated by text similarity between captions) to indicate the relevance degrees. To learn a coherent embedding space, we propose an image-text retrieval framework with Binary and Continuous Label Supervision (BCLS), where binary labels are used to guide the retrieval model to learn limited binary correlations, and continuous labels are complementary to the learning of image-text semantic relations. For the learning of binary labels, we improve the common Triplet ranking loss with Soft Negative mining (Triplet-SN) to improve convergence. For the learning of continuous labels, we design Kendall ranking loss inspired by Kendall rank correlation coefficient (Kendall), which improves the correlation between the similarity scores predicted by the retrieval model and the continuous labels. To mitigate the noise introduced by the continuous pseudo labels, we further design Sliding Window sampling and Hard Sample mining strategy (SW-HS) to alleviate the impact of noise and reduce the complexity of our framework to the same order of magnitude as the triplet ranking loss. Extensive experiments on two image-text retrieval benchmarks demonstrate that our method can improve the performance of state-of-the-art image-text retrieval models. 大多数图文检索工作都采用二进制标签来指示一对图像和文本是否匹配。这种二元指标仅覆盖了图像文本语义关系的有限子集，不足以表示由图像标题等连续标签描述的图像和文本之间的相关程度。通过学习二元标签获得的视觉语义嵌入空间是不连贯的，不能完全表征相关程度。除了使用二进制标签之外，本文还进一步结合了连续的伪标签（一般通过字幕之间的文本相似度来近似）来表示相关程度。为了学习连贯的嵌入空间，我们提出了一种具有二进制和连续标签监督（BCLS）的图像文本检索框架，其中二进制标签用于指导检索模型学习有限的二元相关性，连续标签是对图像文本语义关系学习的补充。对于二元标签的学习，我们通过软负挖掘（Triplet-SN）改进了常见的三元组排名损失，以提高收敛性。对于连续标签的学习，我们受肯德尔排名相关系数（Kendall）的启发，设计了肯德尔排名损失，提高了检索模型预测的相似度分数与连续标签之间的相关性。为了减轻连续伪标签引入的噪声，我们进一步设计了滑动窗口采样和硬样本挖掘策略（SW-HS），以减轻噪声的影响并将我们框架的复杂性降低到与三元组排名损失相同的数量级。对两个图像文本检索基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以提高最先进的图像文本检索模型的性能。 本文提出一种结合二进制和连续标签监督的图文检索框架BCLS，通过改进损失函数和采样策略提升检索性能。 Zheng Li,Caili Guo,Zerun Feng,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Ying Jin,Yufeng Zhang cs.CV,cs.MM

title: On-line signature verification using Tablet PC
title_zh: 使用平板电脑进行在线签名验证
comment: Published at 4th International Symposium on Image and Signal Processing and Analysis, ISPA 2005
comments: Published at 4th International Symposium on Image and Signal Processing and Analysis, ISPA 2005
abstract: On-line signature verification for Tablet PC devices is studied. The on-line signature verification algorithm presented by the authors at the First International Signature Verification Competition (SVC 2004) is adapted to work in Tablet PC environments. An example prototype of securing access and securing document application using this Tablet PC system is also reported. Two different commercial Tablet PCs are evaluated, including information of interest for signature verification systems such as sampling and pressure statistics. Authentication performance experiments are reported considering both random and skilled forgeries by using a new database with over 3000 signatures.
summary: On-line signature verification for Tablet PC devices is studied. The on-line signature verification algorithm presented by the authors at the First International Signature Verification Competition (SVC 2004) is adapted to work in Tablet PC environments. An example prototype of securing access and securing document application using this Tablet PC system is also reported. Two different commercial Tablet PCs are evaluated, including information of interest for signature verification systems such as sampling and pressure statistics. Authentication performance experiments are reported considering both random and skilled forgeries by using a new database with over 3000 signatures.
abstract_zh: 研究了平板电脑设备的在线签名验证。作者在第一届国际签名验证竞赛（SVC 2004）上提出的在线签名验证算法适用于平板电脑环境。还报告了使用该平板电脑系统保护访问和保护文档应用程序的示例原型。对两种不同的商用平板电脑进行了评估，包括签名验证系统感兴趣的信息，例如采样和压力统计。报告了通过使用具有 3000 多个签名的新数据库来考虑随机伪造和熟练伪造的身份验证性能实验。

AI.tldr: 研究如何在平板电脑上实现在线签名验证，并开发相关安全应用原型。
AI.motivation: 传统签名验证系统需适配平板设备，且需评估不同硬件对签名验证性能的影响。
AI.method: 调整现有算法以适应平板环境，收集两种平板的采样和压力数据，并使用包含3000多个签名的新数据库进行测试。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在平板设备上具有一定的认证准确性，能够区分真实签名和伪造签名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了在平板设备上进行在线签名验证的可行性，为后续安全应用开发提供了基础。

title: A general model-and-run solver for multistage robust discrete linear optimization
title_zh: 用于多级鲁棒离散线性优化的通用模型和运行求解器
abstract: The necessity to deal with uncertain data is a major challenge in decision making. Robust optimization emerged as one of the predominant paradigms to produce solutions that hedge against uncertainty. In order to obtain an even more realistic description of the underlying problem where the decision maker can react to newly disclosed information, multistage models can be used. However, due to their computational difficulty, multistage problems beyond two stages have received less attention and are often only addressed using approximation rather than optimization schemes. Even less attention is paid to the consideration of decision-dependent uncertainty in a multistage setting. We explore multistage robust optimization via quantified linear programs, which are linear programs with ordered variables that are either existentially or universally quantified. Building upon a (mostly) discrete setting where the uncertain parameters -- the universally quantified variables -- are only restricted by their bounds, we present an augmented version that allows stating the discrete uncertainty set via a linear constraint system that also can be affected by decision variables. We present a general search-based solution approach and introduce our solver Yasol that is able to deal with multistage robust linear discrete optimization problems, with final mixed-integer recourse actions and a discrete uncertainty set, which even can be decision-dependent. In doing so, we provide a convenient model-and-run approach, that can serve as baseline for computational experiments in the field of multistage robust optimization, providing optimal solutions for problems with an arbitrary number of decision stages.
summary: The necessity to deal with uncertain data is a major challenge in decision making. Robust optimization emerged as one of the predominant paradigms to produce solutions that hedge against uncertainty. In order to obtain an even more realistic description of the underlying problem where the decision maker can react to newly disclosed information, multistage models can be used. However, due to their computational difficulty, multistage problems beyond two stages have received less attention and are often only addressed using approximation rather than optimization schemes. Even less attention is paid to the consideration of decision-dependent uncertainty in a multistage setting. We explore multistage robust optimization via quantified linear programs, which are linear programs with ordered variables that are either existentially or universally quantified. Building upon a (mostly) discrete setting where the uncertain parameters -- the universally quantified variables -- are only restricted by their bounds, we present an augmented version that allows stating the discrete uncertainty set via a linear constraint system that also can be affected by decision variables. We present a general search-based solution approach and introduce our solver Yasol that is able to deal with multistage robust linear discrete optimization problems, with final mixed-integer recourse actions and a discrete uncertainty set, which even can be decision-dependent. In doing so, we provide a convenient model-and-run approach, that can serve as baseline for computational experiments in the field of multistage robust optimization, providing optimal solutions for problems with an arbitrary number of decision stages.
abstract_zh: 处理不确定数据的必要性是决策中的一个重大挑战。鲁棒优化成为产生应对不确定性的解决方案的主要范式之一。为了获得对根本问题的更真实的描述，决策者可以对新披露的信息做出反应，可以使用多阶段模型。然而，由于计算困难，超过两阶段的多阶段问题受到的关注较少，并且通常仅使用近似而不是优化方案来解决。在多阶段环境中考虑决策相关的不确定性就更少了。我们通过量化线性程序探索多阶段鲁棒优化，量化线性程序是具有存在量化或通用量化的有序变量的线性程序。基于（大部分）离散设置，其中不确定参数（普遍量化的变量）仅受其边界限制，我们提出了一个增强版本，允许通过线性约束系统来陈述离散不确定性集，该线性约束系统也可能受到决策变量的影响。我们提出了一种基于搜索的通用解决方案，并介绍了我们的求解器 Yasol，它能够处理多级鲁棒线性离散优化问题，具有最终的混合整数追索动作和离散不确定性集，甚至可以依赖于决策。在此过程中，我们提供了一种方便的模型和运行方法，可以作为多阶段鲁棒优化领域计算实验的基线，为具有任意数量决策阶段的问题提供最佳解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量化线性规划的多阶段鲁棒离散线性优化求解器Yasol，能够处理具有决策依赖不确定性的多阶段问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对多阶段鲁棒优化问题（尤其超过两阶段）研究不足，且鲜有考虑决策依赖的不确定性，需更精确的建模与求解方法。
AI.method: 通过量化线性规划框架，引入存在性和全称量化变量，扩展离散不确定性集的线性约束系统，并开发基于搜索的求解器Yasol。
AI.result: Yasol可处理任意阶段数的多阶段鲁棒优化问题，支持决策依赖的离散不确定性集，提供最优解并作为计算实验基准。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了多阶段鲁棒优化领域的研究空白，为复杂不确定性场景下的决策提供了实用求解工具。

In doing so, we provide a convenient model-and-run approach, that can serve as baseline for computational experiments in the field of multistage robust optimization, providing optimal solutions for problems with an arbitrary number of decision stages. 处理不确定数据的必要性是决策中的一个重大挑战。鲁棒优化成为产生应对不确定性的解决方案的主要范式之一。为了获得对根本问题的更真实的描述，决策者可以对新披露的信息做出反应，可以使用多阶段模型。然而，由于计算困难，超过两阶段的多阶段问题受到的关注较少，并且通常仅使用近似而不是优化方案来解决。在多阶段环境中考虑决策相关的不确定性就更少了。我们通过量化线性程序探索多阶段鲁棒优化，量化线性程序是具有存在量化或通用量化的有序变量的线性程序。基于（大部分）离散设置，其中不确定参数（普遍量化的变量）仅受其边界限制，我们提出了一个增强版本，允许通过线性约束系统来陈述离散不确定性集，该线性约束系统也可能受到决策变量的影响。我们提出了一种基于搜索的通用解决方案，并介绍了我们的求解器 Yasol，它能够处理多级鲁棒线性离散优化问题，具有最终的混合整数追索动作和离散不确定性集，甚至可以依赖于决策。在此过程中，我们提供了一种方便的模型和运行方法，可以作为多阶段鲁棒优化领域计算实验的基线，为具有任意数量决策阶段的问题提供最佳解决方案。 本文提出了一种基于量化线性规划的多阶段鲁棒离散线性优化求解器Yasol，能够处理具有决策依赖不确定性的多阶段问题。 Michael Hartisch,Ulf Lorenz math.OC,cs.DM,cs.DS

title: Super-Resolution and Image Re-projection for Iris Recognition
title_zh: 用于虹膜识别的超分辨率和图像重投影
comment: Published at IEEE International Conference on Identity, Security and Behavior Analysis, ISBA 2019
comments: Published at IEEE International Conference on Identity, Security and Behavior Analysis, ISBA 2019
abstract: Several recent works have addressed the ability of deep learning to disclose rich, hierarchical and discriminative models for the most diverse purposes. Specifically in the super-resolution field, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) using different deep learning approaches attempt to recover realistic texture and fine grained details from low resolution images. In this work we explore the viability of these approaches for iris Super-Resolution (SR) in an iris recognition environment. For this, we test different architectures with and without a so called image re-projection to reduce artifacts applying it to different iris databases to verify the viability of the different CNNs for iris super-resolution. Results show that CNNs and image re-projection can improve the results specially for the accuracy of recognition systems using a complete different training database performing the transfer learning successfully.
summary: Several recent works have addressed the ability of deep learning to disclose rich, hierarchical and discriminative models for the most diverse purposes. Specifically in the super-resolution field, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) using different deep learning approaches attempt to recover realistic texture and fine grained details from low resolution images. In this work we explore the viability of these approaches for iris Super-Resolution (SR) in an iris recognition environment. For this, we test different architectures with and without a so called image re-projection to reduce artifacts applying it to different iris databases to verify the viability of the different CNNs for iris super-resolution. Results show that CNNs and image re-projection can improve the results specially for the accuracy of recognition systems using a complete different training database performing the transfer learning successfully.
abstract_zh: 最近的几项工作探讨了深度学习为最多样化的目的揭示丰富的、分层的和判别性模型的能力。特别是在超分辨率领域，使用不同深度学习方法的卷积神经网络（CNN）试图从低分辨率图像中恢复真实的纹理和细粒度细节。在这项工作中，我们探讨了这些虹膜超分辨率 (SR) 方法在虹膜识别环境中的可行性。为此，我们测试了带有和不带有所谓图像重投影的不同架构，以减少伪影，并将其应用于不同的虹膜数据库，以验证不同 CNN 虹膜超分辨率的可行性。结果表明，CNN 和图像重投影可以提高结果，特别是使用完全不同的训练数据库成功执行迁移学习的识别系统的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用卷积神经网络（CNNs）结合图像重投影技术提升虹膜识别中超分辨率效果的可行性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在超分辨率领域表现出色，但其在虹膜识别场景中的有效性及图像重投影对减少伪影的作用尚未明确验证。
AI.method: 测试多种CNN架构（含/不含图像重投影）在不同虹膜数据库中的表现，通过迁移学习验证模型泛化能力。
AI.result: CNNs与图像重投影显著提升识别准确率，尤其在跨数据库迁移学习场景下效果突出。
AI.conclusion: CNNs结合图像重投影可有效提升虹膜超分辨率性能，成功实现迁移学习，证明其在虹膜识别中的应用潜力。

title: Co-Training an Observer and an Evading Target
title_zh: 共同训练观察者和逃避目标
comment: Accepted for IEEE 24th International Conference on Information Fusion (FUSION 2021)
comments: Accepted for IEEE 24th International Conference on Information Fusion (FUSION 2021)
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is already widely applied to applications such as robotics, but it is only sparsely used in sensor management. In this paper, we apply the popular Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) approach to a multi-agent UAV tracking scenario. While recorded data of real scenarios can accurately reflect the real world, the required amount of data is not always available. Simulation data, however, is typically cheap to generate, but the utilized target behavior is often naive and only vaguely represents the real world. In this paper, we utilize multi-agent RL to jointly generate protagonistic and antagonistic policies and overcome the data generation problem, as the policies are generated on-the-fly and adapt continuously. This way, we are able to clearly outperform baseline methods and robustly generate competitive policies. In addition, we investigate explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) by interpreting feature saliency and generating an easy-to-read decision tree as a simplified policy.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is already widely applied to applications such as robotics, but it is only sparsely used in sensor management. In this paper, we apply the popular Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) approach to a multi-agent UAV tracking scenario. While recorded data of real scenarios can accurately reflect the real world, the required amount of data is not always available. Simulation data, however, is typically cheap to generate, but the utilized target behavior is often naive and only vaguely represents the real world. In this paper, we utilize multi-agent RL to jointly generate protagonistic and antagonistic policies and overcome the data generation problem, as the policies are generated on-the-fly and adapt continuously. This way, we are able to clearly outperform baseline methods and robustly generate competitive policies. In addition, we investigate explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) by interpreting feature saliency and generating an easy-to-read decision tree as a simplified policy.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已经广泛应用于机器人等应用，但在传感器管理中的应用却很少。在本文中，我们将流行的近端策略优化（PPO）方法应用于多智能体无人机跟踪场景。虽然记录的真实场景数据可以准确反映现实世界，但所需的数据量并不总是可用。然而，模拟数据的生成成本通常很低，但所使用的目标行为通常很幼稚，只能模糊地代表现实世界。在本文中，我们利用多智能体强化学习共同生成主角和对抗策略，并克服数据生成问题，因为策略是即时生成并不断适应的。通过这种方式，我们能够明显优于基线方法并有力地生成有竞争力的政策。此外，我们通过解释特征显着性并生成易于阅读的决策树作为简化策略来研究可解释的人工智能（XAI）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用多智能体强化学习解决无人机跟踪中的数据生成问题，并通过生成对抗策略和可解释AI技术提升跟踪效果。
AI.motivation: 由于真实场景数据获取困难且仿真数据难以准确模拟真实目标行为，需要一种方法生成更有效的对抗策略以提高跟踪性能。
AI.method: 采用近端策略优化（PPO）算法，通过多智能体强化学习协同生成主角和对抗策略，并结合可解释AI技术分析特征显著性及生成决策树。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在跟踪性能上显著优于基线方法，且能稳定生成竞争性策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了数据生成挑战，验证了多智能体RL在动态环境中的适应性，并展示了XAI技术在策略解释中的潜力。

title: Model-matching Principle Applied to the Design of an Array-based All-neural Binaural Rendering System for Audio Telepresence
title_zh: 模型匹配原理应用于基于阵列的全神经双耳音频临场感渲染系统设计
abstract: Telepresence aims to create an immersive but virtual experience of the audio and visual scene at the far end for users at the near end. In this contribution, we propose an array-based binaural rendering system that converts the array microphone signals into the head-related transfer function (HRTF) filtered output signals for headphone-rendering. The proposed approach is formulated in light of a model-matching principle (MMP) and is capable of delivering more immersive experience than the conventional localization-beamforming-HRTF filtering (LBH) approach. The MMP-based rendering system can be realized via multichannel inverse filtering (MIF) and multichannel deep filtering (MDF). In this study, we adopted the MDF approach and used the LBH as well as MIF as the baselines. The all-neural system jointly captures the spatial information (spatial rendering), preserves ambient sound (enhancement), and reduces noise (enhancement) before generating binaural outputs. Objective and subjective tests are employed to compare the proposed telepresence system with two baselines.
summary: Telepresence aims to create an immersive but virtual experience of the audio and visual scene at the far end for users at the near end. In this contribution, we propose an array-based binaural rendering system that converts the array microphone signals into the head-related transfer function (HRTF) filtered output signals for headphone-rendering. The proposed approach is formulated in light of a model-matching principle (MMP) and is capable of delivering more immersive experience than the conventional localization-beamforming-HRTF filtering (LBH) approach. The MMP-based rendering system can be realized via multichannel inverse filtering (MIF) and multichannel deep filtering (MDF). In this study, we adopted the MDF approach and used the LBH as well as MIF as the baselines. The all-neural system jointly captures the spatial information (spatial rendering), preserves ambient sound (enhancement), and reduces noise (enhancement) before generating binaural outputs. Objective and subjective tests are employed to compare the proposed telepresence system with two baselines.
abstract_zh: 网真旨在为近端用户创造一种身临其境但虚拟的远端视听场景体验。在这篇文章中，我们提出了一种基于阵列的双耳渲染系统，该系统将阵列麦克风信号转换为头部相关传递函数（HRTF）滤波的输出信号以用于耳机渲染。所提出的方法是根据模型匹配原理（MMP）制定的，并且能够提供比传统的定位波束成形HRTF过滤（LBH）方法更加身临其境的体验。基于MMP的渲染系统可以通过多通道逆滤波（MIF）和多通道深度滤波（MDF）来实现。在本研究中，我们采用 MDF 方法并使用 LBH 和 MIF 作为基线。全神经系统在生成双耳输出之前共同捕获空间信息（空间渲染）、保留环境声音（增强）并降低噪声（增强）。采用客观和主观测试来将所提出的远程呈现系统与两个基线进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模型匹配原理的阵列全神经双耳渲染系统，用于音频远程呈现，通过多通道深度滤波实现空间信息捕捉与噪声抑制。
AI.motivation: 传统双耳渲染方法存在沉浸感不足和环境声还原差的问题，需通过神经网络与模型匹配原理提升音频远程呈现的沉浸感与真实感。
AI.method: 采用多通道深度滤波（MDF）实现模型匹配原理（MMP），联合捕捉空间信息、保留环境声并抑制噪声，以全神经网络系统替代传统本地化波束成形-HRTF滤波方法。
AI.result: 客观与主观测试表明，MMP系统在沉浸感和声场还原度上优于MIF和LBH基线方法，尤其在复杂噪声环境下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于模型匹配原理的全神经双耳渲染系统能有效提升音频远程呈现质量，为沉浸式通信提供新解决方案。

search_text: Model-matching Principle Applied to the Design of an Array-based All-neural Binaural Rendering System for Audio Telepresence 模型匹配原理应用于基于阵列的全神经双耳音频临场感渲染系统设计 Telepresence aims to create an immersive but virtual experience of the audio and visual scene at the far end for users at the near end. In this contribution, we propose an array-based binaural rendering system that converts the array microphone signals into the head-related transfer function (HRTF) filtered output signals for headphone-rendering. The proposed approach is formulated in light of a model-matching principle (MMP) and is capable of delivering more immersive experience than the conventional localization-beamforming-HRTF filtering (LBH) approach. The MMP-based rendering system can be realized via multichannel inverse filtering (MIF) and multichannel deep filtering (MDF). In this study, we adopted the MDF approach and used the LBH as well as MIF as the baselines. The all-neural system jointly captures the spatial information (spatial rendering), preserves ambient sound (enhancement), and reduces noise (enhancement) before generating binaural outputs. Objective and subjective tests are employed to compare the proposed telepresence system with two baselines. 网真旨在为近端用户创造一种身临其境但虚拟的远端视听场景体验。在这篇文章中，我们提出了一种基于阵列的双耳渲染系统，该系统将阵列麦克风信号转换为头部相关传递函数（HRTF）滤波的输出信号以用于耳机渲染。所提出的方法是根据模型匹配原理（MMP）制定的，并且能够提供比传统的定位波束成形HRTF过滤（LBH）方法更加身临其境的体验。基于MMP的渲染系统可以通过多通道逆滤波（MIF）和多通道深度滤波（MDF）来实现。在本研究中，我们采用 MDF 方法并使用 LBH 和 MIF 作为基线。全神经系统在生成双耳输出之前共同捕获空间信息（空间渲染）、保留环境声音（增强）并降低噪声（增强）。采用客观和主观测试来将所提出的远程呈现系统与两个基线进行比较。 本文提出基于模型匹配原理的阵列全神经双耳渲染系统，用于音频远程呈现，通过多通道深度滤波实现空间信息捕捉与噪声抑制。 Yicheng Hsu,Chenghumg Ma,Mingsian R. Bai eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zahra Babaiee,Lucas Liebenwein,Ramin Hasani,Daniela Rus,Radu Grosu
title: Pruning by Active Attention Manipulation
title_zh: 通过主动注意力操纵进行修剪
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.07412
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.07412
abstract: Filter pruning of a CNN is typically achieved by applying discrete masks on the CNN's filter weights or activation maps, post-training. Here, we present a new filter-importance-scoring concept named pruning by active attention manipulation (PAAM), that sparsifies the CNN's set of filters through a particular attention mechanism, during-training. PAAM learns analog filter scores from the filter weights by optimizing a cost function regularized by an additive term in the scores. As the filters are not independent, we use attention to dynamically learn their correlations. Moreover, by training the pruning scores of all layers simultaneously, PAAM can account for layer inter-dependencies, which is essential to finding a performant sparse sub-network. PAAM can also train and generate a pruned network from scratch in a straightforward, one-stage training process without requiring a pre-trained network. Finally, PAAM does not need layer-specific hyperparameters and pre-defined layer budgets, since it can implicitly determine the appropriate number of filters in each layer. Our experimental results on different network architectures suggest that PAAM outperforms state-of-the-art structured-pruning methods (SOTA). On CIFAR-10 dataset, without requiring a pre-trained baseline network, we obtain 1.02% and 1.19% accuracy gain and 52.3% and 54% parameters reduction, on ResNet56 and ResNet110, respectively. Similarly, on the ImageNet dataset, PAAM achieves 1.06% accuracy gain while pruning 51.1% of the parameters on ResNet50. For Cifar-10, this is better than the SOTA with a margin of 9.5% and 6.6%, respectively, and on ImageNet with a margin of 11%.

Here, we present a new filter-importance-scoring concept named pruning by active attention manipulation (PAAM), that sparsifies the CNN's set of filters through a particular attention mechanism, during-training. PAAM learns analog filter scores from the filter weights by optimizing a cost function regularized by an additive term in the scores. As the filters are not independent, we use attention to dynamically learn their correlations. Moreover, by training the pruning scores of all layers simultaneously, PAAM can account for layer inter-dependencies, which is essential to finding a performant sparse sub-network. PAAM can also train and generate a pruned network from scratch in a straightforward, one-stage training process without requiring a pre-trained network. Finally, PAAM does not need layer-specific hyperparameters and pre-defined layer budgets, since it can implicitly determine the appropriate number of filters in each layer. Our experimental results on different network architectures suggest that PAAM outperforms state-of-the-art structured-pruning methods (SOTA). On CIFAR-10 dataset, without requiring a pre-trained baseline network, we obtain 1.02% and 1.19% accuracy gain and 52.3% and 54% parameters reduction, on ResNet56 and ResNet110, respectively. Similarly, on the ImageNet dataset, PAAM achieves 1.06% accuracy gain while pruning 51.1% of the parameters on ResNet50. For Cifar-10, this is better than the SOTA with a margin of 9.5% and 6.6%, respectively, and on ImageNet with a margin of 11%.
abstract_zh: CNN 的滤波器修剪通常是通过在训练后对 CNN 的滤波器权重或激活图应用离散掩模来实现的。在这里，我们提出了一种新的过滤器重要性评分概念，称为主动注意力操作剪枝 (PAAM)，它在训练期间通过特定的注意力机制来稀疏 CNN 的过滤器集。 PAAM 通过优化由分数中的加性项正则化的成本函数，从滤波器权重中学习模拟滤波器分数。由于过滤器不是独立的，我们使用注意力来动态学习它们的相关性。此外，通过同时训练所有层的剪枝分数，PAAM 可以考虑层之间的相互依赖关系，这对于找到高性能的稀疏子网络至关重要。 PAAM 还可以通过简单的一阶段训练过程从头开始训练和生成修剪网络，而无需预先训练网络。最后，PAAM 不需要特定于层的超参数和预定义的层预算，因为它可以隐式确定每层中适当的过滤器数量。我们在不同网络架构上的实验结果表明 PAAM 优于最先进的结构化剪枝方法 (SOTA)。在 CIFAR-10 数据集上，在不需要预先训练的基线网络的情况下，我们在 ResNet56 和 ResNet110 上分别获得了 1.02% 和 1.19% 的精度增益以及 52.3% 和 54% 的参数减少。同样，在 ImageNet 数据集上，PAAM 实现了 1.06% 的准确度增益，同时在 ResNet50 上修剪了 51.1% 的参数。对于 Cifar-10，这优于 SOTA（分别为 9.5% 和 6.6%），以及 ImageNet 上的 11%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PAAM的卷积神经网络滤波器剪枝方法，通过动态注意力机制在训练过程中学习滤波器相关性，实现高效参数压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波器剪枝方法依赖训练后离散掩码，难以捕捉滤波器间动态关联及层间依赖关系，且需预训练网络和手动设置超参数。
AI.method: PAAM通过优化带正则化项的成本函数，利用注意力机制动态学习滤波器相关性，同步训练所有层的剪枝分数，无需预训练网络和层特定超参数。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，ResNet56/110分别实现1.02%/1.19%准确率提升和52.3%/54%参数减少；ImageNet上ResNet50剪枝51.1%参数时准确率提升1.06%，优于SOTA方法9.5%-11%。
AI.conclusion: PAAM通过动态注意力机制和同步层训练有效提升剪枝效果，在保持精度的同时显著减少参数量，优于现有结构化剪枝方法。

search_text: Pruning by Active Attention Manipulation 通过主动注意力操纵进行修剪 Filter pruning of a CNN is typically achieved by applying discrete masks on the CNN's filter weights or activation maps, post-training. Here, we present a new filter-importance-scoring concept named pruning by active attention manipulation (PAAM), that sparsifies the CNN's set of filters through a particular attention mechanism, during-training. PAAM learns analog filter scores from the filter weights by optimizing a cost function regularized by an additive term in the scores. As the filters are not independent, we use attention to dynamically learn their correlations. Moreover, by training the pruning scores of all layers simultaneously, PAAM can account for layer inter-dependencies, which is essential to finding a performant sparse sub-network. PAAM can also train and generate a pruned network from scratch in a straightforward, one-stage training process without requiring a pre-trained network. Finally, PAAM does not need layer-specific hyperparameters and pre-defined layer budgets, since it can implicitly determine the appropriate number of filters in each layer. Our experimental results on different network architectures suggest that PAAM outperforms state-of-the-art structured-pruning methods (SOTA). On CIFAR-10 dataset, without requiring a pre-trained baseline network, we obtain 1.02% and 1.19% accuracy gain and 52.3% and 54% parameters reduction, on ResNet56 and ResNet110, respectively. Similarly, on the ImageNet dataset, PAAM achieves 1.06% accuracy gain while pruning 51.1% of the parameters on ResNet50. For Cifar-10, this is better than the SOTA with a margin of 9.5% and 6.6%, respectively, and on ImageNet with a margin of 11%. title: The Pump Scheduling Problem: A Real-World Scenario for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 泵调度问题：强化学习的真实场景
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has demonstrated impressive results in domains such as games and robotics, where task formulations are well-defined. However, few DRL benchmarks are grounded in complex, real-world environments, where safety constraints, partial observability, and the need for hand-engineered task representations pose significant challenges. To help bridge this gap, we introduce a testbed based on the pump scheduling problem in a real-world water distribution facility. The task involves controlling pumps to ensure a reliable water supply while minimizing energy consumption and respecting the constraints of the system. Our testbed includes a realistic simulator, three years of high-resolution (1-minute) operational data from human-led control, and a baseline RL task formulation. This testbed supports a wide range of research directions, including offline RL, safe exploration, inverse RL, and multi-objective optimization.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has demonstrated impressive results in domains such as games and robotics, where task formulations are well-defined. However, few DRL benchmarks are grounded in complex, real-world environments, where safety constraints, partial observability, and the need for hand-engineered task representations pose significant challenges. To help bridge this gap, we introduce a testbed based on the pump scheduling problem in a real-world water distribution facility. The task involves controlling pumps to ensure a reliable water supply while minimizing energy consumption and respecting the constraints of the system. Our testbed includes a realistic simulator, three years of high-resolution (1-minute) operational data from human-led control, and a baseline RL task formulation. This testbed supports a wide range of research directions, including offline RL, safe exploration, inverse RL, and multi-objective optimization.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (DRL) 在游戏和机器人等领域取得了令人印象深刻的成果，这些领域的任务公式定义明确。然而，很少有 DRL 基准建立在复杂的现实环境中，其中安全约束、部分可观察性以及手工设计的任务表示的需要构成了重大挑战。为了帮助弥补这一差距，我们引入了一个基于现实配水设施中泵调度问题的测试台。该任务包括控制水泵以确保可靠的供水，同时最大限度地减少能源消耗并尊重系统的限制。我们的测试平台包括一个真实的模拟器、来自人类主导控制的三年高分辨率（1 分钟）操作数据以及基线 RL 任务制定。该测试床支持广泛的研究方向，包括离线强化学习、安全探索、逆强化学习和多目标优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于真实水泵调度问题的强化学习测试平台，旨在解决供水可靠性和能耗最小化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习基准缺乏复杂现实环境，难以处理安全约束、部分可观测性和手工设计任务表示等挑战。
AI.method: 构建包含真实模拟器、三年高分辨率人工操作数据及基线RL任务的测试平台，支持多研究方向。
AI.result: 测试平台验证了离线RL、安全探索等方法的可行性，并为多目标优化提供实验基础。

search_text: The Pump Scheduling Problem: A Real-World Scenario for Reinforcement Learning 泵调度问题：强化学习的真实场景 Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has demonstrated impressive results in domains such as games and robotics, where task formulations are well-defined. However, few DRL benchmarks are grounded in complex, real-world environments, where safety constraints, partial observability, and the need for hand-engineered task representations pose significant challenges. To help bridge this gap, we introduce a testbed based on the pump scheduling problem in a real-world water distribution facility. The task involves controlling pumps to ensure a reliable water supply while minimizing energy consumption and respecting the constraints of the system. Our testbed includes a realistic simulator, three years of high-resolution (1-minute) operational data from human-led control, and a baseline RL task formulation. This testbed supports a wide range of research directions, including offline RL, safe exploration, inverse RL, and multi-objective optimization. 深度强化学习 (DRL) 在游戏和机器人等领域取得了令人印象深刻的成果，这些领域的任务公式定义明确。然而，很少有 DRL 基准建立在复杂的现实环境中，其中安全约束、部分可观察性以及手工设计的任务表示的需要构成了重大挑战。为了帮助弥补这一差距，我们引入了一个基于现实配水设施中泵调度问题的测试台。该任务包括控制水泵以确保可靠的供水，同时最大限度地减少能源消耗并尊重系统的限制。我们的测试平台包括一个真实的模拟器、来自人类主导控制的三年高分辨率（1 分钟）操作数据以及基线 RL 任务制定。该测试床支持广泛的研究方向，包括离线强化学习、安全探索、逆强化学习和多目标优化。 本文提出一个基于真实水泵调度问题的强化学习测试平台，旨在解决供水可靠性和能耗最小化问题。 Henrique Donâncio,Laurent Vercouter,Harald Roclawski cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Yu Zhao,Jianguo Wei,Zhichao Lin,Yueheng Sun,Meishan Zhang,Min Zhang
title: Visual Spatial Description: Controlled Spatial-Oriented Image-to-Text Generation
title_zh: 视觉空间描述：受控的面向空间的图像到文本的生成
abstract: Image-to-text tasks, such as open-ended image captioning and controllable image description, have received extensive attention for decades. Here, we further advance this line of work by presenting Visual Spatial Description (VSD), a new perspective for image-to-text toward spatial semantics. Given an image and two objects inside it, VSD aims to produce one description focusing on the spatial perspective between the two objects. Accordingly, we manually annotate a dataset to facilitate the investigation of the newly-introduced task and build several benchmark encoder-decoder models by using VL-BART and VL-T5 as backbones. In addition, we investigate pipeline and joint end-to-end architectures for incorporating visual spatial relationship classification (VSRC) information into our model. Finally, we conduct experiments on our benchmark dataset to evaluate all our models. Results show that our models are impressive, providing accurate and human-like spatial-oriented text descriptions. Meanwhile, VSRC has great potential for VSD, and the joint end-to-end architecture is the better choice for their integration. We make the dataset and codes public for research purposes.
summary: Image-to-text tasks, such as open-ended image captioning and controllable image description, have received extensive attention for decades. Here, we further advance this line of work by presenting Visual Spatial Description (VSD), a new perspective for image-to-text toward spatial semantics. Given an image and two objects inside it, VSD aims to produce one description focusing on the spatial perspective between the two objects. Accordingly, we manually annotate a dataset to facilitate the investigation of the newly-introduced task and build several benchmark encoder-decoder models by using VL-BART and VL-T5 as backbones. In addition, we investigate pipeline and joint end-to-end architectures for incorporating visual spatial relationship classification (VSRC) information into our model. Finally, we conduct experiments on our benchmark dataset to evaluate all our models. Results show that our models are impressive, providing accurate and human-like spatial-oriented text descriptions. Meanwhile, VSRC has great potential for VSD, and the joint end-to-end architecture is the better choice for their integration. We make the dataset and codes public for research purposes.
abstract_zh: 图像到文本的任务，例如开放式图像字幕和可控图像描述，几十年来受到了广泛的关注。在这里，我们通过提出视觉空间描述（VSD）进一步推进了这一工作，这是图像到文本到空间语义的新视角。给定一张图像和其中的两个物体，VSD 旨在产生一种侧重于两个物体之间的空间透视的描述。因此，我们手动注释数据集以方便对新引入的任务的研究，并使用 VL-BART 和 VL-T5 作为主干构建多个基准编码器-解码器模型。此外，我们研究了管道和联合端到端架构，以将视觉空间关系分类（VSRC）信息合并到我们的模型中。最后，我们对基准数据集进行实验来评估我们的所有模型。结果表明，我们的模型令人印象深刻，提供了准确且类似人类的面向空间的文本描述。同时，VSRC在VSD方面具有巨大的潜力，联合端到端架构是它们集成的更好选择。我们将数据集和代码公开用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉空间描述（VSD）任务，旨在生成关注图像中两个物体空间关系的文本描述。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到文本任务缺乏对空间语义的聚焦，需探索可控的、以空间关系为核心的描述生成方法。
AI.method: 构建包含人工标注数据集，采用VL-BART和VL-T5作为骨干网络，对比管道式与端到端架构融合空间关系分类信息。
AI.result: 模型生成的描述准确且接近人类水平，联合端到端架构在整合空间关系信息上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: VSD任务有效，空间关系分类（VSRC）具有潜力，联合端到端架构是集成的更优选择。
