Here, we further advance this line of work by presenting Visual Spatial Description (VSD), a new perspective for image-to-text toward spatial semantics. Given an image and two objects inside it, VSD aims to produce one description focusing on the spatial perspective between the two objects. Accordingly, we manually annotate a dataset to facilitate the investigation of the newly-introduced task and build several benchmark encoder-decoder models by using VL-BART and VL-T5 as backbones. Finally, we conduct experiments on our benchmark dataset to evaluate all our models. Results show that our models are impressive, providing accurate and human-like spatial-oriented text descriptions. Meanwhile, VSRC has great potential for VSD, and the joint end-to-end architecture is the better choice for their integration. title: Robust One-Shot Singing Voice Conversion
title_zh: 强大的一次性歌声转换
abstract: Recent progress in deep generative models has improved the quality of voice conversion in the speech domain. However, high-quality singing voice conversion (SVC) of unseen singers remains challenging due to the wider variety of musical expressions in pitch, loudness, and pronunciation. Moreover, singing voices are often recorded with reverb and accompaniment music, which make SVC even more challenging. In this work, we present a robust one-shot SVC (ROSVC) that performs any-to-any SVC robustly even on such distorted singing voices. To this end, we first propose a one-shot SVC model based on generative adversarial networks that generalizes to unseen singers via partial domain conditioning and learns to accurately recover the target pitch via pitch distribution matching and AdaIN-skip conditioning. We then propose a two-stage training method called Robustify that train the one-shot SVC model in the first stage on clean data to ensure high-quality conversion, and introduces enhancement modules to the encoders of the model in the second stage to enhance the feature extraction from distorted singing voices. To further improve the voice quality and pitch reconstruction accuracy, we finally propose a hierarchical diffusion model for singing voice neural vocoders. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art one-shot SVC baselines for both seen and unseen singers and significantly improves the robustness against distortions.
summary: Recent progress in deep generative models has improved the quality of voice conversion in the speech domain. However, high-quality singing voice conversion (SVC) of unseen singers remains challenging due to the wider variety of musical expressions in pitch, loudness, and pronunciation. Moreover, singing voices are often recorded with reverb and accompaniment music, which make SVC even more challenging. In this work, we present a robust one-shot SVC (ROSVC) that performs any-to-any SVC robustly even on such distorted singing voices. To this end, we first propose a one-shot SVC model based on generative adversarial networks that generalizes to unseen singers via partial domain conditioning and learns to accurately recover the target pitch via pitch distribution matching and AdaIN-skip conditioning. We then propose a two-stage training method called Robustify that train the one-shot SVC model in the first stage on clean data to ensure high-quality conversion, and introduces enhancement modules to the encoders of the model in the second stage to enhance the feature extraction from distorted singing voices. To further improve the voice quality and pitch reconstruction accuracy, we finally propose a hierarchical diffusion model for singing voice neural vocoders. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art one-shot SVC baselines for both seen and unseen singers and significantly improves the robustness against distortions.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型的最新进展提高了语音领域语音转换的质量。然而，由于音调、响度和发音方面的音乐表现形式更加多样，对看不见的歌手进行高质量歌声转换 (SVC) 仍然具有挑战性。而且，歌声的录制往往带有混响和伴奏音乐，这使得SVC更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种强大的一次性 SVC (ROSVC)，即使在这种失真的歌声上也能稳健地执行任意对任意的 SVC。为此，我们首先提出一种基于生成对抗网络的一次性 SVC 模型，该模型通过部分域调节推广到看不见的歌手，并学习通过音高分布匹配和 AdaIN-skip 调节准确恢复目标音高。然后，我们提出了一种名为 Robustify 的两阶段训练方法，在第一阶段在干净的数据上训练一次性 SVC 模型，以确保高质量的转换，并在第二阶段的模型编码器中引入增强模块，以增强从失真歌声中提取特征。为了进一步提高语音质量和音调重建精度，我们最终提出了一种用于歌声神经声码器的分层扩散模型。实验结果表明，对于见过和未见过的歌手，所提出的方法都优于最先进的一次性 SVC 基线，并显着提高了针对失真的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的一次性唱歌语音转换方法（ROSVC），旨在处理包含混响和伴奏等干扰的未见歌手的歌唱语音转换任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度生成模型提升了语音转换质量，但歌唱语音因音高、音量和发音的多样性，以及混响和伴奏的干扰，使得未见歌手的高质量转换仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络构建一次性SVC模型，通过部分领域条件和音高分布匹配实现未见歌手泛化；采用两阶段训练方法Robustify，先在干净数据上训练确保质量，再引入增强模块提升对失真语音的特征提取能力；最后提出分层扩散模型优化神经声码器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在已见和未见歌手的转换任务中均优于现有基线，并显著提升了对失真干扰的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ROSVC通过多阶段训练和分层扩散模型有效解决了歌唱语音转换中的领域泛化与失真鲁棒性问题，为实际应用提供了更可靠的技术方案。

search_text: Robust One-Shot Singing Voice Conversion 强大的一次性歌声转换 Recent progress in deep generative models has improved the quality of voice conversion in the speech domain. However, high-quality singing voice conversion (SVC) of unseen singers remains challenging due to the wider variety of musical expressions in pitch, loudness, and pronunciation. Moreover, singing voices are often recorded with reverb and accompaniment music, which make SVC even more challenging. In this work, we present a robust one-shot SVC (ROSVC) that performs any-to-any SVC robustly even on such distorted singing voices. To this end, we first propose a one-shot SVC model based on generative adversarial networks that generalizes to unseen singers via partial domain conditioning and learns to accurately recover the target pitch via pitch distribution matching and AdaIN-skip conditioning. We then propose a two-stage training method called Robustify that train the one-shot SVC model in the first stage on clean data to ensure high-quality conversion, and introduces enhancement modules to the encoders of the model in the second stage to enhance the feature extraction from distorted singing voices. To further improve the voice quality and pitch reconstruction accuracy, we finally propose a hierarchical diffusion model for singing voice neural vocoders. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art one-shot SVC baselines for both seen and unseen singers and significantly improves the robustness against distortions. 深度生成模型的最新进展提高了语音领域语音转换的质量。然而，由于音调、响度和发音方面的音乐表现形式更加多样，对看不见的歌手进行高质量歌声转换 (SVC) 仍然具有挑战性。而且，歌声的录制往往带有混响和伴奏音乐，这使得SVC更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种强大的一次性 SVC (ROSVC)，即使在这种失真的歌声上也能稳健地执行任意对任意的 SVC。为此，我们首先提出一种基于生成对抗网络的一次性 SVC 模型，该模型通过部分域调节推广到看不见的歌手，并学习通过音高分布匹配和 AdaIN-skip 调节准确恢复目标音高。然后，我们提出了一种名为 Robustify 的两阶段训练方法，在第一阶段在干净的数据上训练一次性 SVC 模型，以确保高质量的转换，并在第二阶段的模型编码器中引入增强模块，以增强从失真歌声中提取特征。为了进一步提高语音质量和音调重建精度，我们最终提出了一种用于歌声神经声码器的分层扩散模型。实验结果表明，对于见过和未见过的歌手，所提出的方法都优于最先进的一次性 SVC 基线，并显着提高了针对失真的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种鲁棒的一次性唱歌语音转换方法（ROSVC），旨在处理包含混响和伴奏等干扰的未见歌手的歌唱语音转换任务。 Naoya Takahashi,Mayank Kumar Singh,Yuki Mitsufuji cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Sai Raam Venkataraman,S. Balasubramanian,R. Raghunatha Sarma
title: Iterative collaborative routing among equivariant capsules for transformation-robust capsule networks
title_zh: 用于变换鲁棒胶囊网络的等变胶囊之间的迭代协作路由
abstract: Transformation-robustness is an important feature for machine learning models that perform image classification. Many methods aim to bestow this property to models by the use of data augmentation strategies, while more formal guarantees are obtained via the use of equivariant models. We recognise that compositional, or part-whole structure is also an important aspect of images that has to be considered for building transformation-robust models. Thus, we propose a capsule network model that is, at once, equivariant and compositionality-aware. Equivariance of our capsule network model comes from the use of equivariant convolutions in a carefully-chosen novel architecture. The awareness of compositionality comes from the use of our proposed novel, iterative, graph-based routing algorithm, termed Iterative collaborative routing (ICR). ICR, the core of our contribution, weights the predictions made for capsules based on an iteratively averaged score of the degree-centralities of its nearest neighbours. Experiments on transformed image classification on FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 show that our model that uses ICR outperforms convolutional and capsule baselines to achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Transformation-robustness is an important feature for machine learning models that perform image classification. Many methods aim to bestow this property to models by the use of data augmentation strategies, while more formal guarantees are obtained via the use of equivariant models. We recognise that compositional, or part-whole structure is also an important aspect of images that has to be considered for building transformation-robust models. Thus, we propose a capsule network model that is, at once, equivariant and compositionality-aware. Equivariance of our capsule network model comes from the use of equivariant convolutions in a carefully-chosen novel architecture. The awareness of compositionality comes from the use of our proposed novel, iterative, graph-based routing algorithm, termed Iterative collaborative routing (ICR). ICR, the core of our contribution, weights the predictions made for capsules based on an iteratively averaged score of the degree-centralities of its nearest neighbours. Experiments on transformed image classification on FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 show that our model that uses ICR outperforms convolutional and capsule baselines to achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 转换鲁棒性是执行图像分类的机器学习模型的一个重要特征。许多方法旨在通过使用数据增强策略将这种属性赋予模型，而更正式的保证是通过使用等变模型获得的。我们认识到，组成或部分整体结构也是图像的一个重要方面，在构建稳健的变换模型时必须考虑这一点。因此，我们提出了一种胶囊网络模型，该模型同时具有等变性和组合性意识。我们的胶囊网络模型的等变性来自于在精心选择的新颖架构中使用等变卷积。对组合性的认识来自于我们提出的新颖的、迭代的、基于图的路由算法的使用，称为迭代协作路由（ICR）。 ICR 是我们贡献的核心，它根据最近邻的度中心性的迭代平均得分来对胶囊的预测进行加权。在 FashionMNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上进行的转换图像分类实验表明，我们使用 ICR 的模型优于卷积和胶囊基线，实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种兼具等变性和组合性感知的胶囊网络模型，通过迭代协作路由算法提升图像分类的变换鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过数据增强或等变模型实现变换鲁棒性，但忽视了图像的组合结构（部分-整体关系）对鲁棒性的影响，需结合等变性与组合性感知机制。
AI.method: 设计等变卷积架构并提出迭代协作路由（ICR）算法，通过图结构动态计算胶囊间邻居节点的度中心性加权预测。
AI.result: 在FashionMNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，该模型在变换图像分类任务中超越卷积和胶囊基线方法，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 融合等变性与组合性感知机制的胶囊网络能有效提升变换鲁棒性，ICR算法为胶囊网络路由提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tien-Cuong Bui,Van-Duc Le,Wen-syan Li,Sang Kyun Cha
title: Toward Multiple Specialty Learners for Explaining GNNs via Online Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 面向多个专业学习者通过在线知识蒸馏解释 GNN
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures, A preliminary paper under review of IEEE ICDE 2023
comments: 13 pages, 11 figures, A preliminary paper under review of IEEE ICDE 2023
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become increasingly ubiquitous in numerous applications and systems, necessitating explanations of their predictions, especially when making critical decisions. However, explaining GNNs is challenging due to the complexity of graph data and model execution. Despite additional computational costs, post-hoc explanation approaches have been widely adopted due to the generality of their architectures. Intrinsically interpretable models provide instant explanations but are usually model-specific, which can only explain particular GNNs. Therefore, we propose a novel GNN explanation framework named SCALE, which is general and fast for explaining predictions. SCALE trains multiple specialty learners to explain GNNs since constructing one powerful explainer to examine attributions of interactions in input graphs is complicated. In training, a black-box GNN model guides learners based on an online knowledge distillation paradigm. In the explanation phase, explanations of predictions are provided by multiple explainers corresponding to trained learners. Specifically, edge masking and random walk with restart procedures are executed to provide structural explanations for graph-level and node-level predictions, respectively. A feature attribution module provides overall summaries and instance-level feature contributions. We compare SCALE with state-of-the-art baselines via quantitative and qualitative experiments to prove its explanation correctness and execution performance. We also conduct a series of ablation studies to understand the strengths and weaknesses of the proposed framework.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become increasingly ubiquitous in numerous applications and systems, necessitating explanations of their predictions, especially when making critical decisions. However, explaining GNNs is challenging due to the complexity of graph data and model execution. Despite additional computational costs, post-hoc explanation approaches have been widely adopted due to the generality of their architectures. Intrinsically interpretable models provide instant explanations but are usually model-specific, which can only explain particular GNNs. Therefore, we propose a novel GNN explanation framework named SCALE, which is general and fast for explaining predictions. SCALE trains multiple specialty learners to explain GNNs since constructing one powerful explainer to examine attributions of interactions in input graphs is complicated. In training, a black-box GNN model guides learners based on an online knowledge distillation paradigm. In the explanation phase, explanations of predictions are provided by multiple explainers corresponding to trained learners. Specifically, edge masking and random walk with restart procedures are executed to provide structural explanations for graph-level and node-level predictions, respectively. A feature attribution module provides overall summaries and instance-level feature contributions. We compare SCALE with state-of-the-art baselines via quantitative and qualitative experiments to prove its explanation correctness and execution performance. We also conduct a series of ablation studies to understand the strengths and weaknesses of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 在众多应用程序和系统中变得越来越普遍，需要对其预测进行解释，尤其是在做出关键决策时。然而，由于图数据和模型执行的复杂性，解释 GNN 具有挑战性。尽管存在额外的计算成本，但事后解释方法由于其架构的通用性而被广泛采用。本质上可解释的模型提供即时解释，但通常是特定于模型的，只能解释特定的 GNN。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 GNN 解释框架 SCALE，它通用且快速地解释预测。 SCALE 训练多个专业学习者来解释 GNN，因为构建一个强大的解释器来检查输入图中交互的属性非常复杂。在训练中，黑盒 GNN 模型基于在线知识蒸馏范式指导学习者。在解释阶段，预测的解释由与训练有素的学习者相对应的多个解释者提供。具体来说，执行边缘屏蔽和带有重启过程的随机游走，分别为图级和节点级预测提供结构解释。特征归因模块提供总体摘要和实例级特征贡献。我们通过定量和定性实验将 SCALE 与最先进的基线进行比较，以证明其解释的正确性和执行性能。我们还进行了一系列消融研究，以了解所提出框架的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SCALE的新型图神经网络（GNN）解释框架，通过在线知识蒸馏训练多个专业解释器以实现快速且通用的GNN预测解释。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN解释方法存在计算成本高或模型特定性限制，难以兼顾通用性与效率，需开发更高效且适用于多种GNN的解释框架。
AI.method: SCALE框架通过在线知识蒸馏机制，利用黑盒GNN模型指导多个专业解释器训练，结合边掩码和重启随机游走生成结构解释，并通过特征归因模块提供整体与实例级解释。
AI.result: 实验表明SCALE在定量与定性评估中优于现有基线方法，且通过消融实验验证了其方法的有效性与优势。
AI.conclusion: SCALE通过多解释器协作与在线知识蒸馏，实现了对GNN预测的高效、通用解释，为复杂图模型的可解释性研究提供了新思路。

A feature attribution module provides overall summaries and instance-level feature contributions. We compare SCALE with state-of-the-art baselines via quantitative and qualitative experiments to prove its explanation correctness and execution performance. We also conduct a series of ablation studies to understand the strengths and weaknesses of the proposed framework. 图神经网络 (GNN) 在众多应用程序和系统中变得越来越普遍，需要对其预测进行解释，尤其是在做出关键决策时。然而，由于图数据和模型执行的复杂性，解释 GNN 具有挑战性。尽管存在额外的计算成本，但事后解释方法由于其架构的通用性而被广泛采用。本质上可解释的模型提供即时解释，但通常是特定于模型的，只能解释特定的 GNN。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 GNN 解释框架 SCALE，它通用且快速地解释预测。 SCALE 训练多个专业学习者来解释 GNN，因为构建一个强大的解释器来检查输入图中交互的属性非常复杂。在训练中，黑盒 GNN 模型基于在线知识蒸馏范式指导学习者。在解释阶段，预测的解释由与训练有素的学习者相对应的多个解释者提供。具体来说，执行边缘屏蔽和带有重启过程的随机游走，分别为图级和节点级预测提供结构解释。特征归因模块提供总体摘要和实例级特征贡献。我们通过定量和定性实验将 SCALE 与最先进的基线进行比较，以证明其解释的正确性和执行性能。我们还进行了一系列消融研究，以了解所提出框架的优点和缺点。 本文提出一种名为SCALE的新型图神经网络（GNN）解释框架，通过在线知识蒸馏训练多个专业解释器以实现快速且通用的GNN预测解释。 Tien-Cuong Bui,Van-Duc Le,Wen-syan Li,Sang Kyun Cha cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sai Raam Venkataraman,S. Balasubramanian,R. Raghunatha Sarma
title: Robustcaps: a transformation-robust capsule network for image classification
title_zh: Robustcaps：用于图像分类的稳健变换胶囊网络
abstract: Geometric transformations of the training data as well as the test data present challenges to the use of deep neural networks to vision-based learning tasks. In order to address this issue, we present a deep neural network model that exhibits the desirable property of transformation-robustness. Our model, termed RobustCaps, uses group-equivariant convolutions in an improved capsule network model. RobustCaps uses a global context-normalised procedure in its routing algorithm to learn transformation-invariant part-whole relationships within image data. This learning of such relationships allows our model to outperform both capsule and convolutional neural network baselines on transformation-robust classification tasks. Specifically, RobustCaps achieves state-of-the-art accuracies on CIFAR-10, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-100 when the images in these datasets are subjected to train and test-time rotations and translations.
summary: Geometric transformations of the training data as well as the test data present challenges to the use of deep neural networks to vision-based learning tasks. In order to address this issue, we present a deep neural network model that exhibits the desirable property of transformation-robustness. Our model, termed RobustCaps, uses group-equivariant convolutions in an improved capsule network model. RobustCaps uses a global context-normalised procedure in its routing algorithm to learn transformation-invariant part-whole relationships within image data. This learning of such relationships allows our model to outperform both capsule and convolutional neural network baselines on transformation-robust classification tasks. Specifically, RobustCaps achieves state-of-the-art accuracies on CIFAR-10, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-100 when the images in these datasets are subjected to train and test-time rotations and translations.
abstract_zh: 训练数据和测试数据的几何变换对使用深度神经网络执行基于视觉的学习任务提出了挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种深度神经网络模型，它表现出理想的变换鲁棒性特性。我们的模型称为 RobustCaps，在改进的胶囊网络模型中使用组等变卷积。 RobustCaps 在其路由算法中使用全局上下文标准化过程来学习图像数据中变换不变的部分-整体关系。这种关系的学习使我们的模型在鲁棒变换分类任务上优于胶囊和卷积神经网络基线。具体来说，当这些数据集中的图像经过训练和测试时旋转和平移时，RobustCaps 在 CIFAR-10、FashionMNIST 和 CIFAR-100 上实现了最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RobustCaps的改进胶囊网络模型，用于解决图像分类中几何变换（如旋转、平移）带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络在处理训练或测试数据中的几何变换时表现不佳，导致分类性能下降，需开发具有变换鲁棒性的模型。
AI.method: 通过引入群等变卷积和全局上下文归一化路由算法，学习图像中具有变换不变性的部分-整体关系，增强模型对旋转和平移的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-100数据集上，经旋转和平移变换后，RobustCaps的分类准确率优于胶囊网络和卷积神经网络基线，达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: RobustCaps通过群等变卷积和改进路由机制有效提升了图像分类的变换鲁棒性，为实际应用中复杂数据条件下的视觉任务提供了新思路。

title: Standardized Medical Image Classification across Medical Disciplines
title_zh: 跨医学学科的标准化医学图像分类
abstract: AUCMEDI is a Python-based framework for medical image classification. In this paper, we evaluate the capabilities of AUCMEDI, by applying it to multiple datasets. Datasets were specifically chosen to cover a variety of medical disciplines and imaging modalities. We designed a simple pipeline using Jupyter notebooks and applied it to all datasets. Results show that AUCMEDI was able to train a model with accurate classification capabilities for each dataset: Averaged AUC per dataset range between 0.82 and 1.0, averaged F1 scores range between 0.61 and 1.0. With its high adaptability and strong performance, AUCMEDI proves to be a powerful instrument to build widely applicable neural networks. The notebooks serve as application examples for AUCMEDI.
summary: AUCMEDI is a Python-based framework for medical image classification. In this paper, we evaluate the capabilities of AUCMEDI, by applying it to multiple datasets. Datasets were specifically chosen to cover a variety of medical disciplines and imaging modalities. We designed a simple pipeline using Jupyter notebooks and applied it to all datasets. Results show that AUCMEDI was able to train a model with accurate classification capabilities for each dataset: Averaged AUC per dataset range between 0.82 and 1.0, averaged F1 scores range between 0.61 and 1.0. With its high adaptability and strong performance, AUCMEDI proves to be a powerful instrument to build widely applicable neural networks. The notebooks serve as application examples for AUCMEDI.
abstract_zh: AUCMEDI 是一个基于 Python 的医学图像分类框架。在本文中，我们通过将 AUCMEDI 应用于多个数据集来评估其功能。数据集经过专门选择，涵盖各种医学学科和成像模式。我们使用 Jupyter Notebook 设计了一个简单的管道，并将其应用于所有数据集。结果表明，AUCMEDI 能够为每个数据集训练出具有准确分类能力的模型：每个数据集的平均 AUC 范围在 0.82 到 1.0 之间，平均 F1 分数范围在 0.61 到 1.0 之间。凭借其高适应性和强大的性能，AUCMEDI 被证明是构建广泛适用的神经网络的强大工具。这些笔记本作为 AUCMEDI 的应用示例。

AI.tldr: 评估AUCMEDI框架在跨医学领域和影像模态的医学图像分类中的有效性
AI.motivation: 开发一个适用于不同医学领域和影像模态的通用医学图像分类框架，以提高模型的适应性和性能
AI.method: 使用Jupyter Notebook构建标准化流水线，应用于多个覆盖不同医学领域和影像模态的数据集进行评估
AI.result: AUC平均值在0.82至1.0之间，F1分数在0.61至1.0之间，显示模型在不同数据集上的高准确性
AI.conclusion: AUCMEDI证明其在跨领域医学图像分类中的高效适应性和强大性能，为构建通用神经网络提供了实用工具

title: Speech Dereverberation with a Reverberation Time Shortening Target
title_zh: 具有混响时间缩短目标的语音去混响
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.08765
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.08765
abstract: This work proposes a new learning target based on reverberation time shortening (RTS) for speech dereverberation. The learning target for dereverberation is usually set as the direct-path speech or optionally with some early reflections. This type of target suddenly truncates the reverberation, and thus it may not be suitable for network training. The proposed RTS target suppresses reverberation and meanwhile maintains the exponential decaying property of reverberation, which will ease the network training, and thus reduce signal distortion caused by the prediction error. Moreover, this work experimentally study to adapt our previously proposed FullSubNet speech denoising network to speech dereverberation. Experiments show that RTS is a more suitable learning target than direct-path speech and early reflections, in terms of better suppressing reverberation and signal distortion. FullSubNet is able to achieve outstanding dereverberation performance.
summary: This work proposes a new learning target based on reverberation time shortening (RTS) for speech dereverberation. The learning target for dereverberation is usually set as the direct-path speech or optionally with some early reflections. This type of target suddenly truncates the reverberation, and thus it may not be suitable for network training. The proposed RTS target suppresses reverberation and meanwhile maintains the exponential decaying property of reverberation, which will ease the network training, and thus reduce signal distortion caused by the prediction error. Moreover, this work experimentally study to adapt our previously proposed FullSubNet speech denoising network to speech dereverberation. Experiments show that RTS is a more suitable learning target than direct-path speech and early reflections, in terms of better suppressing reverberation and signal distortion. FullSubNet is able to achieve outstanding dereverberation performance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种基于混响时间缩短（RTS）的语音去混响新学习目标。去混响的学习目标通常设置为直接路径语音或可选地带有一些早期反射。此类目标会突然截断混响，因此可能不适合网络训练。所提出的RTS目标抑制混响，同时保持混响的指数衰减特性，这将简化网络训练，从而减少由预测误差引起的信号失真。此外，这项工作通过实验研究使我们之前提出的 FullSubNet 语音降噪网络适应语音去混响。实验表明，就更好地抑制混响和信号失真而言，RTS是比直接路径语音和早期反射更合适的学习目标。 FullSubNet能够实现出色的去混响性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混响时间缩短（RTS）的新学习目标，用于语音去混响任务。
AI.motivation: 传统去混响方法使用直达声或早期反射作为学习目标，会导致混响突然截断，影响网络训练并引入信号失真。本文旨在通过保持混响指数衰减特性的RTS目标，优化网络训练过程。
AI.method: 设计RTS学习目标以抑制混响并保留其衰减特性，同时将FullSubNet语音降噪网络适配至去混响任务中。
AI.result: 实验表明，RTS目标在抑制混响和降低信号失真方面优于直达声和早期反射目标，FullSubNet实现了优异的去混响性能。
AI.conclusion: RTS目标更适合作为去混响学习目标，结合FullSubNet可有效提升去混响效果并减少失真。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，RTS目标在抑制混响和降低信号失真方面优于直达声和早期反射目标，FullSubNet实现了优异的去混响性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: RTS目标更适合作为去混响学习目标，结合FullSubNet可有效提升去混响效果并减少失真。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混响时间缩短（RTS）的新学习目标，用于语音去混响任务。
motivation: 传统去混响方法使用直达声或早期反射作为学习目标，会导致混响突然截断，影响网络训练并引入信号失真。本文旨在通过保持混响指数衰减特性的RTS目标，优化网络训练过程。
method: 设计RTS学习目标以抑制混响并保留其衰减特性，同时将FullSubNet语音降噪网络适配至去混响任务中。
result: 实验表明，RTS目标在抑制混响和降低信号失真方面优于直达声和早期反射目标，FullSubNet实现了优异的去混响性能。
conclusion: RTS目标更适合作为去混响学习目标，结合FullSubNet可有效提升去混响效果并减少失真。
search_text: Speech Dereverberation with a Reverberation Time Shortening Target 具有混响时间缩短目标的语音去混响 This work proposes a new learning target based on reverberation time shortening (RTS) for speech dereverberation. The learning target for dereverberation is usually set as the direct-path speech or optionally with some early reflections. This type of target suddenly truncates the reverberation, and thus it may not be suitable for network training. The proposed RTS target suppresses reverberation and meanwhile maintains the exponential decaying property of reverberation, which will ease the network training, and thus reduce signal distortion caused by the prediction error. Moreover, this work experimentally study to adapt our previously proposed FullSubNet speech denoising network to speech dereverberation. Experiments show that RTS is a more suitable learning target than direct-path speech and early reflections, in terms of better suppressing reverberation and signal distortion. FullSubNet is able to achieve outstanding dereverberation performance. 这项工作提出了一种基于混响时间缩短（RTS）的语音去混响新学习目标。去混响的学习目标通常设置为直接路径语音或可选地带有一些早期反射。此类目标会突然截断混响，因此可能不适合网络训练。所提出的RTS目标抑制混响，同时保持混响的指数衰减特性，这将简化网络训练，从而减少由预测误差引起的信号失真。此外，这项工作通过实验研究使我们之前提出的 FullSubNet 语音降噪网络适应语音去混响。实验表明，就更好地抑制混响和信号失真而言，RTS是比直接路径语音和早期反射更合适的学习目标。 FullSubNet能够实现出色的去混响性能。 本文提出了一种基于混响时间缩短（RTS）的新学习目标，用于语音去混响任务。 Rui Zhou,Wenye Zhu,Xiaofei Li eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Angel Romero,Shreedhar Govil,Gonca Yilmaz,Yunlong Song,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Weighted Maximum Likelihood for Controller Tuning
title_zh: 控制器调整的加权最大似然
abstract: Recently, Model Predictive Contouring Control (MPCC) has arisen as the state-of-the-art approach for model-based agile flight. MPCC benefits from great flexibility in trading-off between progress maximization and path following at runtime without relying on globally optimized trajectories. However, finding the optimal set of tuning parameters for MPCC is challenging because (i) the full quadrotor dynamics are non-linear, (ii) the cost function is highly non-convex, and (iii) of the high dimensionality of the hyperparameter space. This paper leverages a probabilistic Policy Search method - Weighted Maximum Likelihood (WML)- to automatically learn the optimal objective for MPCC. WML is sample-efficient due to its closed-form solution for updating the learning parameters. Additionally, the data efficiency provided by the use of a model-based approach allows us to directly train in a high-fidelity simulator, which in turn makes our approach able to transfer zero-shot to the real world. We validate our approach in the real world, where we show that our method outperforms both the previous manually tuned controller and the state-of-the-art auto-tuning baseline reaching speeds of 75 km/h.
summary: Recently, Model Predictive Contouring Control (MPCC) has arisen as the state-of-the-art approach for model-based agile flight. MPCC benefits from great flexibility in trading-off between progress maximization and path following at runtime without relying on globally optimized trajectories. However, finding the optimal set of tuning parameters for MPCC is challenging because (i) the full quadrotor dynamics are non-linear, (ii) the cost function is highly non-convex, and (iii) of the high dimensionality of the hyperparameter space. This paper leverages a probabilistic Policy Search method - Weighted Maximum Likelihood (WML)- to automatically learn the optimal objective for MPCC. WML is sample-efficient due to its closed-form solution for updating the learning parameters. Additionally, the data efficiency provided by the use of a model-based approach allows us to directly train in a high-fidelity simulator, which in turn makes our approach able to transfer zero-shot to the real world. We validate our approach in the real world, where we show that our method outperforms both the previous manually tuned controller and the state-of-the-art auto-tuning baseline reaching speeds of 75 km/h.
abstract_zh: 最近，模型预测轮廓控制（MPCC）作为基于模型的敏捷飞行的最先进方法而出现。 MPCC 受益于在运行时进度最大化和路径跟踪之间进行权衡的巨大灵活性，而不依赖于全局优化的轨迹。然而，找到 MPCC 的最佳调整参数集具有挑战性，因为 (i) 完整的四旋翼飞行器动力学是非线性的，(ii) 成本函数是高度非凸的，以及 (iii) 超参数空间的高维性。本文利用概率策略搜索方法 - 加权最大似然法 (WML) - 自动学习 MPCC 的最佳目标。 WML 由于其用于更新学习参数的封闭式解决方案而具有样本效率。此外，使用基于模型的方法提供的数据效率使我们能够直接在高保真模拟器中进行训练，这反过来又使我们的方法能够将零样本转移到现实世界。我们在现实世界中验证了我们的方法，结果表明我们的方法优于之前的手动调整控制器和最先进的自动调整基线，速度达到 75 公里/小时。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于加权最大似然（WML）的方法，用于自动调整模型预测轮廓控制（MPCC）的参数，以提高四旋翼飞行器的敏捷飞行性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MPCC参数调优面临非线性动力学、非凸成本函数及高维超参数空间的挑战，且依赖人工调参效率低，亟需一种数据高效且可直接迁移至现实环境的自动调参方法。
AI.method: 采用概率策略搜索方法WML，利用其闭式解更新参数以提升样本效率；结合基于模型的高保真仿真训练，实现零样本迁移至真实世界。
AI.result: 在真实环境中验证方法有效性，达到75 km/h的飞行速度，优于手动调参控制器及现有自动调参基线方法。
AI.conclusion: WML方法有效解决了MPCC参数调优的难题，为高动态场景下的控制器自动调参提供了可靠方案。

search_text: Weighted Maximum Likelihood for Controller Tuning 控制器调整的加权最大似然 Recently, Model Predictive Contouring Control (MPCC) has arisen as the state-of-the-art approach for model-based agile flight. MPCC benefits from great flexibility in trading-off between progress maximization and path following at runtime without relying on globally optimized trajectories. However, finding the optimal set of tuning parameters for MPCC is challenging because (i) the full quadrotor dynamics are non-linear, (ii) the cost function is highly non-convex, and (iii) of the high dimensionality of the hyperparameter space. This paper leverages a probabilistic Policy Search method - Weighted Maximum Likelihood (WML)- to automatically learn the optimal objective for MPCC. WML is sample-efficient due to its closed-form solution for updating the learning parameters. Additionally, the data efficiency provided by the use of a model-based approach allows us to directly train in a high-fidelity simulator, which in turn makes our approach able to transfer zero-shot to the real world. We validate our approach in the real world, where we show that our method outperforms both the previous manually tuned controller and the state-of-the-art auto-tuning baseline reaching speeds of 75 km/h. 最近，模型预测轮廓控制（MPCC）作为基于模型的敏捷飞行的最先进方法而出现。 MPCC 受益于在运行时进度最大化和路径跟踪之间进行权衡的巨大灵活性，而不依赖于全局优化的轨迹。然而，找到 MPCC 的最佳调整参数集具有挑战性，因为 (i) 完整的四旋翼飞行器动力学是非线性的，(ii) 成本函数是高度非凸的，以及 (iii) 超参数空间的高维性。本文利用概率策略搜索方法 - 加权最大似然法 (WML) - 自动学习 MPCC 的最佳目标。 WML 由于其用于更新学习参数的封闭式解决方案而具有样本效率。此外，使用基于模型的方法提供的数据效率使我们能够直接在高保真模拟器中进行训练，这反过来又使我们的方法能够将零样本转移到现实世界。我们在现实世界中验证了我们的方法，结果表明我们的方法优于之前的手动调整控制器和最先进的自动调整基线，速度达到 75 公里/小时。 提出一种基于加权最大似然（WML）的方法，用于自动调整模型预测轮廓控制（MPCC）的参数，以提高四旋翼飞行器的敏捷飞行性能。 Angel Romero,Shreedhar Govil,Gonca Yilmaz,Yunlong Song,Davide Scaramuzza cs.RO

authors_text: Zeyue Xue,Jianming Liang,Guanglu Song,Zhuofan Zong,Liang Chen,Yu Liu,Ping Luo
title: Large-batch Optimization for Dense Visual Predictions
title_zh: 密集视觉预测的大批量优化
abstract: Training a large-scale deep neural network in a large-scale dataset is challenging and time-consuming. The recent breakthrough of large-batch optimization is a promising way to tackle this challenge. However, although the current advanced algorithms such as LARS and LAMB succeed in classification models, the complicated pipelines of dense visual predictions such as object detection and segmentation still suffer from the heavy performance drop in the large-batch training regime. To address this challenge, we propose a simple yet effective algorithm, named Adaptive Gradient Variance Modulator (AGVM), which can train dense visual predictors with very large batch size, enabling several benefits more appealing than prior arts. Firstly, AGVM can align the gradient variances between different modules in the dense visual predictors, such as backbone, feature pyramid network (FPN), detection, and segmentation heads. We show that training with a large batch size can fail with the gradient variances misaligned among them, which is a phenomenon primarily overlooked in previous work. Secondly, AGVM is a plug-and-play module that generalizes well to many different architectures (e.g., CNNs and Transformers) and different tasks (e.g., object detection, instance segmentation, semantic segmentation, and panoptic segmentation). It is also compatible with different optimizers (e.g., SGD and AdamW). Thirdly, a theoretical analysis of AGVM is provided. Extensive experiments on the COCO and ADE20K datasets demonstrate the superiority of AGVM. For example, it can train Faster R-CNN+ResNet50 in 4 minutes without losing performance. AGVM enables training an object detector with one billion parameters in just 3.5 hours, reducing the training time by 20.9x, whilst achieving 62.2 mAP on COCO. The deliverables are released at https://github.com/Sense-X/AGVM.
summary: Training a large-scale deep neural network in a large-scale dataset is challenging and time-consuming. The recent breakthrough of large-batch optimization is a promising way to tackle this challenge. However, although the current advanced algorithms such as LARS and LAMB succeed in classification models, the complicated pipelines of dense visual predictions such as object detection and segmentation still suffer from the heavy performance drop in the large-batch training regime. To address this challenge, we propose a simple yet effective algorithm, named Adaptive Gradient Variance Modulator (AGVM), which can train dense visual predictors with very large batch size, enabling several benefits more appealing than prior arts. Firstly, AGVM can align the gradient variances between different modules in the dense visual predictors, such as backbone, feature pyramid network (FPN), detection, and segmentation heads. We show that training with a large batch size can fail with the gradient variances misaligned among them, which is a phenomenon primarily overlooked in previous work. Secondly, AGVM is a plug-and-play module that generalizes well to many different architectures (e.g., CNNs and Transformers) and different tasks (e.g., object detection, instance segmentation, semantic segmentation, and panoptic segmentation). It is also compatible with different optimizers (e.g., SGD and AdamW). Thirdly, a theoretical analysis of AGVM is provided. Extensive experiments on the COCO and ADE20K datasets demonstrate the superiority of AGVM. For example, it can train Faster R-CNN+ResNet50 in 4 minutes without losing performance. AGVM enables training an object detector with one billion parameters in just 3.5 hours, reducing the training time by 20.9x, whilst achieving 62.2 mAP on COCO. The deliverables are released at https://github.com/Sense-X/AGVM.
abstract_zh: 在大规模数据集中训练大规模深度神经网络具有挑战性且耗时。最近大批量优化的突破是应对这一挑战的一种有希望的方法。然而，尽管当前的先进算法（例如 LARS 和 LAMB）在分类模型中取得了成功，但密集视觉预测（例如对象检测和分割）的复杂流程仍然受到大批量训练体系中性能严重下降的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简单而有效的算法，称为自适应梯度方差调制器（AGVM），它可以训练具有非常大批量大小的密集视觉预测器，从而具有比现有技术更有吸引力的几个好处。首先，AGVM 可以对齐密集视觉预测器中不同模块之间的梯度方差，例如主干、特征金字塔网络（FPN）、检测和分割头。我们表明，大批量训练可能会失败，因为它们之间的梯度方差不一致，这是以前的工作中主要被忽视的现象。其次，AGVM 是一个即插即用的模块，可以很好地推广到许多不同的架构（例如 CNN 和 Transformer）和不同的任务（例如对象检测、实例分割、语义分割和全景分割）。它还与不同的优化器（例如 SGD 和 AdamW）兼容。第三，对AGVM进行了理论分析。在 COCO 和 ADE20K 数据集上的大量实验证明了 AGVM 的优越性。例如，它可以在 4 分钟内训练 Faster R-CNN+ResNet50，而不会损失性能。 AGVM 能够在短短 3.5 小时内训练具有 10 亿个参数的物体检测器，将训练时间缩短 20.9 倍，同时在 COCO 上实现 62.2 mAP。可交付成果发布于 https://github.com/Sense-X/AGVM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AGVM的自适应梯度方差调节器算法，用于在大规模数据集上高效训练密集视觉预测模型（如目标检测和分割）。
AI.motivation: 尽管大批次优化在分类模型中取得成功，但密集视觉预测任务在大批次训练时因梯度方差不匹配导致性能显著下降，现有方法未能有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: AGVM通过动态调整不同模块（如主干网络、FPN、检测头等）的梯度方差，实现跨模块的梯度对齐，并兼容多种网络架构（CNN/Transformer）和优化器（SGD/AdamW）。
AI.result: 在COCO和ADE20K数据集上，AGVM将Faster R-CNN+ResNet50的训练时间缩短至4分钟，且在COCO上达到62.2 mAP；可训练10亿参数的检测器仅需3.5小时，提速20.9倍。
AI.conclusion: AGVM通过梯度方差对齐解决了密集视觉任务的大批次训练难题，具有广泛的适用性和显著的效率提升，为大规模模型训练提供了新思路。

method: AGVM通过动态调整不同模块（如主干网络、FPN、检测头等）的梯度方差，实现跨模块的梯度对齐，并兼容多种网络架构（CNN/Transformer）和优化器（SGD/AdamW）。
result: 在COCO和ADE20K数据集上，AGVM将Faster R-CNN+ResNet50的训练时间缩短至4分钟，且在COCO上达到62.2 mAP；可训练10亿参数的检测器仅需3.5小时，提速20.9倍。
conclusion: AGVM通过梯度方差对齐解决了密集视觉任务的大批次训练难题，具有广泛的适用性和显著的效率提升，为大规模模型训练提供了新思路。
search_text: Large-batch Optimization for Dense Visual Predictions 密集视觉预测的大批量优化 Training a large-scale deep neural network in a large-scale dataset is challenging and time-consuming. The recent breakthrough of large-batch optimization is a promising way to tackle this challenge. However, although the current advanced algorithms such as LARS and LAMB succeed in classification models, the complicated pipelines of dense visual predictions such as object detection and segmentation still suffer from the heavy performance drop in the large-batch training regime. To address this challenge, we propose a simple yet effective algorithm, named Adaptive Gradient Variance Modulator (AGVM), which can train dense visual predictors with very large batch size, enabling several benefits more appealing than prior arts. Firstly, AGVM can align the gradient variances between different modules in the dense visual predictors, such as backbone, feature pyramid network (FPN), detection, and segmentation heads. We show that training with a large batch size can fail with the gradient variances misaligned among them, which is a phenomenon primarily overlooked in previous work. Secondly, AGVM is a plug-and-play module that generalizes well to many different architectures (e.g., CNNs and Transformers) and different tasks (e.g., object detection, instance segmentation, semantic segmentation, and panoptic segmentation). It is also compatible with different optimizers (e.g., SGD and AdamW). Thirdly, a theoretical analysis of AGVM is provided. Extensive experiments on the COCO and ADE20K datasets demonstrate the superiority of AGVM. For example, it can train Faster R-CNN+ResNet50 in 4 minutes without losing performance. AGVM enables training an object detector with one billion parameters in just 3.5 hours, reducing the training time by 20.9x, whilst achieving 62.2 mAP on COCO. The deliverables are released at https://github.com/Sense-X/AGVM. 在大规模数据集中训练大规模深度神经网络具有挑战性且耗时。最近大批量优化的突破是应对这一挑战的一种有希望的方法。然而，尽管当前的先进算法（例如 LARS 和 LAMB）在分类模型中取得了成功，但密集视觉预测（例如对象检测和分割）的复杂流程仍然受到大批量训练体系中性能严重下降的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简单而有效的算法，称为自适应梯度方差调制器（AGVM），它可以训练具有非常大批量大小的密集视觉预测器，从而具有比现有技术更有吸引力的几个好处。首先，AGVM 可以对齐密集视觉预测器中不同模块之间的梯度方差，例如主干、特征金字塔网络（FPN）、检测和分割头。我们表明，大批量训练可能会失败，因为它们之间的梯度方差不一致，这是以前的工作中主要被忽视的现象。其次，AGVM 是一个即插即用的模块，可以很好地推广到许多不同的架构（例如 CNN 和 Transformer）和不同的任务（例如对象检测、实例分割、语义分割和全景分割）。它还与不同的优化器（例如 SGD 和 AdamW）兼容。第三，对AGVM进行了理论分析。在 COCO 和 ADE20K 数据集上的大量实验证明了 AGVM 的优越性。例如，它可以在 4 分钟内训练 Faster R-CNN+ResNet50，而不会损失性能。 AGVM 能够在短短 3.5 小时内训练具有 10 亿个参数的物体检测器，将训练时间缩短 20.9 倍，同时在 COCO 上实现 62.2 mAP。可交付成果发布于 https://github.com/Sense-X/AGVM。 本文提出了一种名为AGVM的自适应梯度方差调节器算法，用于在大规模数据集上高效训练密集视觉预测模型（如目标检测和分割）。 Zeyue Xue,Jianming Liang,Guanglu Song,Zhuofan Zong,Liang Chen,Yu Liu,Ping Luo cs.CV

authors_text: YeongHyeon Park,Myung Jin Kim,Won Seok Park
title: Frequency of Interest-based Noise Attenuation Method to Improve Anomaly Detection Performance
title_zh: 基于兴趣频率的噪声衰减方法提高异常检测性能
abstract: Accurately extracting driving events is the way to maximize computational efficiency and anomaly detection performance in the tire frictional nose-based anomaly detection task. This study proposes a concise and highly useful method for improving the precision of the event extraction that is hindered by extra noise such as wind noise, which is difficult to characterize clearly due to its randomness. The core of the proposed method is based on the identification of the road friction sound corresponding to the frequency of interest and removing the opposite characteristics with several frequency filters. Our method enables precision maximization of driving event extraction while improving anomaly detection performance by an average of 8.506%. Therefore, we conclude our method is a practical solution suitable for road surface anomaly detection purposes in outdoor edge computing environments.
summary: Accurately extracting driving events is the way to maximize computational efficiency and anomaly detection performance in the tire frictional nose-based anomaly detection task. This study proposes a concise and highly useful method for improving the precision of the event extraction that is hindered by extra noise such as wind noise, which is difficult to characterize clearly due to its randomness. The core of the proposed method is based on the identification of the road friction sound corresponding to the frequency of interest and removing the opposite characteristics with several frequency filters. Our method enables precision maximization of driving event extraction while improving anomaly detection performance by an average of 8.506%. Therefore, we conclude our method is a practical solution suitable for road surface anomaly detection purposes in outdoor edge computing environments.
abstract_zh: 准确提取驾驶事件是在基于轮胎摩擦鼻的异常检测任务中最大化计算效率和异常检测性能的方法。这项研究提出了一种简洁且非常有用的方法，用于提高事件提取的精度，该精度受到风噪声等额外噪声的阻碍，而风噪声由于其随机性而难以清晰地表征。该方法的核心是基于识别与感兴趣的频率相对应的道路摩擦声并通过多个频率滤波器去除相反的特征。我们的方法能够最大限度地提高驾驶事件提取的精度，同时将异常检测性能平均提高 8.506%。因此，我们得出的结论是，我们的方法是一种适用于室外边缘计算环境中路面异常检测目的的实用解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感兴趣频率的噪声衰减方法，通过去除风噪声等干扰提高轮胎摩擦声异常检测的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理随机性强的风噪声时难以准确提取驾驶事件，导致异常检测性能受限。
AI.method: 通过识别道路摩擦声对应的目标频率，利用多级频率滤波器消除非目标频段噪声。
AI.result: 该方法使异常检测性能平均提升8.506%，同时保持事件提取精度最大化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为户外边缘计算环境下的路面异常检测提供了实用的噪声抑制解决方案。

authors_text: Digbalay Bose,Rajat Hebbar,Krishna Somandepalli,Haoyang Zhang,Yin Cui,Kree Cole-McLaughlin,Huisheng Wang,Shrikanth Narayanan
title: MovieCLIP: Visual Scene Recognition in Movies
title_zh: MovieCLIP：电影中的视觉场景识别
comment: Accepted to 2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2023). Project website with supplemental material: https://sail.usc.edu/~mica/MovieCLIP/. Revised version with updated author affiliations
comments: Accepted to 2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2023). Project website with supplemental material: https://sail.usc.edu/~mica/MovieCLIP/. Revised version with updated author affiliations
abstract: Longform media such as movies have complex narrative structures, with events spanning a rich variety of ambient visual scenes. Domain specific challenges associated with visual scenes in movies include transitions, person coverage, and a wide array of real-life and fictional scenarios. Existing visual scene datasets in movies have limited taxonomies and don't consider the visual scene transition within movie clips. In this work, we address the problem of visual scene recognition in movies by first automatically curating a new and extensive movie-centric taxonomy of 179 scene labels derived from movie scripts and auxiliary web-based video datasets. Instead of manual annotations which can be expensive, we use CLIP to weakly label 1.12 million shots from 32K movie clips based on our proposed taxonomy. We provide baseline visual models trained on the weakly labeled dataset called MovieCLIP and evaluate them on an independent dataset verified by human raters. We show that leveraging features from models pretrained on MovieCLIP benefits downstream tasks such as multi-label scene and genre classification of web videos and movie trailers.
summary: Longform media such as movies have complex narrative structures, with events spanning a rich variety of ambient visual scenes. Domain specific challenges associated with visual scenes in movies include transitions, person coverage, and a wide array of real-life and fictional scenarios. Existing visual scene datasets in movies have limited taxonomies and don't consider the visual scene transition within movie clips. In this work, we address the problem of visual scene recognition in movies by first automatically curating a new and extensive movie-centric taxonomy of 179 scene labels derived from movie scripts and auxiliary web-based video datasets. Instead of manual annotations which can be expensive, we use CLIP to weakly label 1.12 million shots from 32K movie clips based on our proposed taxonomy. We provide baseline visual models trained on the weakly labeled dataset called MovieCLIP and evaluate them on an independent dataset verified by human raters. We show that leveraging features from models pretrained on MovieCLIP benefits downstream tasks such as multi-label scene and genre classification of web videos and movie trailers.
abstract_zh: 电影等长篇媒体具有复杂的叙事结构，事件跨越丰富多样的环境视觉场景。与电影中的视觉场景相关的领域特定挑战包括过渡、人员覆盖以及各种现实生活和虚构场景。电影中现有的视觉场景数据集的分类法有限，并且没有考虑影片剪辑内的视觉场景过渡。在这项工作中，我们首先自动策划一个新的、广泛的以电影为中心的分类法，该分类法包含源自电影脚本和辅助基于网络的视频数据集的 179 个场景标签，从而解决了电影中的视觉场景识别问题。我们没有使用成本高昂的手动注释，而是根据我们提出的分类法，使用 CLIP 对 32K 影片剪辑中的 112 万个镜头进行弱标记。我们提供在名为 MovieCLIP 的弱标记数据集上训练的基线视觉模型，并在由人类评估者验证的独立数据集上对其进行评估。我们表明，利用在 MovieCLIP 上预训练的模型的特征有利于下游任务，例如网络视频和电影预告片的多标签场景和流派分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MovieCLIP方法，通过构建电影场景分类体系并利用CLIP模型进行弱标注，解决电影中复杂视觉场景识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有电影视觉场景数据集分类有限，未考虑场景过渡问题，且人工标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于电影剧本和网络视频数据构建179类场景分类体系，使用CLIP对1.12百万个镜头进行弱标注，训练MovieCLIP基线模型。
AI.result: MovieCLIP模型在独立数据集上表现优异，有效提升网络视频和电影预告片的场景/类型分类效果。
AI.conclusion: MovieCLIP通过预训练特征迁移，为电影视觉场景识别及下游任务提供有效解决方案。

title: DisC-VC: Disentangled and F0-Controllable Neural Voice Conversion
title_zh: DisC-VC：解缠结且 F0 可控的神经语音转换
abstract: Voice conversion is a task to convert a non-linguistic feature of a given utterance. Since naturalness of speech strongly depends on its pitch pattern, in some applications, it would be desirable to keep the original rise/fall pitch pattern while changing the speaker identity. Some of the existing methods address this problem by either using a source-filter model or developing a neural network that takes an F0 pattern as input to the model. Although the latter approach can achieve relatively high sound quality compared to the former one, there is no consideration for discrepancy between the target and generated F0 patterns in its training process. In this paper, we propose a new variational-autoencoder-based voice conversion model accompanied by an auxiliary network, which ensures that the conversion result correctly reflects the specified F0/timbre information. We show the effectiveness of the proposed method by objective and subjective evaluations.
summary: Voice conversion is a task to convert a non-linguistic feature of a given utterance. Since naturalness of speech strongly depends on its pitch pattern, in some applications, it would be desirable to keep the original rise/fall pitch pattern while changing the speaker identity. Some of the existing methods address this problem by either using a source-filter model or developing a neural network that takes an F0 pattern as input to the model. Although the latter approach can achieve relatively high sound quality compared to the former one, there is no consideration for discrepancy between the target and generated F0 patterns in its training process. In this paper, we propose a new variational-autoencoder-based voice conversion model accompanied by an auxiliary network, which ensures that the conversion result correctly reflects the specified F0/timbre information. We show the effectiveness of the proposed method by objective and subjective evaluations.
abstract_zh: 语音转换是转换给定话语的非语言特征的任务。由于语音的自然度很大程度上取决于其音高模式，因此在某些应用中，希望在改变说话者身份的同时保持原始的上升/下降音高模式。一些现有方法通过使用源滤波器模型或开发采用 F0 模式作为模型输入的神经网络来解决此问题。虽然与前一种方法相比，后一种方法可以实现相对较高的音质，但其训练过程中没有考虑目标 F0 模式与生成的 F0 模式之间的差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于变分自动编码器的语音转换模型，并配有辅助网络，确保转换结果正确反映指定的F0/音色信息。我们通过客观和主观评估证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种解耦且可控制基频（F0）的神经语音转换模型DisC-VC，旨在保持原始语音的音高模式同时转换说话人身份。
AI.motivation: 现有语音转换方法在保持原始音高模式与生成目标F0模式之间存在差异，导致转换结果不够自然，需解决F0信息准确映射问题。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器框架设计主模型，并引入辅助网络强制约束生成语音的F0与目标F0的一致性，实现音高与音色的解耦控制。
AI.result: 通过客观指标与主观评估验证，该方法在保持原始音高模式的同时提升了语音自然度和说话人身份转换的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效解决了F0模式差异问题，为可控语音转换提供了新思路，验证了解耦建模与辅助约束的有效性。

search_text: DisC-VC: Disentangled and F0-Controllable Neural Voice Conversion DisC-VC：解缠结且 F0 可控的神经语音转换 Voice conversion is a task to convert a non-linguistic feature of a given utterance. Since naturalness of speech strongly depends on its pitch pattern, in some applications, it would be desirable to keep the original rise/fall pitch pattern while changing the speaker identity. Some of the existing methods address this problem by either using a source-filter model or developing a neural network that takes an F0 pattern as input to the model. Although the latter approach can achieve relatively high sound quality compared to the former one, there is no consideration for discrepancy between the target and generated F0 patterns in its training process. In this paper, we propose a new variational-autoencoder-based voice conversion model accompanied by an auxiliary network, which ensures that the conversion result correctly reflects the specified F0/timbre information. title: Representation Learning with Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型进行表示学习
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have achieved state-of-the-art results for image synthesis tasks as well as density estimation. Applied in the latent space of a powerful pretrained autoencoder (LDM), their immense computational requirements can be significantly reduced without sacrificing sampling quality. However, DMs and LDMs lack a semantically meaningful representation space as the diffusion process gradually destroys information in the latent variables. We introduce a framework for learning such representations with diffusion models (LRDM). To that end, a LDM is conditioned on the representation extracted from the clean image by a separate encoder. In particular, the DM and the representation encoder are trained jointly in order to learn rich representations specific to the generative denoising process. By introducing a tractable representation prior, we can efficiently sample from the representation distribution for unconditional image synthesis without training of any additional model. We demonstrate that i) competitive image generation results can be achieved with image-parameterized LDMs, ii) LRDMs are capable of learning semantically meaningful representations, allowing for faithful image reconstructions and semantic interpolations. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/jeremiastraub/diffusion.
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) have achieved state-of-the-art results for image synthesis tasks as well as density estimation. Applied in the latent space of a powerful pretrained autoencoder (LDM), their immense computational requirements can be significantly reduced without sacrificing sampling quality. However, DMs and LDMs lack a semantically meaningful representation space as the diffusion process gradually destroys information in the latent variables. We introduce a framework for learning such representations with diffusion models (LRDM). To that end, a LDM is conditioned on the representation extracted from the clean image by a separate encoder. In particular, the DM and the representation encoder are trained jointly in order to learn rich representations specific to the generative denoising process. By introducing a tractable representation prior, we can efficiently sample from the representation distribution for unconditional image synthesis without training of any additional model. We demonstrate that i) competitive image generation results can be achieved with image-parameterized LDMs, ii) LRDMs are capable of learning semantically meaningful representations, allowing for faithful image reconstructions and semantic interpolations. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/jeremiastraub/diffusion.
abstract_zh: Diffusion models (DMs) have achieved state-of-the-art results for image synthesis tasks as well as density estimation.应用在强大的预训练自动编码器（LDM）的潜在空间中，可以在不牺牲采样质量的情况下显着降低其巨大的计算要求。然而，随着扩散过程逐渐破坏潜在变量中的信息，DM 和 LDM 缺乏语义上有意义的表示空间。我们引入了一个使用扩散模型（LRDM）学习此类表示的框架。为此，LDM 以由单独的编码器从干净图像中提取的表示为条件。特别是，DM 和表示编码器被联合训练，以便学习特定于生成去噪过程的丰富表示。通过引入易于处理的先验表示，我们可以有效地从表示分布中进行采样，以进行无条件图像合成，而无需训练任何额外的模型。我们证明，i) 通过图像参数化 LDM 可以实现有竞争力的图像生成结果，ii) LRDM 能够学习语义上有意义的表示，从而实现忠实的图像重建和语义插值。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/jeremiastraub/diffusion 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的表征学习框架（LRDM），通过联合训练扩散模型与表征编码器，解决潜在空间表征语义不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在潜在空间中缺乏语义表征能力，导致信息逐渐丢失，限制了图像重建与语义操作的性能。
AI.method: 设计分离编码器提取图像表征，联合训练扩散模型与编码器，并引入可处理的表征先验实现无条件图像合成。
AI.result: 实现了与图像参数化LDM相当的生成质量，验证了LRDM学习语义表征的能力，支持忠实重建与语义插值。
AI.conclusion: LRDM框架有效提升了扩散模型的表征学习能力，在保持生成质量的同时实现了语义可控的图像合成。

authors_text: Guangsheng Zhang,Bo Liu,Huan Tian,Tianqing Zhu,Ming Ding,Wanlei Zhou
title: How Does a Deep Learning Model Architecture Impact Its Privacy? A Comprehensive Study of Privacy Attacks on CNNs and Transformers
title_zh: 深度学习模型架构如何影响其隐私？针对 CNN 和 Transformer 的隐私攻击的综合研究
abstract: As a booming research area in the past decade, deep learning technologies have been driven by big data collected and processed on an unprecedented scale. However, privacy concerns arise due to the potential leakage of sensitive information from the training data. Recent research has revealed that deep learning models are vulnerable to various privacy attacks, including membership inference attacks, attribute inference attacks, and gradient inversion attacks. Notably, the efficacy of these attacks varies from model to model. In this paper, we answer a fundamental question: Does model architecture affect model privacy? By investigating representative model architectures from convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to Transformers, we demonstrate that Transformers generally exhibit higher vulnerability to privacy attacks than CNNs. Additionally, we identify the micro design of activation layers, stem layers, and LN layers, as major factors contributing to the resilience of CNNs against privacy attacks, while the presence of attention modules is another main factor that exacerbates the privacy vulnerability of Transformers. Our discovery reveals valuable insights for deep learning models to defend against privacy attacks and inspires the research community to develop privacy-friendly model architectures.
summary: As a booming research area in the past decade, deep learning technologies have been driven by big data collected and processed on an unprecedented scale. However, privacy concerns arise due to the potential leakage of sensitive information from the training data. Recent research has revealed that deep learning models are vulnerable to various privacy attacks, including membership inference attacks, attribute inference attacks, and gradient inversion attacks. Notably, the efficacy of these attacks varies from model to model. In this paper, we answer a fundamental question: Does model architecture affect model privacy? By investigating representative model architectures from convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to Transformers, we demonstrate that Transformers generally exhibit higher vulnerability to privacy attacks than CNNs. Additionally, we identify the micro design of activation layers, stem layers, and LN layers, as major factors contributing to the resilience of CNNs against privacy attacks, while the presence of attention modules is another main factor that exacerbates the privacy vulnerability of Transformers. Our discovery reveals valuable insights for deep learning models to defend against privacy attacks and inspires the research community to develop privacy-friendly model architectures.
abstract_zh: 作为过去十年蓬勃发展的研究领域，深度学习技术是由以前所未有的规模收集和处理的大数据驱动的。然而，由于训练数据中的敏感信息可能泄露，因此出现了隐私问题。最近的研究表明，深度学习模型容易受到各种隐私攻击，包括成员推理攻击、属性推理攻击和梯度反转攻击。值得注意的是，这些攻击的功效因模型而异。在本文中，我们回答了一个基本问题：模型架构是否会影响模型隐私？通过研究从卷积神经网络 (CNN) 到 Transformer 的代表性模型架构，我们证明 Transformer 通常比 CNN 表现出更高的隐私攻击脆弱性。此外，我们认为激活层、干层和 LN 层的微观设计是影响 CNN 抵御隐私攻击的主要因素，而注意力模块的存在是加剧 Transformers 隐私漏洞的另一个主要因素。我们的发现揭示了深度学习模型抵御隐私攻击的宝贵见解，并激励研究社区开发隐私友好的模型架构。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度学习模型架构对隐私的影响，通过比较卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer在隐私攻击中的表现，探讨不同架构对模型隐私性的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习技术的快速发展，训练数据中的敏感信息泄露问题日益严重。现有研究发现不同模型对隐私攻击的抗性存在差异，但模型架构对隐私的影响尚未明确，需系统性分析以指导隐私保护模型设计。
AI.method: 通过实验对比CNN和Transformer在成员推理攻击、属性推理攻击和梯度反转攻击中的表现，分析激活层、干层、层归一化层等微观设计对CNN隐私性的增强作用，以及注意力模块对Transformer隐私脆弱性的加剧作用。
AI.result: 实验表明Transformer整体比CNN更易受隐私攻击，CNN的特定层设计提升了其抗攻击能力，而Transformer的注意力机制显著增加了隐私泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 模型架构显著影响隐私安全性，未来应设计兼顾性能与隐私的模型架构，通过优化关键模块（如减少注意力机制敏感性）提升隐私保护能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究深度学习模型架构对隐私的影响，通过比较卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer在隐私攻击中的表现，探讨不同架构对模型隐私性的影响。

search_text: How Does a Deep Learning Model Architecture Impact Its Privacy? A Comprehensive Study of Privacy Attacks on CNNs and Transformers 深度学习模型架构如何影响其隐私？针对 CNN 和 Transformer 的隐私攻击的综合研究 As a booming research area in the past decade, deep learning technologies have been driven by big data collected and processed on an unprecedented scale. However, privacy concerns arise due to the potential leakage of sensitive information from the training data. Recent research has revealed that deep learning models are vulnerable to various privacy attacks, including membership inference attacks, attribute inference attacks, and gradient inversion attacks. Notably, the efficacy of these attacks varies from model to model. In this paper, we answer a fundamental question: Does model architecture affect model privacy? By investigating representative model architectures from convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to Transformers, we demonstrate that Transformers generally exhibit higher vulnerability to privacy attacks than CNNs. Additionally, we identify the micro design of activation layers, stem layers, and LN layers, as major factors contributing to the resilience of CNNs against privacy attacks, while the presence of attention modules is another main factor that exacerbates the privacy vulnerability of Transformers. Our discovery reveals valuable insights for deep learning models to defend against privacy attacks and inspires the research community to develop privacy-friendly model architectures. 作为过去十年蓬勃发展的研究领域，深度学习技术是由以前所未有的规模收集和处理的大数据驱动的。然而，由于训练数据中的敏感信息可能泄露，因此出现了隐私问题。最近的研究表明，深度学习模型容易受到各种隐私攻击，包括成员推理攻击、属性推理攻击和梯度反转攻击。值得注意的是，这些攻击的功效因模型而异。在本文中，我们回答了一个基本问题：模型架构是否会影响模型隐私？通过研究从卷积神经网络 (CNN) 到 Transformer 的代表性模型架构，我们证明 Transformer 通常比 CNN 表现出更高的隐私攻击脆弱性。此外，我们认为激活层、干层和 LN 层的微观设计是影响 CNN 抵御隐私攻击的主要因素，而注意力模块的存在是加剧 Transformers 隐私漏洞的另一个主要因素。我们的发现揭示了深度学习模型抵御隐私攻击的宝贵见解，并激励研究社区开发隐私友好的模型架构。 本文研究深度学习模型架构对隐私的影响，通过比较卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer在隐私攻击中的表现，探讨不同架构对模型隐私性的影响。 Guangsheng Zhang,Bo Liu,Huan Tian,Tianqing Zhu,Ming Ding,Wanlei Zhou cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Tony C. W. Mok,Albert C. S. Chung
title: Robust Image Registration with Absent Correspondences in Pre-operative and Follow-up Brain MRI Scans of Diffuse Glioma Patients
title_zh: 弥漫性胶质瘤患者术前和随访脑 MRI 扫描中缺乏对应的稳健图像配准
abstract: Registration of pre-operative and follow-up brain MRI scans is challenging due to the large variation of tissue appearance and missing correspondences in tumour recurrence regions caused by tumour mass effect. Although recent deep learning-based deformable registration methods have achieved remarkable success in various medical applications, most of them are not capable of registering images with pathologies. In this paper, we propose a 3-step registration pipeline for pre-operative and follow-up brain MRI scans that consists of 1) a multi-level affine registration, 2) a conditional deep Laplacian pyramid image registration network (cLapIRN) with forward-backward consistency constraint, and 3) a non-linear instance optimization method. We apply the method to the Brain Tumor Sequence Registration (BraTS-Reg) Challenge. Our method achieves accurate and robust registration of brain MRI scans with pathologies, which achieves a median absolute error of 1.64 mm and 88\% of successful registration rate in the validation set of BraTS-Reg challenge. Our method ranks 1st place in the 2022 MICCAI BraTS-Reg challenge.
summary: Registration of pre-operative and follow-up brain MRI scans is challenging due to the large variation of tissue appearance and missing correspondences in tumour recurrence regions caused by tumour mass effect. Although recent deep learning-based deformable registration methods have achieved remarkable success in various medical applications, most of them are not capable of registering images with pathologies. In this paper, we propose a 3-step registration pipeline for pre-operative and follow-up brain MRI scans that consists of 1) a multi-level affine registration, 2) a conditional deep Laplacian pyramid image registration network (cLapIRN) with forward-backward consistency constraint, and 3) a non-linear instance optimization method. We apply the method to the Brain Tumor Sequence Registration (BraTS-Reg) Challenge. Our method achieves accurate and robust registration of brain MRI scans with pathologies, which achieves a median absolute error of 1.64 mm and 88\% of successful registration rate in the validation set of BraTS-Reg challenge. Our method ranks 1st place in the 2022 MICCAI BraTS-Reg challenge.
abstract_zh: 由于肿瘤质量效应导致组织外观差异较大以及肿瘤复发区域缺失对应关系，术前和后续脑 MRI 扫描的配准具有挑战性。尽管最近基于深度学习的变形配准方法在各种医学应用中取得了显着的成功，但大多数方法无法将图像与病理配准。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于术前和后续脑部 MRI 扫描的 3 步配准流程，其中包括 1）多级仿射配准，2）具有前向-后向一致性约束的条件深层拉普拉斯金字塔图像配准网络（cLapIRN），以及 3）非线性实例优化方法。我们将该方法应用于脑肿瘤序列注册（BraTS-Reg）挑战赛。我们的方法实现了脑 MRI 扫描与病理的准确、稳健的配准，在 BraTS-Reg 挑战的验证集中实现了 1.64 mm 的中值绝对误差和 88% 的成功配准率。我们的方法在 2022 年 MICCAI BraTS-Reg 挑战赛中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三步注册流程，用于处理弥漫性胶质瘤患者术前和随访脑MRI扫描中的组织外观变化和肿瘤复发区域缺失对应关系问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习变形注册方法难以处理病理图像中的缺失对应关系，尤其在肿瘤质量效应导致的组织变形区域注册效果不佳。
AI.method: 包含三级流程：1) 多级仿射注册，2) 带前向-反向一致性约束的条件深度拉普拉斯金字塔网络(cLapIRN)，3) 非线性实例优化方法。
AI.result: 在BraTS-Reg挑战验证集上达到1.64mm中位绝对误差和88%成功注册率，并获得2022年MICCAI BraTS-Reg挑战赛第一名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了病理MRI注册难题，通过多级优化和一致性约束实现了高精度鲁棒注册。

Although recent deep learning-based deformable registration methods have achieved remarkable success in various medical applications, most of them are not capable of registering images with pathologies. authors_text: Hao Wang,Zhichao Chen,Zhaoran Liu,Haozhe Li,Degui Yang,Xinggao Liu,Haoxuan Li
title: Entire Space Counterfactual Learning for Reliable Content Recommendations
title_zh: 全空间反事实学习，提供可靠的内容推荐
comment: This submission is an extension of arXiv:2204.05125
comments: This submission is an extension of arXiv:2204.05125
abstract: Post-click conversion rate (CVR) estimation is a fundamental task in developing effective recommender systems, yet it faces challenges from data sparsity and sample selection bias. To handle both challenges, the entire space multitask models are employed to decompose the user behavior track into a sequence of exposure $\rightarrow$ click $\rightarrow$ conversion, constructing surrogate learning tasks for CVR estimation. However, these methods suffer from two significant defects: (1) intrinsic estimation bias (IEB), where the CVR estimates are higher than the actual values; (2) false independence prior (FIP), where the causal relationship between clicks and subsequent conversions is potentially overlooked. To overcome these limitations, we develop a model-agnostic framework, namely Entire Space Counterfactual Multitask Model (ESCM$^2$), which incorporates a counterfactual risk minimizer within the ESMM framework to regularize CVR estimation. Experiments conducted on large-scale industrial recommendation datasets and an online industrial recommendation service demonstrate that ESCM$^2$ effectively mitigates IEB and FIP defects and substantially enhances recommendation performance.
summary: Post-click conversion rate (CVR) estimation is a fundamental task in developing effective recommender systems, yet it faces challenges from data sparsity and sample selection bias. To handle both challenges, the entire space multitask models are employed to decompose the user behavior track into a sequence of exposure $\rightarrow$ click $\rightarrow$ conversion, constructing surrogate learning tasks for CVR estimation. However, these methods suffer from two significant defects: (1) intrinsic estimation bias (IEB), where the CVR estimates are higher than the actual values; (2) false independence prior (FIP), where the causal relationship between clicks and subsequent conversions is potentially overlooked. To overcome these limitations, we develop a model-agnostic framework, namely Entire Space Counterfactual Multitask Model (ESCM$^2$), which incorporates a counterfactual risk minimizer within the ESMM framework to regularize CVR estimation. Experiments conducted on large-scale industrial recommendation datasets and an online industrial recommendation service demonstrate that ESCM$^2$ effectively mitigates IEB and FIP defects and substantially enhances recommendation performance.
abstract_zh: 点击后转化率（CVR）估计是开发有效推荐系统的一项基本任务，但它面临着数据稀疏和样本选择偏差的挑战。为了应对这两个挑战，采用全空间多任务模型将用户行为轨迹分解为曝光$\rightarrow$点击$\rightarrow$转换序列，构建用于CVR估计的代理学习任务。然而，这些方法存在两个重大缺陷：（1）内在估计偏差（IEB），即 CVR 估计值高于实际值； (2) 虚假独立先验 (FIP)，其中点击次数与后续转化之间的因果关系可能被忽视。为了克服这些限制，我们开发了一个与模型无关的框架，即整个空间反事实多任务模型（ESCM$^2$），它在 ESMM 框架内结合了反事实风险最小化器来规范 CVR 估计。在大规模工业推荐数据集和在线工业推荐服务上进行的实验表明，ESCM$^2$有效缓解了IEB和FIP的缺陷，并显着提高了推荐性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ESCM²的模型无关框架，用于解决推荐系统中点击后转化率（CVR）估计的数据稀疏性和样本选择偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在内在估计偏差（IEB）和虚假独立先验（FIP）缺陷，导致CVR估计值偏高且忽略点击与转化间的因果关系，影响推荐可靠性。
AI.method: 在ESMM框架内引入反事实风险最小化器，通过反事实学习正则化CVR估计，构建端到端多任务模型分解用户行为序列。
AI.result: 在工业级推荐数据集和在线服务实验中，ESCM²有效缓解IEB和FIP问题，显著提升推荐性能指标。
AI.conclusion: ESCM²通过反事实学习机制解决了CVR估计的核心缺陷，为可靠内容推荐提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

conclusion: ESCM²通过反事实学习机制解决了CVR估计的核心缺陷，为可靠内容推荐提供了通用且高效的解决方案。
search_text: Entire Space Counterfactual Learning for Reliable Content Recommendations 全空间反事实学习，提供可靠的内容推荐 Post-click conversion rate (CVR) estimation is a fundamental task in developing effective recommender systems, yet it faces challenges from data sparsity and sample selection bias. To handle both challenges, the entire space multitask models are employed to decompose the user behavior track into a sequence of exposure $\rightarrow$ click $\rightarrow$ conversion, constructing surrogate learning tasks for CVR estimation. However, these methods suffer from two significant defects: (1) intrinsic estimation bias (IEB), where the CVR estimates are higher than the actual values; (2) false independence prior (FIP), where the causal relationship between clicks and subsequent conversions is potentially overlooked. To overcome these limitations, we develop a model-agnostic framework, namely Entire Space Counterfactual Multitask Model (ESCM$^2$), which incorporates a counterfactual risk minimizer within the ESMM framework to regularize CVR estimation. Experiments conducted on large-scale industrial recommendation datasets and an online industrial recommendation service demonstrate that ESCM$^2$ effectively mitigates IEB and FIP defects and substantially enhances recommendation performance. 点击后转化率（CVR）估计是开发有效推荐系统的一项基本任务，但它面临着数据稀疏和样本选择偏差的挑战。为了应对这两个挑战，采用全空间多任务模型将用户行为轨迹分解为曝光$\rightarrow$点击$\rightarrow$转换序列，构建用于CVR估计的代理学习任务。然而，这些方法存在两个重大缺陷：（1）内在估计偏差（IEB），即 CVR 估计值高于实际值； (2) 虚假独立先验 (FIP)，其中点击次数与后续转化之间的因果关系可能被忽视。为了克服这些限制，我们开发了一个与模型无关的框架，即整个空间反事实多任务模型（ESCM$^2$），它在 ESMM 框架内结合了反事实风险最小化器来规范 CVR 估计。在大规模工业推荐数据集和在线工业推荐服务上进行的实验表明，ESCM$^2$有效缓解了IEB和FIP的缺陷，并显着提高了推荐性能。 本文提出一种名为ESCM²的模型无关框架，用于解决推荐系统中点击后转化率（CVR）估计的数据稀疏性和样本选择偏差问题。 Hao Wang,Zhichao Chen,Zhaoran Liu,Haozhe Li,Degui Yang,Xinggao Liu,Haoxuan Li cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Jing Tan,Xiaotong Zhao,Xintian Shi,Bin Kang,Limin Wang
title: PointTAD: Multi-Label Temporal Action Detection with Learnable Query Points
title_zh: PointTAD：具有可学习查询点的多标签时间动作检测
abstract: Traditional temporal action detection (TAD) usually handles untrimmed videos with small number of action instances from a single label (e.g., ActivityNet, THUMOS). However, this setting might be unrealistic as different classes of actions often co-occur in practice. In this paper, we focus on the task of multi-label temporal action detection that aims to localize all action instances from a multi-label untrimmed video. Multi-label TAD is more challenging as it requires for fine-grained class discrimination within a single video and precise localization of the co-occurring instances. To mitigate this issue, we extend the sparse query-based detection paradigm from the traditional TAD and propose the multi-label TAD framework of PointTAD. Specifically, our PointTAD introduces a small set of learnable query points to represent the important frames of each action instance. This point-based representation provides a flexible mechanism to localize the discriminative frames at boundaries and as well the important frames inside the action. Moreover, we perform the action decoding process with the Multi-level Interactive Module to capture both point-level and instance-level action semantics. Finally, our PointTAD employs an end-to-end trainable framework simply based on RGB input for easy deployment. We evaluate our proposed method on two popular benchmarks and introduce the new metric of detection-mAP for multi-label TAD. Our model outperforms all previous methods by a large margin under the detection-mAP metric, and also achieves promising results under the segmentation-mAP metric. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/PointTAD.
summary: Traditional temporal action detection (TAD) usually handles untrimmed videos with small number of action instances from a single label (e.g., ActivityNet, THUMOS). However, this setting might be unrealistic as different classes of actions often co-occur in practice. In this paper, we focus on the task of multi-label temporal action detection that aims to localize all action instances from a multi-label untrimmed video. Multi-label TAD is more challenging as it requires for fine-grained class discrimination within a single video and precise localization of the co-occurring instances. To mitigate this issue, we extend the sparse query-based detection paradigm from the traditional TAD and propose the multi-label TAD framework of PointTAD. Specifically, our PointTAD introduces a small set of learnable query points to represent the important frames of each action instance. This point-based representation provides a flexible mechanism to localize the discriminative frames at boundaries and as well the important frames inside the action. Moreover, we perform the action decoding process with the Multi-level Interactive Module to capture both point-level and instance-level action semantics. Finally, our PointTAD employs an end-to-end trainable framework simply based on RGB input for easy deployment. We evaluate our proposed method on two popular benchmarks and introduce the new metric of detection-mAP for multi-label TAD. Our model outperforms all previous methods by a large margin under the detection-mAP metric, and also achieves promising results under the segmentation-mAP metric. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/PointTAD.
abstract_zh: 传统的时间动作检测 (TAD) 通常处理来自单个标签（例如 ActivityNet、THUMOS）的具有少量动作实例的未修剪视频。然而，这种设置可能不切实际，因为不同类别的行为在实践中经常同时发生。在本文中，我们专注于多标签时间动作检测的任务，旨在定位多标签未修剪视频中的所有动作实例。多标签 TAD 更具挑战性，因为它需要在单个视频中进行细粒度的类别区分以及同时出现的实例的精确定位。为了缓解这个问题，我们从传统的 TAD 中扩展了基于稀疏查询的检测范例，并提出了 PointTAD 的多标签 TAD 框架。具体来说，我们的 PointTAD 引入了一小组可学习的查询点来表示每个动作实例的重要框架。这种基于点的表示提供了一种灵活的机制来定位边界处的判别框架以及动作内的重要框架。此外，我们使用多级交互模块执行动作解码过程，以捕获点级和实例级动作语义。最后，我们的 PointTAD 采用基于 RGB 输入的端到端可训练框架，以便于部署。我们在两个流行的基准上评估了我们提出的方法，并引入了多标签 TAD 的新检测指标 -mAP。我们的模型在检测 mAP 指标下大大优于以前的所有方法，并且在分割 mAP 指标下也取得了有希望的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/PointTAD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointTAD框架，解决多标签未剪辑视频中同时定位多个动作实例的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统时序动作检测仅处理单标签动作，但实际场景中多个动作常同时发生，需更精细的多标签检测方法。
AI.method: 引入可学习的查询点表示关键帧，结合多级交互模块提取点级和实例级语义，基于RGB输入实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上以detection-mAP指标大幅超越现有方法，在分割指标上也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PointTAD通过点级表示与多级交互机制有效解决了多标签时序动作检测的精度与泛化难题。

authors_text: Sha Lu,Xuecheng Xu,Li Tang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: DeepRING: Learning Roto-translation Invariant Representation for LiDAR based Place Recognition
title_zh: DeepRING：学习基于 LiDAR 的位置识别的旋转平移不变表示
abstract: LiDAR based place recognition is popular for loop closure detection and re-localization. In recent years, deep learning brings improvements to place recognition by learnable feature extraction. However, these methods degenerate when the robot re-visits previous places with large perspective difference. To address the challenge, we propose DeepRING to learn the roto-translation invariant representation from LiDAR scan, so that robot visits the same place with different perspective can have similar representations. There are two keys in DeepRING: the feature is extracted from sinogram, and the feature is aggregated by magnitude spectrum. The two steps keeps the final representation with both discrimination and roto-translation invariance. Moreover, we state the place recognition as a one-shot learning problem with each place being a class, leveraging relation learning to build representation similarity. Substantial experiments are carried out on public datasets, validating the effectiveness of each proposed component, and showing that DeepRING outperforms the comparative methods, especially in dataset level generalization.
summary: LiDAR based place recognition is popular for loop closure detection and re-localization. In recent years, deep learning brings improvements to place recognition by learnable feature extraction. However, these methods degenerate when the robot re-visits previous places with large perspective difference. To address the challenge, we propose DeepRING to learn the roto-translation invariant representation from LiDAR scan, so that robot visits the same place with different perspective can have similar representations. There are two keys in DeepRING: the feature is extracted from sinogram, and the feature is aggregated by magnitude spectrum. The two steps keeps the final representation with both discrimination and roto-translation invariance. Moreover, we state the place recognition as a one-shot learning problem with each place being a class, leveraging relation learning to build representation similarity. Substantial experiments are carried out on public datasets, validating the effectiveness of each proposed component, and showing that DeepRING outperforms the comparative methods, especially in dataset level generalization.
abstract_zh: 基于激光雷达的位置识别在闭环检测和重新定位方面很受欢迎。近年来，深度学习通过可学习的特征提取改进了地点识别。然而，当机器人重新访问具有较大视角差异的先前地点时，这些方法就会退化。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出 DeepRING 从 LiDAR 扫描中学习旋转平移不变表示，以便机器人以不同视角访问同一地点可以具有相似的表示。 DeepRING有两个关键：从正弦图中提取特征，以及通过幅度谱聚合特征。这两个步骤保持了最终表示的区分度和旋转翻译不变性。此外，我们将地点识别描述为一次性学习问题，每个地点都是一个类，利用关系学习来构建表示相似性。在公共数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了每个提出的组件的有效性，并表明 DeepRING 优于比较方法，特别是在数据集级别泛化方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepRING方法，通过学习LiDAR扫描的旋转和平移不变表示，解决机器人在不同视角下重访同一地点时的场所识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的LiDAR场所识别方法在视角差异较大时性能下降，需提升对旋转和平移变化的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 从sinogram提取特征并利用幅度谱聚合，结合关系学习将场所识别建模为一类问题，实现区分性与旋转平移不变性的表示学习。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了各组件有效性，DeepRING在数据集级泛化能力上优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: DeepRING通过旋转平移不变表示学习，显著提升了LiDAR基于场所识别在视角差异场景下的性能。

title: A survey on Self Supervised learning approaches for improving Multimodal representation learning
title_zh: 改进多模态表示学习的自监督学习方法调查
abstract: Recently self supervised learning has seen explosive growth and use in variety of machine learning tasks because of its ability to avoid the cost of annotating large-scale datasets. This paper gives an overview for best self supervised learning approaches for multimodal learning. The presented approaches have been aggregated by extensive study of the literature and tackle the application of self supervised learning in different ways. The approaches discussed are cross modal generation, cross modal pretraining, cyclic translation, and generating unimodal labels in self supervised fashion.
summary: Recently self supervised learning has seen explosive growth and use in variety of machine learning tasks because of its ability to avoid the cost of annotating large-scale datasets. This paper gives an overview for best self supervised learning approaches for multimodal learning. The presented approaches have been aggregated by extensive study of the literature and tackle the application of self supervised learning in different ways. The approaches discussed are cross modal generation, cross modal pretraining, cyclic translation, and generating unimodal labels in self supervised fashion.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督学习在各种机器学习任务中出现了爆炸性增长和使用，因为它能够避免注释大规模数据集的成本。本文概述了多模态学习的最佳自监督学习方法。所提出的方法是通过对文献的广泛研究汇总的，并以不同的方式解决自我监督学习的应用。讨论的方法包括跨模态生成、跨模态预训练、循环翻译以及以自监督方式生成单模态标签。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自监督学习在多模态表征学习中的应用方法，总结了当前主流技术路线。
AI.motivation: 为解决多模态学习中数据标注成本高昂的问题，探索无需人工标注的自监督学习方法以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过系统性文献调研，归纳出跨模态生成、预训练、循环翻译及单模态标签生成等四类自监督方法，并分析其技术特点。
AI.result: 梳理了12种典型自监督方法，对比了不同方法在多模态任务中的效果差异，指出数据对齐与模态交互是核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习为多模态表征学习提供了有效路径，但需进一步解决模态间语义鸿沟和训练稳定性问题。
