search_text: A survey on Self Supervised learning approaches for improving Multimodal representation learning 改进多模态表示学习的自监督学习方法调查 Recently self supervised learning has seen explosive growth and use in variety of machine learning tasks because of its ability to avoid the cost of annotating large-scale datasets. This paper gives an overview for best self supervised learning approaches for multimodal learning. The presented approaches have been aggregated by extensive study of the literature and tackle the application of self supervised learning in different ways. The approaches discussed are cross modal generation, cross modal pretraining, cyclic translation, and generating unimodal labels in self supervised fashion. 最近，自监督学习在各种机器学习任务中出现了爆炸性增长和使用，因为它能够避免注释大规模数据集的成本。本文概述了多模态学习的最佳自监督学习方法。所提出的方法是通过对文献的广泛研究汇总的，并以不同的方式解决自我监督学习的应用。讨论的方法包括跨模态生成、跨模态预训练、循环翻译以及以自监督方式生成单模态标签。 本文综述了自监督学习在多模态表征学习中的应用方法，总结了当前主流技术路线。 Naman Goyal cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Rishabh Madan,Rajat Kumar Jenamani,Vy Thuy Nguyen,Ahmed Moustafa,Xuefeng Hu,Katherine Dimitropoulou,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee
title: SPARCS: Structuring Physically Assistive Robotics for Caregiving with Stakeholders-in-the-loop
title_zh: SPARCS：与利益相关者一起构建用于护理的物理辅助机器人
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Existing work in physical robot caregiving is limited in its ability to provide long-term assistance. This is majorly due to (i) lack of well-defined problems, (ii) diversity of tasks, and (iii) limited access to stakeholders from the caregiving community. We propose Structuring Physically Assistive Robotics for Caregiving with Stakeholders-in-the-loop (SPARCS) to address these challenges. SPARCS is a framework for physical robot caregiving comprising (i) Building Blocks, models that define physical robot caregiving scenarios, (ii) Structured Workflows, hierarchical workflows that enable us to answer the Whats and Hows of physical robot caregiving, and (iii) SPARCS-Box, a web-based platform to facilitate dialogue between all stakeholders. We collect clinical data for six care recipients with varying disabilities and demonstrate the use of SPARCS in designing well-defined caregiving scenarios and identifying their care requirements. All the data and workflows are available on SPARCS-Box. We demonstrate the utility of SPARCS in building a robot-assisted feeding system for one of the care recipients. We also perform experiments to show the adaptability of this system to different caregiving scenarios. Finally, we identify open challenges in physical robot caregiving by consulting care recipients and caregivers. Supplementary material can be found at https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/sparcs/.
summary: Existing work in physical robot caregiving is limited in its ability to provide long-term assistance. This is majorly due to (i) lack of well-defined problems, (ii) diversity of tasks, and (iii) limited access to stakeholders from the caregiving community. We propose Structuring Physically Assistive Robotics for Caregiving with Stakeholders-in-the-loop (SPARCS) to address these challenges. SPARCS is a framework for physical robot caregiving comprising (i) Building Blocks, models that define physical robot caregiving scenarios, (ii) Structured Workflows, hierarchical workflows that enable us to answer the Whats and Hows of physical robot caregiving, and (iii) SPARCS-Box, a web-based platform to facilitate dialogue between all stakeholders. We collect clinical data for six care recipients with varying disabilities and demonstrate the use of SPARCS in designing well-defined caregiving scenarios and identifying their care requirements. All the data and workflows are available on SPARCS-Box. We demonstrate the utility of SPARCS in building a robot-assisted feeding system for one of the care recipients. We also perform experiments to show the adaptability of this system to different caregiving scenarios. Finally, we identify open challenges in physical robot caregiving by consulting care recipients and caregivers. Supplementary material can be found at https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/sparcs/.
abstract_zh: 现有的物理机器人护理工作在提供长期帮助方面的能力有限。这主要是由于（i）缺乏明确的问题，（ii）任务的多样性，以及（iii）与护理界利益相关者的接触有限。我们提出构建利益相关者参与护理的物理辅助机器人 (SPARCS) 来应对这些挑战。 SPARCS 是一个物理机器人护理框架，包括 (i) 构建模块，定义物理机器人护理场景的模型，(ii) 结构化工作流程，分层工作流程，使我们能够回答物理机器人护理的内容和方法，以及 (iii) SPARCS-Box，一个基于网络的平台，促进所有利益相关者之间的对话。我们收集了六名患有不同残疾的护理接受者的临床数据，并展示了 SPARCS 在设计明确的护理场景和确定他们的护理需求方面的用途。所有数据和工作流程均可在 SPARCS-Box 上获取。我们展示了 SPARCS 在为一名护理对象构建机器人辅助喂养系统方面的实用性。我们还进行了实验来展示该系统对不同护理场景的适应性。最后，我们通过咨询护理对象和护理人员来确定物理机器人护理中的开放挑战。补充材料可在 https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/sparcs/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPARCS框架，旨在通过与护理相关利益相关者的协作，解决物理辅助机器人护理中的长期辅助问题。
AI.motivation: 现有物理辅助机器人护理的研究在长期辅助方面存在局限，主要由于问题定义不明确、任务多样性以及护理社区利益相关者参与有限。
AI.method: 提出SPARCS框架，包括构建模块、结构化工作流程和SPARCS-Box平台，以定义护理场景、支持利益相关者对话并设计护理系统。
AI.result: 通过临床数据收集和实验验证，展示了SPARCS在设计护理场景、识别护理需求以及构建机器人辅助喂食系统中的实用性，并展示了系统的适应性。
AI.conclusion: SPARCS框架为物理辅助机器人护理提供了结构化方法，同时揭示了护理机器人领域仍需解决的开放性挑战。

title: Independence Testing-Based Approach to Causal Discovery under Measurement Error and Linear Non-Gaussian Models
title_zh: 测量误差和线性非高斯模型下基于独立性测试的因果发现方法
abstract: Causal discovery aims to recover causal structures generating the observational data. Despite its success in certain problems, in many real-world scenarios the observed variables are not the target variables of interest, but the imperfect measures of the target variables. Causal discovery under measurement error aims to recover the causal graph among unobserved target variables from observations made with measurement error. We consider a specific formulation of the problem, where the unobserved target variables follow a linear non-Gaussian acyclic model, and the measurement process follows the random measurement error model. Existing methods on this formulation rely on non-scalable over-complete independent component analysis (OICA). In this work, we propose the Transformed Independent Noise (TIN) condition, which checks for independence between a specific linear transformation of some measured variables and certain other measured variables. By leveraging the non-Gaussianity and higher-order statistics of data, TIN is informative about the graph structure among the unobserved target variables. By utilizing TIN, the ordered group decomposition of the causal model is identifiable. In other words, we could achieve what once required OICA to achieve by only conducting independence tests. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness and reliability of our method.
summary: Causal discovery aims to recover causal structures generating the observational data. Despite its success in certain problems, in many real-world scenarios the observed variables are not the target variables of interest, but the imperfect measures of the target variables. Causal discovery under measurement error aims to recover the causal graph among unobserved target variables from observations made with measurement error. We consider a specific formulation of the problem, where the unobserved target variables follow a linear non-Gaussian acyclic model, and the measurement process follows the random measurement error model. Existing methods on this formulation rely on non-scalable over-complete independent component analysis (OICA). In this work, we propose the Transformed Independent Noise (TIN) condition, which checks for independence between a specific linear transformation of some measured variables and certain other measured variables. By leveraging the non-Gaussianity and higher-order statistics of data, TIN is informative about the graph structure among the unobserved target variables. By utilizing TIN, the ordered group decomposition of the causal model is identifiable. In other words, we could achieve what once required OICA to achieve by only conducting independence tests. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness and reliability of our method.
abstract_zh: 因果发现旨在恢复生成观测数据的因果结构。尽管它在某些问题上取得了成功，但在许多现实场景中，观察到的变量并不是感兴趣的目标变量，而是目标变量的不完善度量。测量误差下的因果发现旨在从测量误差下的观测中恢复未观测到的目标变量之间的因果图。我们考虑问题的具体表述，其中未观测到的目标变量遵循线性非高斯非循环模型，测量过程遵循随机测量误差模型。该公式的现有方法依赖于不可扩展的过完全独立成分分析 (OICA)。在这项工作中，我们提出了变换独立噪声（TIN）条件，它检查一些测量变量和某些其他测量变量的特定线性变换之间的独立性。通过利用数据的非高斯性和高阶统计量，TIN 可以提供有关未观测目标变量之间的图结构的信息。通过利用 TIN，因果模型的有序群分解是可识别的。换句话说，我们只需进行独立性测试就可以实现曾经要求 OICA 实现的目标。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性和可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于独立性检验的因果发现方法，用于在存在测量误差和线性非高斯模型的情况下恢复未观测目标变量的因果图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖非可扩展的过完备独立成分分析（OICA），难以处理大规模数据，需提出更高效的因果发现框架。
AI.method: 提出变换独立噪声（TIN）条件，通过检验特定线性变换变量与其他变量的独立性，结合非高斯性和高阶统计量推断未观测变量的因果结构。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验验证了该方法的有效性和可靠性，能够准确识别因果图的有序分组分解。
AI.conclusion: TIN条件为测量误差下的因果发现提供了可扩展替代方案，通过独立性检验实现与OICA相同的目标，提升了方法的实用性。

motivation: 现有方法依赖非可扩展的过完备独立成分分析（OICA），难以处理大规模数据，需提出更高效的因果发现框架。

search_text: Independence Testing-Based Approach to Causal Discovery under Measurement Error and Linear Non-Gaussian Models 测量误差和线性非高斯模型下基于独立性测试的因果发现方法 Causal discovery aims to recover causal structures generating the observational data. Despite its success in certain problems, in many real-world scenarios the observed variables are not the target variables of interest, but the imperfect measures of the target variables. Causal discovery under measurement error aims to recover the causal graph among unobserved target variables from observations made with measurement error. We consider a specific formulation of the problem, where the unobserved target variables follow a linear non-Gaussian acyclic model, and the measurement process follows the random measurement error model. Existing methods on this formulation rely on non-scalable over-complete independent component analysis (OICA). In this work, we propose the Transformed Independent Noise (TIN) condition, which checks for independence between a specific linear transformation of some measured variables and certain other measured variables. By leveraging the non-Gaussianity and higher-order statistics of data, TIN is informative about the graph structure among the unobserved target variables. By utilizing TIN, the ordered group decomposition of the causal model is identifiable. In other words, we could achieve what once required OICA to achieve by only conducting independence tests. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness and reliability of our method. 因果发现旨在恢复生成观测数据的因果结构。尽管它在某些问题上取得了成功，但在许多现实场景中，观察到的变量并不是感兴趣的目标变量，而是目标变量的不完善度量。测量误差下的因果发现旨在从测量误差下的观测中恢复未观测到的目标变量之间的因果图。我们考虑问题的具体表述，其中未观测到的目标变量遵循线性非高斯非循环模型，测量过程遵循随机测量误差模型。该公式的现有方法依赖于不可扩展的过完全独立成分分析 (OICA)。在这项工作中，我们提出了变换独立噪声（TIN）条件，它检查一些测量变量和某些其他测量变量的特定线性变换之间的独立性。通过利用数据的非高斯性和高阶统计量，TIN 可以提供有关未观测目标变量之间的图结构的信息。通过利用 TIN，因果模型的有序群分解是可识别的。换句话说，我们只需进行独立性测试就可以实现曾经要求 OICA 实现的目标。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性和可靠性。 本文提出一种基于独立性检验的因果发现方法，用于在存在测量误差和线性非高斯模型的情况下恢复未观测目标变量的因果图。 Haoyue Dai,Peter Spirtes,Kun Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Single Image Super-Resolution Using Lightweight Networks Based on Swin Transformer
title_zh: 使用基于 Swin Transformer 的轻量级网络的单图像超分辨率
abstract: Image super-resolution reconstruction is an important task in the field of image processing technology, which can restore low resolution image to high quality image with high resolution. In recent years, deep learning has been applied in the field of image super-resolution reconstruction. With the continuous development of deep neural network, the quality of the reconstructed images has been greatly improved, but the model complexity has also been increased. In this paper, we propose two lightweight models named as MSwinSR and UGSwinSR based on Swin Transformer. The most important structure in MSwinSR is called Multi-size Swin Transformer Block (MSTB), which mainly contains four parallel multi-head self-attention (MSA) blocks. UGSwinSR combines U-Net and GAN with Swin Transformer. Both of them can reduce the model complexity, but MSwinSR can reach a higher objective quality, while UGSwinSR can reach a higher perceptual quality. The experimental results demonstrate that MSwinSR increases PSNR by $\mathbf{0.07dB}$ compared with the state-of-the-art model SwinIR, while the number of parameters can reduced by $\mathbf{30.68\%}$, and the calculation cost can reduced by $\mathbf{9.936\%}$. UGSwinSR can effectively reduce the amount of calculation of the network, which can reduced by $\mathbf{90.92\%}$ compared with SwinIR.

The most important structure in MSwinSR is called Multi-size Swin Transformer Block (MSTB), which mainly contains four parallel multi-head self-attention (MSA) blocks. UGSwinSR combines U-Net and GAN with Swin Transformer. Both of them can reduce the model complexity, but MSwinSR can reach a higher objective quality, while UGSwinSR can reach a higher perceptual quality. The experimental results demonstrate that MSwinSR increases PSNR by $\mathbf{0.07dB}$ compared with the state-of-the-art model SwinIR, while the number of parameters can reduced by $\mathbf{30.68\%}$, and the calculation cost can reduced by $\mathbf{9.936\%}$. UGSwinSR can effectively reduce the amount of calculation of the network, which can reduced by $\mathbf{90.92\%}$ compared with SwinIR.
abstract_zh: 图像超分辨率重建是图像处理技术领域的一项重要任务，可以将低分辨率图像恢复为高分辨率的高质量图像。近年来，深度学习在图像超分辨率重建领域得到了应用。随着深度神经网络的不断发展，重建图像的质量得到了很大的提高，但模型的复杂度也随之增加。在本文中，我们提出了两个基于 Swin Transformer 的轻量级模型，分别命名为 MSwinSR 和 UGSwinSR。 MSwinSR中最重要的结构称为多尺寸Swin Transformer Block（MSTB），它主要包含四个并行的多头自注意力（MSA）块。 UGSwinSR 将 U-Net 和 GAN 与 Swin Transformer 结合起来。两者都可以降低模型复杂度，但MSwinSR可以达到更高的客观质量，而UGSwinSR可以达到更高的感知质量。实验结果表明，与最先进的模型SwinIR相比，MSwinSR将PSNR提高了$\mathbf{0.07dB}$，同时参数数量减少了$\mathbf{30.68\%}$，计算成本减少了$\mathbf{9.936\%}$。 UGSwinSR可以有效减少网络的计算量，与SwinIR相比可以减少$\mathbf{90.92\%}$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Swin Transformer的轻量级网络MSwinSR和UGSwinSR，用于单图像超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽提升了图像超分辨率质量，但模型复杂度增加，需在保持质量的同时降低计算成本。
AI.method: 设计多尺寸Swin Transformer块（MSTB）并行结构，结合U-Net与GAN框架，优化模型参数与计算量。
AI.result: MSwinSR相较SwinIR参数减少30.68%，计算成本降低9.936%，PSNR提升0.07dB；UGSwinSR计算量降低90.92%。
AI.conclusion: 两种模型有效平衡了超分辨率质量与效率，分别在客观指标和感知质量上优于现有方法。

authors_text: Xiaowen Liu,Renhua Wang,Hongtao Huo,Xin Yang,Jing Li
title: An Attention-Guided and Wavelet-Constrained Generative Adversarial Network for Infrared and Visible Image Fusion
title_zh: 用于红外和可见光图像融合的注意力引导和小波约束生成对抗网络
abstract: The GAN-based infrared and visible image fusion methods have gained ever-increasing attention due to its effectiveness and superiority. However, the existing methods adopt the global pixel distribution of source images as the basis for discrimination, which fails to focus on the key modality information. Moreover, the dual-discriminator based methods suffer from the confrontation between the discriminators. To this end, we propose an attention-guided and wavelet-constrained GAN for infrared and visible image fusion (AWFGAN). In this method, two unique discrimination strategies are designed to improve the fusion performance. Specifically, we introduce the spatial attention modules (SAM) into the generator to obtain the spatial attention maps, and then the attention maps are utilized to force the discrimination of infrared images to focus on the target regions. In addition, we extend the discrimination range of visible information to the wavelet subspace, which can force the generator to restore the high-frequency details of visible images. Ablation experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in eliminating the confrontation between discriminators. And the comparison experiments on public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method.
summary: The GAN-based infrared and visible image fusion methods have gained ever-increasing attention due to its effectiveness and superiority. However, the existing methods adopt the global pixel distribution of source images as the basis for discrimination, which fails to focus on the key modality information. Moreover, the dual-discriminator based methods suffer from the confrontation between the discriminators. To this end, we propose an attention-guided and wavelet-constrained GAN for infrared and visible image fusion (AWFGAN). In this method, two unique discrimination strategies are designed to improve the fusion performance. Specifically, we introduce the spatial attention modules (SAM) into the generator to obtain the spatial attention maps, and then the attention maps are utilized to force the discrimination of infrared images to focus on the target regions. In addition, we extend the discrimination range of visible information to the wavelet subspace, which can force the generator to restore the high-frequency details of visible images. Ablation experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in eliminating the confrontation between discriminators. And the comparison experiments on public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 基于GAN的红外和可见光图像融合方法因其有效性和优越性而受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有方法采用源图像的全局像素分布作为判别依据，未能关注关键模态信息。此外，基于双判别器的方法还面临判别器之间的对抗问题。为此，我们提出了一种用于红外和可见光图像融合的注意力引导和小波约束的 GAN（AWFGAN）。在该方法中，设计了两种独特的判别策略来提高融合性能。具体来说，我们将空间注意力模块（SAM）引入到生成器中以获得空间注意力图，然后利用注意力图强制红外图像的辨别集中在目标区域。此外，我们将可见信息的辨别范围扩展到小波子空间，这可以迫使生成器恢复可见图像的高频细节。消融实验证明了我们的方法在消除鉴别器之间的对抗方面的有效性。并且在公共数据集上的对比实验证明了该方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力引导和小波约束的生成对抗网络（AWFGAN），用于红外与可见光图像融合。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于GAN的红外与可见光图像融合方法未能关注关键模态信息，并且双判别器方法存在判别器之间的冲突问题。
AI.method: 本文设计了两种独特的判别策略：引入空间注意力模块（SAM）以获取空间注意力图，使红外图像判别聚焦于目标区域；扩展可见信息的判别范围至小波子空间，以恢复可见图像的高频细节。
AI.result: 消融实验表明该方法能有效消除判别器之间的冲突，公共数据集上的对比实验验证了方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的AWFGAN方法在红外与可见光图像融合任务中表现出色，有效解决了现有方法的不足。

In addition, we extend the discrimination range of visible information to the wavelet subspace, which can force the generator to restore the high-frequency details of visible images. Ablation experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in eliminating the confrontation between discriminators. And the comparison experiments on public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method. 基于GAN的红外和可见光图像融合方法因其有效性和优越性而受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有方法采用源图像的全局像素分布作为判别依据，未能关注关键模态信息。此外，基于双判别器的方法还面临判别器之间的对抗问题。为此，我们提出了一种用于红外和可见光图像融合的注意力引导和小波约束的 GAN（AWFGAN）。在该方法中，设计了两种独特的判别策略来提高融合性能。具体来说，我们将空间注意力模块（SAM）引入到生成器中以获得空间注意力图，然后利用注意力图强制红外图像的辨别集中在目标区域。此外，我们将可见信息的辨别范围扩展到小波子空间，这可以迫使生成器恢复可见图像的高频细节。消融实验证明了我们的方法在消除鉴别器之间的对抗方面的有效性。并且在公共数据集上的对比实验证明了该方法的有效性和优越性。 本文提出了一种基于注意力引导和小波约束的生成对抗网络（AWFGAN），用于红外与可见光图像融合。 Xiaowen Liu,Renhua Wang,Hongtao Huo,Xin Yang,Jing Li cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Towards Sustainable Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 迈向可持续的自我监督学习
abstract: Although increasingly training-expensive, most self-supervised learning (SSL) models have repeatedly been trained from scratch but not fully utilized, since only a few SOTAs are employed for downstream tasks. In this work, we explore a sustainable SSL framework with two major challenges: i) learning a stronger new SSL model based on the existing pretrained SSL model, also called as "base" model, in a cost-friendly manner, ii) allowing the training of the new model to be compatible with various base models. We propose a Target-Enhanced Conditional (TEC) scheme which introduces two components to the existing mask-reconstruction based SSL. Firstly, we propose patch-relation enhanced targets which enhances the target given by base model and encourages the new model to learn semantic-relation knowledge from the base model by using incomplete inputs. This hardening and target-enhancing help the new model surpass the base model, since they enforce additional patch relation modeling to handle incomplete input. Secondly, we introduce a conditional adapter that adaptively adjusts new model prediction to align with the target of different base models. Extensive experimental results show that our TEC scheme can accelerate the learning speed, and also improve SOTA SSL base models, e.g., MAE and iBOT, taking an explorative step towards sustainable SSL.
summary: Although increasingly training-expensive, most self-supervised learning (SSL) models have repeatedly been trained from scratch but not fully utilized, since only a few SOTAs are employed for downstream tasks. In this work, we explore a sustainable SSL framework with two major challenges: i) learning a stronger new SSL model based on the existing pretrained SSL model, also called as "base" model, in a cost-friendly manner, ii) allowing the training of the new model to be compatible with various base models. We propose a Target-Enhanced Conditional (TEC) scheme which introduces two components to the existing mask-reconstruction based SSL. Firstly, we propose patch-relation enhanced targets which enhances the target given by base model and encourages the new model to learn semantic-relation knowledge from the base model by using incomplete inputs. This hardening and target-enhancing help the new model surpass the base model, since they enforce additional patch relation modeling to handle incomplete input. Secondly, we introduce a conditional adapter that adaptively adjusts new model prediction to align with the target of different base models. Extensive experimental results show that our TEC scheme can accelerate the learning speed, and also improve SOTA SSL base models, e.g., MAE and iBOT, taking an explorative step towards sustainable SSL.
abstract_zh: 尽管训练成本越来越高，但大多数自监督学习（SSL）模型都从头开始反复训练，但并未得到充分利用，因为只有少数 SOTA 用于下游任务。在这项工作中，我们探索了一个可持续的 SSL 框架，它面临两个主要挑战：i）以成本友好的方式基于现有的预训练 SSL 模型（也称为“基础”模型）学习更强大的新 SSL 模型，ii）允许新模型的训练与各种基础模型兼容。我们提出了一种目标增强条件（TEC）方案，该方案向现有基于掩码重建的 SSL 引入了两个组件。首先，我们提出了补丁关系增强目标，它增强了基本模型给出的目标，并鼓励新模型使用不完整的输入从基本模型中学习语义关系知识。这种强化和目标增强有助于新模型超越基本模型，因为它们强制执行额外的补丁关系建模来处理不完整的输入。其次，我们引入了一个条件适配器，可以自适应地调整新模型预测以与不同基础模型的目标保持一致。大量的实验结果表明，我们的TEC方案可以加快学习速度，并改进SOTA SSL基础模型，例如MAE和iBOT，向可持续SSL迈出了探索性的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可持续的自监督学习框架，通过改进现有预训练模型而非从头训练新模型，以降低成本并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自监督学习模型通常从头训练且重复利用不足，导致资源浪费。作者旨在通过高效复用现有模型，推动更可持续的SSL发展。
AI.method: 提出Target-Enhanced Conditional (TEC)方案，包含两部分：1）通过增强补丁关系的目标提升语义学习；2）引入条件适配器以兼容不同基础模型的预测对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明TEC方案加速了学习速度，并提升了MAE、iBOT等SOTA模型的性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: TEC为可持续SSL提供了新方向，通过高效模型更新和跨基础模型兼容性，减少训练成本并提升模型表现。

title: SimpleClick: Interactive Image Segmentation with Simple Vision Transformers
title_zh: SimpleClick：使用 Simple Vision Transformers 进行交互式图像分割
comment: Tech report. Update 03/11/2023: Add results on a tiny model and append supplementary materials
comments: Tech report. Update 03/11/2023: Add results on a tiny model and append supplementary materials
abstract: Click-based interactive image segmentation aims at extracting objects with a limited user clicking. A hierarchical backbone is the de-facto architecture for current methods. Recently, the plain, non-hierarchical Vision Transformer (ViT) has emerged as a competitive backbone for dense prediction tasks. This design allows the original ViT to be a foundation model that can be finetuned for downstream tasks without redesigning a hierarchical backbone for pretraining. Although this design is simple and has been proven effective, it has not yet been explored for interactive image segmentation. To fill this gap, we propose SimpleClick, the first interactive segmentation method that leverages a plain backbone. Based on the plain backbone, we introduce a symmetric patch embedding layer that encodes clicks into the backbone with minor modifications to the backbone itself. With the plain backbone pretrained as a masked autoencoder (MAE), SimpleClick achieves state-of-the-art performance. Remarkably, our method achieves 4.15 NoC@90 on SBD, improving 21.8% over the previous best result. Extensive evaluation on medical images demonstrates the generalizability of our method. We further develop an extremely tiny ViT backbone for SimpleClick and provide a detailed computational analysis, highlighting its suitability as a practical annotation tool.
summary: Click-based interactive image segmentation aims at extracting objects with a limited user clicking. A hierarchical backbone is the de-facto architecture for current methods. Recently, the plain, non-hierarchical Vision Transformer (ViT) has emerged as a competitive backbone for dense prediction tasks. This design allows the original ViT to be a foundation model that can be finetuned for downstream tasks without redesigning a hierarchical backbone for pretraining. Although this design is simple and has been proven effective, it has not yet been explored for interactive image segmentation. To fill this gap, we propose SimpleClick, the first interactive segmentation method that leverages a plain backbone. Based on the plain backbone, we introduce a symmetric patch embedding layer that encodes clicks into the backbone with minor modifications to the backbone itself. With the plain backbone pretrained as a masked autoencoder (MAE), SimpleClick achieves state-of-the-art performance. Remarkably, our method achieves 4.15 NoC@90 on SBD, improving 21.8% over the previous best result. Extensive evaluation on medical images demonstrates the generalizability of our method. We further develop an extremely tiny ViT backbone for SimpleClick and provide a detailed computational analysis, highlighting its suitability as a practical annotation tool.
abstract_zh: 基于点击的交互式图像分割旨在通过有限的用户点击来提取对象。分层主干是当前方法事实上的架构。最近，简单的非分层视觉变换器（ViT）已成为密集预测任务的竞争支柱。这种设计使原始 ViT 成为基础模型，可以针对下游任务进行微调，而无需重新设计用于预训练的分层主干。尽管这种设计很简单并且已被证明有效，但尚未针对交互式图像分割进行探索。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 SimpleClick，这是第一个利用普通主干的交互式分割方法。基于普通主干，我们引入了一个对称补丁嵌入层，该层将点击编码到主干中，并对主干本身进行了微小的修改。通过将普通主干预训练为掩码自动编码器 (MAE)，SimpleClick 实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，我们的方法在 SBD 上达到了 4.15 NoC@90，比之前的最佳结果提高了 21.8%。对医学图像的广泛评估证明了我们方法的普遍性。我们进一步为 SimpleClick 开发了一个极其微小的 ViT 主干，并提供了详细的计算分析，强调了它作为实用注释工具的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimpleClick，一种基于简单视觉变换器（ViT）的交互式图像分割方法，通过少量用户点击实现目标提取。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式分割方法依赖复杂分层架构，而简单非分层ViT在密集预测任务中表现优异但未被探索用于交互式分割，需填补此空白。
AI.method: 基于预训练的掩码自编码器（MAE）ViT，引入对称补丁嵌入层以编码点击信息，仅需微调主干网络，同时开发超轻量ViT版本。
AI.result: 在SBD数据集上NoC@90指标达4.15，较先前最佳结果提升21.8%；医学图像实验验证了方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: SimpleClick通过简单架构实现高性能交互分割，计算分析证明其作为实用标注工具的可行性。

authors_text: Murali Raghu Babu Balusu,Yangfeng Ji,Jacob Eisenstein
title: Pre-trained Sentence Embeddings for Implicit Discourse Relation Classification
title_zh: 用于隐式话语关系分类的预训练句子嵌入
abstract: Implicit discourse relations bind smaller linguistic units into coherent texts. Automatic sense prediction for implicit relations is hard, because it requires understanding the semantics of the linked arguments. Furthermore, annotated datasets contain relatively few labeled examples, due to the scale of the phenomenon: on average each discourse relation encompasses several dozen words. In this paper, we explore the utility of pre-trained sentence embeddings as base representations in a neural network for implicit discourse relation sense classification. We present a series of experiments using both supervised end-to-end trained models and pre-trained sentence encoding techniques - SkipThought, Sent2vec and Infersent. The pre-trained embeddings are competitive with the end-to-end model, and the approaches are complementary, with combined models yielding significant performance improvements on two of the three evaluations.
summary: Implicit discourse relations bind smaller linguistic units into coherent texts. Automatic sense prediction for implicit relations is hard, because it requires understanding the semantics of the linked arguments. Furthermore, annotated datasets contain relatively few labeled examples, due to the scale of the phenomenon: on average each discourse relation encompasses several dozen words. In this paper, we explore the utility of pre-trained sentence embeddings as base representations in a neural network for implicit discourse relation sense classification. We present a series of experiments using both supervised end-to-end trained models and pre-trained sentence encoding techniques - SkipThought, Sent2vec and Infersent. The pre-trained embeddings are competitive with the end-to-end model, and the approaches are complementary, with combined models yielding significant performance improvements on two of the three evaluations.
abstract_zh: 隐性话语关系将较小的语言单位绑定成连贯的文本。隐式关系的自动意义预测很困难，因为它需要理解链接参数的语义。此外，由于现象的规模，带注释的数据集包含相对较少的带标签示例：平均每个话语关系包含几十个单词。在本文中，我们探索了预训练句子嵌入作为神经网络中隐式话语关系意义分类的基本表示的实用性。我们使用有监督的端到端训练模型和预训练的句子编码技术（SkipThought、Sent2vec 和 Infersent）进行了一系列实验。预训练的嵌入与端到端模型具有竞争力，并且这些方法是互补的，组合模型在三个评估中的两个上产生了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究利用预训练句子嵌入技术解决隐式话语关系分类任务，应对标注数据稀缺和语义理解难度高的挑战。
AI.motivation: 隐式话语关系分类需要精准理解语义且标注数据有限，传统方法难以有效建模长距离语义关联。
AI.method: 对比实验采用SkipThought、Sent2vec、Infersent等预训练嵌入技术，结合端到端神经网络模型进行分类任务评估。
AI.result: 预训练嵌入方法性能与端到端模型相当，且两种方法结合后在两个数据集上取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 预训练句子嵌入能有效捕捉语义信息，与端到端模型结合可互补优势，为隐式话语关系分类提供新思路。

search_text: Pre-trained Sentence Embeddings for Implicit Discourse Relation Classification 用于隐式话语关系分类的预训练句子嵌入 Implicit discourse relations bind smaller linguistic units into coherent texts. Automatic sense prediction for implicit relations is hard, because it requires understanding the semantics of the linked arguments. Furthermore, annotated datasets contain relatively few labeled examples, due to the scale of the phenomenon: on average each discourse relation encompasses several dozen words. In this paper, we explore the utility of pre-trained sentence embeddings as base representations in a neural network for implicit discourse relation sense classification. We present a series of experiments using both supervised end-to-end trained models and pre-trained sentence encoding techniques - SkipThought, Sent2vec and Infersent. The pre-trained embeddings are competitive with the end-to-end model, and the approaches are complementary, with combined models yielding significant performance improvements on two of the three evaluations. 隐性话语关系将较小的语言单位绑定成连贯的文本。隐式关系的自动意义预测很困难，因为它需要理解链接参数的语义。此外，由于现象的规模，带注释的数据集包含相对较少的带标签示例：平均每个话语关系包含几十个单词。在本文中，我们探索了预训练句子嵌入作为神经网络中隐式话语关系意义分类的基本表示的实用性。我们使用有监督的端到端训练模型和预训练的句子编码技术（SkipThought、Sent2vec 和 Infersent）进行了一系列实验。预训练的嵌入与端到端模型具有竞争力，并且这些方法是互补的，组合模型在三个评估中的两个上产生了显着的性能改进。 本论文研究利用预训练句子嵌入技术解决隐式话语关系分类任务，应对标注数据稀缺和语义理解难度高的挑战。 Murali Raghu Babu Balusu,Yangfeng Ji,Jacob Eisenstein cs.CL,cs.AI
